148// ************************************* AckPayload structure ******************************************************
163struct Payload
164{
165 uint8_t Purpose; // Defines meaning of the remainder
166 // Highest BIT of Purpose means HOP NOW! IF ON
167 uint8_t Byte1; //
168 uint8_t Byte2; //
169 uint8_t Byte3; //
170 uint8_t Byte4; //
171 uint8_t Byte5; //
172};
173Payload AckPayload;
174
175const uint8_t AckPayloadSize = sizeof(AckPayload); // i.e. 6

523
524uint8_t Ascii(char c)
525{
526 return (uint8_t)c;
527}
528// **************************************************************** Play a sound from RAM *********************************************
529void PlaySound(uint16_t TheSound)
530{ // Plays a sound identified by a number
531
532 char Sound[20];
533 char SoundPrefix[] = "play 0,";
534 char SoundPostfix[] = "0";
535 char NB[6];
536 Str(NB, TheSound, 1);
537 strcpy(Sound, SoundPrefix);
538 strcat(Sound, NB);
539 strcat(Sound, SoundPostfix);
540 SendCommand(Sound);
541}
542/******************* DeltaGMT is a user defined representation of time zone. It should never exceed 24. Not on this planet. **********/
543void FixDeltaGMTSign()
544{
545 if (DeltaGMT < -24) DeltaGMT = 0; // Undefined value?f
546 if (DeltaGMT > 24) { // This fixes the sign bit if negative !!!! (There's surely a better way !!!)
547 DeltaGMT ^= 0xffff; // toggle every bit! :-)
548 ++DeltaGMT; // Add one
549 DeltaGMT = -DeltaGMT; // it's definately meant to be negative!
550 }
551}
552
553/************************************************************************************************************/
554// This function reads data from BUDDY (Slave) BUT uses it ONLY WHILE buddy switch is on
555
556void GetSlaveChannelValues()
557{
558 bool failSafeM; // These flags not used, yet...
559 bool lostFrameM;
560
561 if (BuddyON){
562 if (MySbus.read(&SbusChannels[0], &failSafeM, &lostFrameM)) { // Buddy is On
563 SBUSTimer = millis(); // RESET timeout when data comes in
564 } // Even if there's no new data, re-use old data
565 if (millis() - SBUSTimer < 500) { // Ignore data more than 500ms old
566 for (int j = 0; j < CHANNELSUSED; ++j) { // While slave has control, his stick data replaces all ours
567 if (BuddyControlled & 1 << j) { // Test if this channel is buddy controlled. If not leave it unchanged
568 SendBuffer[j] = map(SbusChannels[j], RANGEMIN, RANGEMAX, MINMICROS, MAXMICROS); // Put re-mapped data where we can use it.
569 }
570 }
571 if (!SlaveHasControl && AnnounceConnected) {
572 PlaySound(BUDDYMSG);
573 LastShowTime = 0;
574 }
575 SlaveHasControl = true;
576 }
577 }
578 else { // Buddy is Off
579 if (SlaveHasControl && AnnounceConnected) {
580 PlaySound(MASTERMSG);
581 LastShowTime = 0;
582 }
583 SlaveHasControl = false;
584 }
585}
586/**************************** Clear Macros if junk was loaded from SD ********************************************************************************/
587void CheckMacrosBuffer()
588{
589
590 bool junk = false;
591 for (uint8_t i = 0; i < MAXMACROS; ++i) {
592 if (MacrosBuffer[i][MACROTRIGGERCHANNEL] > 16) junk = true;
593 if (MacrosBuffer[i][MACROMOVECHANNEL] > 16) junk = true;
594 if (MacrosBuffer[i][MACROMOVETOPOSITION] > 180) junk = true;
595 if (MacrosBuffer[i][MACROTRIGGERCHANNEL] > 0) UseMacros = true;
596 }
597 if (junk == false) return;
598 UseMacros = false;
599 for (uint8_t j = 0; j < BYTESPERMACRO; ++j) {
600 for (uint8_t i = 0; i < MAXMACROS; ++i) {
601 MacrosBuffer[i][j] = 0;
602 }
603 }
604}
605/************************************************************************************************************/
606FLASHMEM void ResetSubTrims()
607{
608 for (int i = 0; i < 16; ++i) {
609 SubTrims[i] = 127;
610 }
611}
612/************************************************************************************************************/
614// This funtion is used by the BUDDY slave to send it's controls out down a wire using SBUS
615
616FASTRUN void MapToSBUS()
617{
618 if (millis() - SBUSTimer >= SBUSRATE)
619 {
620 SBUSTimer = millis();
621
622 for (int j = 0; j < CHANNELSUSED; ++j)
623 {
624 SbusChannels[j] = static_cast<uint16_t>(map(SendBuffer[j], MINMICROS, MAXMICROS, RANGEMIN, RANGEMAX));
625 }
626 MySbus.write(SbusChannels);
627 }
628}
629/*********************************************************************************************************************************/
630
631uint8_t decToBcd(uint8_t val)
632{
633 return ((val / 10 * 16) + (val % 10));
634}
635
636/*********************************************************************************************************************************/
637
638uint8_t bcdToDec(uint8_t val)
639{
640 return ((val / 16 * 10) + (val % 16));
641}
642
643/*********************************************************************************************************************************/
644
645FLASHMEM void SetTheRTC()
646{
647 uint8_t zero = 0x00;
648 Wire.beginTransmission(DS1307_ADDRESS);
649 Wire.write(zero); // Stop the oscillator
650 Wire.write(decToBcd(Gsecond));
651 Wire.write(decToBcd(Gminute));
652 Wire.write(decToBcd(Ghour));
653 Wire.write(decToBcd(GweekDay));
654 Wire.write(decToBcd(GmonthDay));
655 Wire.write(decToBcd(Gmonth));
656 Wire.write(decToBcd(Gyear));
657 Wire.write(zero); // Re-start it
658 Wire.endTransmission();
659}
660
661/*********************************************************************************************************************************/
662void ReadTheRTC()
663{
664 uint8_t second = tm.Second; // 0-59
665 uint8_t minute = tm.Minute; // 0-59
666 uint8_t hour = tm.Hour; // 0-23
667 uint8_t weekDay = tm.Wday; // 1-7
668 uint8_t monthDay = tm.Day; // 1-31
669 uint8_t month = tm.Month; // 1-12
670 uint8_t year = tm.Year; // 0-99
671 Gsecond = second;
672 Gminute = minute;
673 Ghour = hour;
674 GweekDay = weekDay;
675 GmonthDay = monthDay;
676 Gmonth = month;
677 Gyear = year - 30; // ???
678}
679/*********************************************************************************************************************************/
680void SynchRTCwithGPSTime()
681{ // This function corrects the time and the date.
682 if (!GPSTimeSynched) {
683 GPSTimeSynched = true;
684 Gsecond = GPSSecs;
685 Gminute = GPSMins;
686 Ghour = GPSHours;
687 GmonthDay = GPSDay;
688 Gmonth = GPSMonth;
689 Gyear = GPSYear + 1744; // ????
690 SetTheRTC();
691 }
692}
693/*********************************************************************************************************************************/
694
695void AdjustDateTime(uint8_t MinChange, uint8_t HourChange, uint8_t YearChange, uint8_t MonthChange, uint8_t DateChange)
696{
697 ReadTheRTC();
698 Gminute += MinChange;
699 if (Gminute > 59) {
700 Gminute = 0;
701 if (Ghour < 23) {
702 ++Ghour;
703 }
704 }
705 if (Gminute < 1) {
706 Gminute = 0;
707 if (Ghour > 0) {
708 --Ghour;
709 }
710 }
711 Ghour += HourChange;
712 if (Ghour < 0) Ghour = 0;
713 if (Ghour > 23) Ghour = 23;
714 Gyear += YearChange;
715 if (Gyear < 0) Gyear = 0;
716 if (Gyear > 99) Gyear = 99;
717 Gmonth += MonthChange;
718 if (Gmonth < 1) Gmonth = 1;
719 if (Gmonth > 12) Gmonth = 12;
720 GmonthDay += DateChange;
721 if (GmonthDay < 1) GmonthDay = 1;
722 if (GmonthDay > 31) GmonthDay = 31;
723 SetTheRTC();
724}
725/*********************************************************************************************************************************/
726
727void IncMinute()
728{
729 uint8_t zero = 0x00;
730 uint8_t c = 1;
731 if (RTC.read(tm)) {
732 AdjustDateTime(c, zero, zero, zero, zero);
733 }
734}
735
736/*********************************************************************************************************************************/
737
738void DecMinute()
739{
740 uint8_t zero = 0x00;
741 uint8_t c = -1;
742 if (RTC.read(tm)) {
743 AdjustDateTime(c, zero, zero, zero, zero);
744 }
745}
746
747/*********************************************************************************************************************************/
748
749void IncHour()
750{
751 uint8_t c = 1;
752 uint8_t zero = 0x00;
753 if (RTC.read(tm)) {
754 AdjustDateTime(zero, c, zero, zero, zero);
755 }
756}
757

761{
762 uint8_t c = -1;
763 uint8_t zero = 0x00;
764 if (RTC.read(tm)) {
765 AdjustDateTime(zero, c, zero, zero, zero);
766 }
767}
768

778}
