3042/************************************************************************************************************/
3043FASTRUN void SetUKFrequencies()
3044{
3045 FHSSChPointer = FHSS_Channels;
3046 UkRules = true;
3047}
3048/************************************************************************************************************/
3049FASTRUN void SetTestFrequencies()
3050{
3051 FHSSChPointer = FHSS_Channels1;
3052 UkRules = false;
3053}
3054/************************************************************************************************************/
3055FASTRUN void CreateTimeStamp(char* DateAndTime)
3056{
3057 char NB[10];
3058 char zero[] = "0";
3059 char Colon[] = "."; // a dot!
3060 char null[] = "";
3061
3062 if (RTC.read(tm)) {
3063 strcpy(DateAndTime, null);
3064 if (MayBeAddZero(tm.Hour)) strcat(DateAndTime, zero);
3065 strcat(DateAndTime, Str(NB, tm.Hour, 0));
3066 strcat(DateAndTime, Colon);
3067 if (MayBeAddZero(tm.Minute)) strcat(DateAndTime, zero);
3068 strcat(DateAndTime, Str(NB, tm.Minute, 0));
3069 strcat(DateAndTime, Colon);
3070 if (MayBeAddZero(tm.Second)) strcat(DateAndTime, zero);
3071 strcat(DateAndTime, Str(NB, tm.Second, 0));
3072 }
3073}
3074
3075/************************************************************************************************************/
3076FASTRUN void CreateTimeDateStamp(char* DateAndTime)
3077{
3078 char NB[10];
3079 char zero[] = "0";
3080 char Dash[] = "-";
3081 char Colon[] = "."; // a dot!
3082 char Space[] = " ";
3083
3084 if (RTC.read(tm)) {
3085 if (MayBeAddZero(tm.Day)) strcat(DateAndTime, zero);
3086 strcpy(DateAndTime, Str(NB, tm.Day, 0));
3087 strcat(DateAndTime, Dash);
3088 if (MayBeAddZero(tm.Month)) strcat(DateAndTime, zero);
3089 strcat(DateAndTime, Str(NB, tm.Month, 0));
3090 strcat(DateAndTime, Dash);
3091 strcat(DateAndTime, (Str(NB, tmYearToCalendar(tm.Year), 0)));
3092 strcat(DateAndTime, Space);
3093 if (MayBeAddZero(tm.Hour)) strcat(DateAndTime, zero);
3094 strcat(DateAndTime, Str(NB, tm.Hour, 0));
3095 strcat(DateAndTime, Colon);
3096 if (MayBeAddZero(tm.Minute)) strcat(DateAndTime, zero);
3097 strcat(DateAndTime, Str(NB, tm.Minute, 0));
3098 strcat(DateAndTime, Colon);
3099 if (MayBeAddZero(tm.Second)) strcat(DateAndTime, zero);
3100 strcat(DateAndTime, Str(NB, tm.Second, 0));
3101 }
3102}
3103/************************************************************************************************************/
3104FASTRUN void MakeLogFileName(char* LogFileName)
3105{
3106 char NB[10];
3107 char Ext[] = ".LOG";
3108 if (RTC.read(tm)) {
3109 strcpy(LogFileName, Str(NB, tm.Day, 0));
3110 strcat(LogFileName, Str(NB, tm.Month, 0));
3111 strcat(LogFileName, Ext);
3112 }
3113}
3114/************************************************************************************************************/
3115FASTRUN void OpenLogFileW(char* LogFileName)
3116{
3117 if (!LogFileOpen) {
3118 LogFileNumber = SD.open(LogFileName, FILE_WRITE);
3119 LogFileOpen = true;
3120 }
3121}
3122// ************************************************************************
3123FASTRUN void CheckLogFileIsOpen()
3124{
3125 char LogFileName[20];
3126 if (!LogFileOpen) {
3127 MakeLogFileName(LogFileName); // Create a "today" filename
3128 OpenLogFileW(LogFileName); // Open file for writing
3129 }
3130}
3131
3132/************************************************************************************************************/
3133FASTRUN void DeleteLogFile(char* LogFileName)
3134{
3135 SD.remove(LogFileName);
3136}
3137/************************************************************************************************************/
3138FASTRUN void DeleteLogFile1()
3139{
3140 char LogFileName[20];
3141 char LogTeXt[] = "LogText";
3142 char BlankText[] = " ";
3143 CloseLogFile();
3144 MakeLogFileName(LogFileName);
3145 DeleteLogFile(LogFileName);
3146 SendText1(LogTeXt, BlankText);
3147 if (!UseLog) return;
3148 if (LedWasGreen) {
3149 RecentStartLine = 0;
3150 ShowLogFile(RecentStartLine);
3151 }
3152}
3153
3154/************************************************************************************************************/
3155FASTRUN void OpenLogFileR(char* LogFileName)
3156{
3157 if (!LogFileOpen) {
3158 LogFileNumber = SD.open(LogFileName, FILE_READ);
3159 LogFileOpen = true;
3160 }
3161}
3162/************************************************************************************************************/
3163FASTRUN void CloseLogFile()
3164{
3165 if (LogFileOpen) LogFileNumber.close();
3166 LogFileOpen = false;
3167}
3168/************************************************************************************************************/
3169FASTRUN void WriteToLogFile(char* SomeData, uint16_t len)
3170{
3171 LogFileNumber.write(SomeData, len);
3172}
3173// ************************************************************************
3174FASTRUN void LogFilePreamble()
3175{
3176 char dbuf[12];
3177 char Divider[] = " - ";
3178 CheckLogFileIsOpen();
3179 CreateTimeStamp(dbuf); // Put time stamp into buffer
3180 WriteToLogFile(dbuf, 9); // Add time stamp
3181 WriteToLogFile(Divider, sizeof(Divider));
3182}
3183
3184// ************************************************************************
3185FASTRUN void LogText(char* TheText, uint16_t len)
3186{
3187 char crlf[] = {'|', 13, 10, 0};
3188 LogFilePreamble();
3189 WriteToLogFile(TheText, len);
3190 WriteToLogFile(crlf, sizeof(crlf));
3191 CloseLogFile();
3192}
3193// ************************************************************************
3194FASTRUN void LogMinGap()
3195{
3196 char TheText[] = "Minimum logged gap (ms): ";
3197 char buf[50] = " ";
3198 char NB[8];
3199 Str(NB, MinimumGap, 0);
3200 strcpy(buf, TheText);
3201 strcat(buf, NB);
3202 LogText(buf, sizeof(buf));
3203}
3204// ************************************************************************
3205FASTRUN void LogConnection()
3206{
3207 char TheText[] = "Connected to ";
3208 char buf[40] = " ";
3209 strcpy(buf, TheText);
3210 strcat(buf, ModelName);
3211 LogText(buf, sizeof(buf));
3212 LogMinGap();
3213}
3214// ************************************************************************
3215FASTRUN void LogDisConnection()
3216{
3217 char TheText[] = "Disconnected from ";
3218 char buf[40] = " ";
3219 strcpy(buf, TheText);
3220 strcat(buf, ModelName);
3221 LogText(buf, sizeof(buf));
3222}
3223// ************************************************************************
3224FASTRUN void LogNewBank()
3225{
3226 char Ltext[] = "Bank: ";
3227 char NB[5];
3228 char thetext[10];
3229 Str(NB, Bank, 0);
3230 strcpy(thetext, Ltext);
3231 strcat(thetext, NB);
3232 LogText(thetext, 7);
3233}
3234
3235
3236// ************************************************************************
3237 FASTRUN void LogMotor(bool On){
3238 char Ltext1[] = "Motor On";
3239 char Ltext0[] = "Motor Off";
3240 char thetext[10];
3241 if (On) strcpy(thetext, Ltext1);
3242 else
3243 strcpy(thetext, Ltext0);
3244 LogText(thetext, 9);
3245 }
3246
3247// ************************************************************************
3248 FASTRUN void LogSafety(bool On){
3249 char Ltext1[] = "Safety On";
3250 char Ltext0[] = "Safety Off";
3251 char thetext[10];
3252 if (On) strcpy(thetext, Ltext1);
3253 else
3254 strcpy(thetext, Ltext0);
3255 LogText(thetext, 10);
3256 }
3257// ************************************************************************
3258
3259FASTRUN void LogThisRX()
3260{
3261 char Ltext[] = "RX: ";
3262 char thetext[10];
3263 strcpy(thetext, Ltext);
3264 strcat(thetext, ThisRadio);
3265 LogText(thetext, 5);
3266}
3267
3268// ************************************************************************
3269FASTRUN void LogLowBattery()
3270{ // Not yet implemented
3271 char TheText[] = "Low battery";
3272 LogText(TheText, strlen(TheText));
3273}
3274// ************************************************************************
3275
3276FASTRUN void LogThisGap()
3277{
3278 char Ltext[] = "Gap: ";
3279 char NB[5];
3280 char thetext[10];
3281 if (ThisGap > 1000) return;
3282 Str(NB, ThisGap, 0);
3283 strcpy(thetext, Ltext);
3284 strcat(thetext, NB);
3285 LogText(thetext, 8);
3286}
3287// ************************************************************************
3288
3289FASTRUN void LogThisLongGap()
3290{ // here is logged a Gap that exceeds one second - probably because rx was turned off
3291 ThisGap = (millis() - GapStart);
3292 char Ltext[] = "Long Gap: ";
3293 char NB[5];
3294 char thetext[20];
3295 Str(NB, ThisGap, 0);
3296 strcpy(thetext, Ltext);
3297 strcat(thetext, NB);
3298 LogText(thetext, strlen(Ltext) + 4);
3299}
3300
3301// ************************************************************************
3302
3303FASTRUN void LogPowerOn()
3304{
3305 char Ltext[] = "Power ON";
3306 LogText(Ltext, strlen(Ltext));
3307}
3308
3309// ************************************************************************
3310
3311FASTRUN void LogPowerOff()
3312{
3313 char Ltext[] = "Power OFF";
3314 LogText(Ltext, strlen(Ltext));
3315}
3316
3317// ************************************************************************
3318
3319FASTRUN void LogThisModel()
3320{
3321 char Ltext[] = "Model loaded: ";
3322 char thetext[55];
3323 strcpy(thetext, Ltext);
3324 strcat(thetext, ModelName);
3325 LogText(thetext, strlen(Ltext) + strlen(ModelName));
3326}
3327// ************************************************************************
3328
3329void ShowLogFile(uint8_t StartLine)
3330{
3331 char TheText[MAXFILELEN + 10]; // MAX = 5K or so
3332 char LogFileName[20];
3333 char LogTeXt[] = "LogText";
3334 CloseLogFile();
3335 MakeLogFileName(LogFileName); // Create "today" filename
3336 ReadTextFile(LogFileName, TheText, StartLine, MAXLINES); // Then load text
3337 SendText1(LogTeXt, TheText); // Then send it
3338}
3339
3340/*********************************************************************************************************************************/
3341// SETUP
3342/*********************************************************************************************************************************/
3343FLASHMEM void setup()
3344{
3345 char FrontView_BackGround[] = "FrontView.BackGround";
3346 char FrontView_ForeGround[] = "FrontView.ForeGround";
3347 char FrontView_Special[] = "FrontView.Special";
3348 char FrontView_Highlight[] = "FrontView.Highlight";
3349 char err_chksm[] = "File checksum?";
3350 char err_404[] = "File not found";
3351 char err_MotorOn[] = " MOTOR IS ON! ";
3352
3353 pinMode(REDLED, OUTPUT);
3354 pinMode(GREENLED, OUTPUT);
3355 pinMode(BLUELED, OUTPUT);
3356 pinMode(POWER_OFF_PIN, OUTPUT);
3357 BlueLedOn();
3358 NEXTION.begin(921600); // BAUD rate also set in display code THIS IS THE MAX (was 115200)
3359 InitMaxMin(); // in case not yet calibrated
3360 InitCentreDegrees(); // In case not yet calibrated
3361 ResetSubTrims();
3362 CentreTrims();
3363 WatchDogConfig.window = WATCHDOGMAXRATE; // = MINIMUM RATE in milli seconds, (32ms to 522.232s) must be MUCH smaller than timeout
3364 WatchDogConfig.timeout = WATCHDOGTIMEOUT; // = MAX TIMEOUT in milli seconds, (32ms to 522.232s)
3365 WatchDogConfig.callback = WatchDogCallBack;
3366 TeensyWatchDog.begin(WatchDogConfig);
3367 LastDogKick = millis(); // needed? - yes!
3368
3369 Procrastinate(WARMUPDELAY);
3370 if (!SD.begin(BUILTIN_SDCARD)) { // MUST return true or all is lost!
3371 Procrastinate(WARMUPDELAY);
3372 SD.begin(BUILTIN_SDCARD); // a second attempt for iffy sd cards ?!
3373 }
3374 ErrorState = NOERROR;
3375
3376 if (CheckFileExists(ModelsFile)) {
3377 if (!LoadAllParameters()) { // if file not good ..
3378 ErrorState = CHECKSUMERROR;
3379 }
3380 } else {
3381 ErrorState = MODELSFILENOTFOUND; // if no file ... or no SD
3382 }
3383
3384
3385
3386 teensyMAC(MacAddress); // Get MAC address and use it as pipe address
3387 NewPipe = (uint64_t)MacAddress[0] << 40;
3388 NewPipe += (uint64_t)MacAddress[1] << 32;
3389 NewPipe += (uint64_t)MacAddress[2] << 24;
3390 NewPipe += (uint64_t)MacAddress[3] << 16;
3391 NewPipe += (uint64_t)MacAddress[4] << 8;
3392 NewPipe += (uint64_t)MacAddress[5];
3393 Wire.begin();
3394 ScanI2c();
3395 if (USE_INA219) ina219.begin();
3396 InitSwitchesAndTrims();
3397 if(!BuddyPupilOnSbus) InitRadio(DefaultPipe);
3398 Procrastinate(WARMUPDELAY); // Allow Nextion time to warm up
3399 SendValue(FrontView_BackGround, BackGroundColour); // Get colours ready
3400 SendValue(FrontView_ForeGround, ForeGroundColour);
3401 SendValue(FrontView_Special, SpecialColour);
3402 SendValue(FrontView_Highlight, HighlightColour);
3403
3404
3405 SendCommand(page_FrontView);
3406 SetAudioVolume(AudioVolume);
3407 if (PlayFanfare) {
3408 PlaySound(THEFANFARE);
3409 Procrastinate(4000); // Fanafare takes about 4 seconds
3410 }
3411 SendValue(FrontView_Hours, 0);
3412 SendValue(FrontView_Mins, 0);
3413 SendValue(FrontView_Secs, 0);
3414 // ***************************************************************************************
3415 // SetDS1307ToCompilerTime(); // ** Uncomment this line to set DS1307 clock to compiler's (Computer's) time. **
3416 // ** BUT then re-comment it!! Otherwise it will reset to same time on every boot up! **
3417 // ***************************************************************************************
3418 BoundFlag = false;
3419 StartInactvityTimeout();
3420 SizeOfCompressedData = sizeof(CompressedData);
3421 GetTXVersionNumber();
3422 MySbus.begin();
3423 SetUKFrequencies();
3424 ScreenTimeTimer = millis();
3425 RestoreBrightness();
3426 if (UseLog) {
3427 LogPowerOn();
3428 LogThisModel();
3429 }
3430 SendText(FrontView_Connected, na);
3431 UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere();
3432 WarningTimer = millis();
3433 CheckMotorOff();
3434 if (MotorEnabled){
3435 ErrorState = MOTORISON;
3436 SendNoData = true;
3437 }
3438 if(!UseMotorKill) ShowMotor(1);
3439
3440 if (ErrorState) {
3441 SendCommand(WarnNow);
3442 if (ErrorState == CHECKSUMERROR) {
3443 SendText(Warning, err_chksm);
3444 }
3445 if (ErrorState == MODELSFILENOTFOUND){
3446 SendText(Warning, err_404);
3447 }
3448 if (ErrorState == MOTORISON){
3449 SendText(Warning, err_MotorOn);
3450 // PlaySound(MOTORON);
3451 // delay(850);
3452 }
3453 }
3454}
3455/*********************************************************************************************************************************/
3456
3457void GetStatistics()
3458{
3459 if (RangeTestGoodPackets) PacketsPerSecond = RangeTestGoodPackets;
3460 RangeTestGoodPackets = 0;
3461}
3462
3463/*********************************************************************************************************************************/
3465int InStrng(char* text1, char* text2)
3466{
3467 for (uint16_t j = 0; j < strlen(text2); ++j) {
3468 bool flag = false;
3469 for (uint16_t i = 0; i < strlen(text1); ++i) {
3470 if (text1[i] != text2[i + j]) {
3471 flag = true;
3472 break;
3473 }
3474 }
3475 if (!flag) return j + 1; // Found match
3476 }
3477 return 0; // Found no match
3478}
3479
3480/*********************************************************************************************************************************/
3481void SaveCheckSum32(){ // uses 5 bytes. Last one is indicator of use.
3482
3483 DoingCheckSm = true;
3484 SDUpdate32BITS(SDCardAddress, FileCheckSum);
3485 SDCardAddress += 4;
3486 SDUpdate8BITS(SDCardAddress, 0xFF); // indicator
3487 SDCardAddress++;
3488 DoingCheckSm = false;
3489
3490#ifdef DB_CHECKSUM
3491 Serial.print("Writing: ");
3492 Serial.println(FileCheckSum);
3493#endif
3494}
3495
3496/*********************************************************************************************************************************/
3497void ReadCheckSum32()
3498{ // uses 5 bytes. Last one is indicator of use.
3499 // This function sets ErrorState to a non zero value if there'a a file error
3500
3501 bool UseCheckSm = false;
3502 DoingCheckSm = true;
3503 uint32_t ch;
3504 ch = SDRead32BITS(SDCardAddress);
3505 SDCardAddress += 4;
3506 if (SDRead8BITS(SDCardAddress) == 0xFF) UseCheckSm = true; // if this byte isn't 0xFF then checksum was never written here.
3507 ++SDCardAddress;
3508 DoingCheckSm = false;
3509 if (UseCheckSm) {
3510 if (ch != FileCheckSum) {
3511 ErrorState = CHECKSUMERROR;
3512 }
3513#ifdef DB_CHECKSUM
3514 Serial.print("Read from file: ");
3515 Serial.println(ch);
3516 if (ch == FileCheckSum) {
3517 Serial.println("FILE CHECKSUM IS GOOD :-) ! ");
3518 }else{
3519 Serial.print("FILE CHECKSUM WAS ");
3520 Serial.println(FileCheckSum);
3521 }
3522#endif
3523 }
3524}
3525
3526/*********************************************************************************************************************************/
3527
3528void SaveTransmitterParameters()
3529{
3530
3531 bool EON = false;
3532 int j = 0;
3533 int i = 0;
3534 if (!ModelsFileOpen) OpenModelsFile();
3535
3536 SDCardAddress = 0;
3537 FileCheckSum = 0;
3538
3539 SDUpdate16BITS(SDCardAddress, 12345); // marker that file exists!
3540
3541 SDCardAddress += 2;
3542 for (i = 0; i < CHANNELSUSED; ++i) {
3543 SDUpdate16BITS(SDCardAddress, ChannelMin[i]); // Stick min output of pot
3544 SDCardAddress += 2;
3545 SDUpdate16BITS(SDCardAddress, ChannelMidLow[i]); //
3546 SDCardAddress += 2;
3547 SDUpdate16BITS(SDCardAddress, ChannelCentre[i]); // Stick Centre output of pot
3548 SDCardAddress += 2;
3549 SDUpdate16BITS(SDCardAddress, ChannelMidHi[i]); //
3550 SDCardAddress += 2;
3551 SDUpdate16BITS(SDCardAddress, ChannelMax[i]); // Stick max output of pot
3552 SDCardAddress += 2;
3553 }
3554 SDUpdate8BITS(SDCardAddress, BuddyPupilOnSbus);
3555 ++SDCardAddress;
3556 SDUpdate8BITS(SDCardAddress, BuddyMaster);
3557 ++SDCardAddress;
3558 SDUpdate8BITS(SDCardAddress, ModelNumber);
3559 ++SDCardAddress;
3560 SDUpdate16BITS(SDCardAddress, ScreenTimeout);
3561 ++SDCardAddress;
3562 ++SDCardAddress;
3563 SDUpdate8BITS(SDCardAddress, (Inactivity_Timeout / TICKSPERMINUTE));
3564 ++SDCardAddress;
3565 for (j = 0; j < 30; ++j) {
3566 if (EON) TxName[j] = 0;
3567 SDUpdate8BITS(SDCardAddress, TxName[j]);
3568 if (TxName[j] == 0) EON = true;
3569 ++SDCardAddress;
3570 }
3571 SDUpdate16BITS(SDCardAddress, Qnh);
3572 ++SDCardAddress;
3573 ++SDCardAddress;
3574 SDUpdate16BITS(SDCardAddress, DeltaGMT);
3575 ++SDCardAddress;
3576 ++SDCardAddress;
3577 SDUpdate16BITS(SDCardAddress, BackGroundColour);
3578 ++SDCardAddress;
3579 ++SDCardAddress;
3580 SDUpdate16BITS(SDCardAddress, ForeGroundColour);
3581 ++SDCardAddress;
3582 ++SDCardAddress;
3583 SDUpdate16BITS(SDCardAddress, SpecialColour);
3584 ++SDCardAddress;
3585 ++SDCardAddress;
3586 SDUpdate16BITS(SDCardAddress, HighlightColour);
3587 ++SDCardAddress;
3588 ++SDCardAddress;
3589 SDUpdate8BITS(SDCardAddress, SticksMode);
3590 ++SDCardAddress;
3591 SDUpdate8BITS(SDCardAddress, AudioVolume);
3592 ++SDCardAddress;
3593 SDUpdate8BITS(SDCardAddress, Brightness);
3594 ++SDCardAddress;
3595 SDUpdate8BITS(SDCardAddress, PlayFanfare);
3596 ++SDCardAddress;
3597 SDUpdate8BITS(SDCardAddress, TrimClicks);
3598 ++SDCardAddress;
3599 SDUpdate8BITS(SDCardAddress, ButtonClicks);
3600 ++SDCardAddress;
3601 SDUpdate8BITS(SDCardAddress, SpeakingClock);
3602 ++SDCardAddress;
3603 SDUpdate8BITS(SDCardAddress, AnnounceBanks);
3604 ++SDCardAddress;
3605 for (i = 0; i < 8; ++i) {
3606 SDUpdate8BITS(SDCardAddress, SwitchNumber[i]);
3607 ++SDCardAddress;
3608 }
3609 // spare
3610 ++SDCardAddress;
3611 SDUpdate8BITS(SDCardAddress, MinimumGap);
3612 ++SDCardAddress;
3613 SDUpdate8BITS(SDCardAddress, LogRXSwaps);
3614 ++SDCardAddress;
3615 SDUpdate8BITS(SDCardAddress, UseLog);
3616 ++SDCardAddress;
3617 SDUpdate8BITS(SDCardAddress, AnnounceConnected);
3618 ++SDCardAddress;
3619 for (j = 0; j < 8; ++j) {
3620 SDUpdate8BITS(SDCardAddress, TrimNumber[j]);
3621 ++SDCardAddress;
3622 }
3623 SDUpdate16BITS(SDCardAddress, TxVoltageCorrection);
3624 ++SDCardAddress;
3625 ++SDCardAddress;
3626 SDUpdate8BITS(SDCardAddress, PowerOffWarningSeconds);
3627 ++SDCardAddress;
3628 SDUpdate16BITS(SDCardAddress, LEDBrightness);
3629 ++SDCardAddress;
3630 ++SDCardAddress;
3631 SDUpdate8BITS(SDCardAddress, ConnectionAssessSeconds);
3632 ++SDCardAddress;
3633 SDUpdate8BITS(SDCardAddress, AutoModelSelect);
3634 ++SDCardAddress;
3635 SDUpdate8BITS(SDCardAddress, TXLiPo);
3636 ++SDCardAddress;
3637 SaveCheckSum32(); // Save the Transmitter parametres checksm
3638 CloseModelsFile();
3639}
3640
3641/*********************************************************************************************************************************/
3642
3644void SaveOneModel(uint16_t mnum)
3645{
3646 uint16_t j;
3647 uint16_t i;
3648 bool EndOfName = false;
3649 FileCheckSum = 0;
3650 if ((mnum < 1) || (mnum > 99)) return; // There is no model zero!
3651 if (!ModelsFileOpen) OpenModelsFile();
3652 SDCardAddress = TXSIZE; // spare bytes for TX stuff
3653 if (SingleModelFlag) SDCardAddress = MODELOFFSET; // 250 or zero
3654 SDCardAddress += (mnum - 1) * MODELSIZE; // spare bytes for Model params
3655 StartLocation = SDCardAddress;
3656 ModelDefined = 42;
3657 SDUpdate8BITS(SDCardAddress, ModelDefined);
3658 ++SDCardAddress;
3659 for (j = 0; j < 30; ++j) {
3660 if (EndOfName) ModelName[j] = 0;
3661 SDUpdate8BITS(SDCardAddress, ModelName[j]);
3662 if (ModelName[j] == 0) EndOfName = true;
3663 ++SDCardAddress;
3664 }
3665 for (i = 0; i < CHANNELSUSED; ++i) {
3666 for (j = 1; j <= 4; ++j) {
3667 SDUpdate8BITS(SDCardAddress, MaxDegrees[j][i]); // Max requested in degrees (180)
3668 ++SDCardAddress;
3669 SDUpdate8BITS(SDCardAddress, MidHiDegrees[j][i]); // MidHi requested in degrees (135)
3670 ++SDCardAddress;
3671 SDUpdate8BITS(SDCardAddress, CentreDegrees[j][i]); // Centre requested in degrees (90)
3672 ++SDCardAddress;
3673 SDUpdate8BITS(SDCardAddress, MidLowDegrees[j][i]); // MidLo requested in degrees (45)
3674 ++SDCardAddress;
3675 SDUpdate8BITS(SDCardAddress, MinDegrees[j][i]); // Min requested in degrees (0)
3676 ++SDCardAddress;
3677 }
3678 }
3679 for (j = 0; j < MAXMIXES; ++j) {
3680 for (i = 0; i < CHANNELSUSED + 1; ++i) {
3681 SDUpdate8BITS(SDCardAddress, Mixes[j][i]); // Save mixes
3682 ++SDCardAddress;
3683 }
3684 }
3685 for (j = 0; j < BANKSUSED + 1; ++j) {
3686 for (i = 0; i < CHANNELSUSED + 1; ++i) {
3687 SDUpdate8BITS(SDCardAddress, Trims[j][i]);
3688 ++SDCardAddress;
3689 }
3690 }
3691 for (j = 0; j < BANKSUSED + 1; ++j) {
3692 for (i = 0; i < CHANNELSUSED + 1; ++i) {
3693 SDUpdate8BITS(SDCardAddress, TrimsReversed[j][i]);
3694 ++SDCardAddress;
3695 }
3696 }
3697 SDUpdate8BITS(SDCardAddress, RXCellCount);
3698 ++SDCardAddress;
3699 SDUpdate16BITS(SDCardAddress, TrimFactor);
3700 ++SDCardAddress;
3701 ++SDCardAddress;
3702 SDUpdate8BITS(SDCardAddress, LowBattery);
3703 ++SDCardAddress;
3704 SDUpdate8BITS(SDCardAddress, CopyTrimsToAll);
3705 ++SDCardAddress;
3706 for (i = 0; i < CHANNELSUSED; ++i) {
3707 SDUpdate8BITS(SDCardAddress, SubTrims[i]);
3708 ++SDCardAddress;
3709 }
3710 SDUpdate16BITS(SDCardAddress, ReversedChannelBITS);
3711 ++SDCardAddress;
3712 ++SDCardAddress;
3713 for (i = 0; i < 4; ++i) {
3714 SDUpdate8BITS(SDCardAddress, InputTrim[i]);
3715 ++SDCardAddress;
3716 }
3717 SDUpdate16BITS(SDCardAddress, RxVoltageCorrection);
3718 ++SDCardAddress;
3719 ++SDCardAddress;
3720
3721 SDUpdate16BITS(SDCardAddress, BuddyControlled);
3722 ++SDCardAddress;
3723 ++SDCardAddress;
3724
3725 SDCardAddress += 1; // *********************** 1 spare here remaining **********************
3726
3727 for (i = 0; i < CHANNELSUSED; ++i) {
3728 SDUpdate8BITS(SDCardAddress, InPutStick[i]);
3729 ++SDCardAddress;
3730 }
3731 SDUpdate8BITS(SDCardAddress, FMSwitch);
3732 ++SDCardAddress;
3733 SDUpdate8BITS(SDCardAddress, AutoSwitch);
3734 ++SDCardAddress;
3735 SDUpdate8BITS(SDCardAddress, Channel9Switch);
3736 ++SDCardAddress;
3737 SDUpdate8BITS(SDCardAddress, Channel10Switch);
3738 ++SDCardAddress;
3739 SDUpdate8BITS(SDCardAddress, Channel11Switch);
3740 ++SDCardAddress;
3741 SDUpdate8BITS(SDCardAddress, Channel12Switch);
3742 ++SDCardAddress;
3743 SDUpdate8BITS(SDCardAddress, SWITCH1Reversed);
3744 ++SDCardAddress;
3745 SDUpdate8BITS(SDCardAddress, SWITCH2Reversed);
3746 ++SDCardAddress;
3747 SDUpdate8BITS(SDCardAddress, SWITCH3Reversed);
3748 ++SDCardAddress;
3749 SDUpdate8BITS(SDCardAddress, SWITCH4Reversed);
3750 ++SDCardAddress;
3751 for (i = 0; i < CHANNELSUSED; ++i) {
3752 SDUpdate8BITS(SDCardAddress, FailSafeChannel[i]);
3753 ++SDCardAddress;
3754 }
3755 for (i = 0; i < CHANNELSUSED; ++i) {
3756 for (j = 0; j < 10; ++j) {
3757 SDUpdate8BITS(SDCardAddress, ChannelNames[i][j]);
3758 ++SDCardAddress;
3759 }
3760 }
3761 for (j = 0; j < BANKSUSED + 1; ++j) {
3762 for (i = 0; i < CHANNELSUSED + 1; ++i) {
3763 SDUpdate8BITS(SDCardAddress, Exponential[j][i]);
3764 ++SDCardAddress;
3765 }
3766 }
3767
3768 for (j = 0; j < BANKSUSED + 1; ++j) {
3769 for (i = 0; i < CHANNELSUSED + 1; ++i) {
3770 SDUpdate8BITS(SDCardAddress, InterpolationTypes[j][i]);
3771 ++SDCardAddress;
3772 }
3773 }
3774
3775 for (j = 0; j < BYTESPERMACRO; ++j) {
3776 for (i = 0; i < MAXMACROS; ++i) {
3777 SDUpdate8BITS(SDCardAddress, MacrosBuffer[i][j]);
3778 ++SDCardAddress;
3779 }
3780 }
3781 for (i = 0; i < 8; ++i) {
3782 SDUpdate8BITS(SDCardAddress,ModelsMacUnionSaved.Val8[i]);
3783 ++SDCardAddress;
3784 }
3785
3786 SDUpdate8BITS(SDCardAddress,UseMotorKill);
3787 ++SDCardAddress;
3788 Look(UseMotorKill);
3789 SDUpdate8BITS(SDCardAddress, MotorChannelZero);
3790 ++SDCardAddress;
3791 SDUpdate8BITS(SDCardAddress,MotorChannel);
3792 if (MotorChannel > 15) MotorChannel = 15;
3793 ++SDCardAddress;
3794 SDUpdate8BITS(SDCardAddress,SafetySwitch);
3795 ++SDCardAddress;
3796 SDUpdate16BITS(SDCardAddress,SFV);
3797 ++SDCardAddress;
3798 ++SDCardAddress;
3799 SDUpdate8BITS(SDCardAddress, Drate2);
3800 ++SDCardAddress;
3801 SDUpdate8BITS(SDCardAddress, Drate3);
3802 ++SDCardAddress;
3803 SDUpdate8BITS(SDCardAddress, Drate1);
3804 ++SDCardAddress;
3805
3806 for (int i = 0; i < 8;++i){
3807 SDUpdate8BITS(SDCardAddress, DualRateChannels[i]);
3808 ++SDCardAddress;
3809 }
3810 SDUpdate8BITS(SDCardAddress, BuddySwitch);
3811 ++SDCardAddress;
3812 SDUpdate8BITS(SDCardAddress, DualRatesSwitch);
3813 ++SDCardAddress;
3814
3815
3816
3817
3818 SaveCheckSum32(); // Save the Model parametres checksm
3819
3820 // ********************** Add more
3821
3822 OneModelMemory = SDCardAddress - StartLocation;
3823#ifdef DB_SD
3824 Serial.print("Saved model: ");
3825 Serial.println(ModelName);
3826 Serial.println(" ");
3827 Serial.print(OneModelMemory);
3828 Serial.println(" bytes used per model.");
3829 Serial.print(MODELSIZE - OneModelMemory);
3830 Serial.println(" spare bytes per model.");
3831 Serial.print(MODELSIZE);
3832 Serial.println(" bytes reserved per model.)");
3833 Serial.print("Write Model ");
3834 Serial.print(ModelNumber);
3835 Serial.print(" Checksum: ");
3836 Serial.println(FileCheckSum);
3837 Serial.println(" ");
3838#endif // defined DB_SD
3839
3840
3841#ifdef DB_CHECKSUM
3842 Serial.print("Write Model: ");
3843 Serial.print(ModelName);
3844 Serial.print(" Checksum: ");
3845 Serial.println(FileCheckSum);
3846 Serial.println(" ");
3847#endif
3848
3849
3850 CloseModelsFile();
3851}
3852
3853/*********************************************************************************************************************************/
3854
3856void SortDirectory()
3857{
3858 int f = 0;
3859 bool flag = true;
3860 int Scount = 0;
3861 char TempArray[18];
3862 while (flag && Scount < 10000) {
3863 flag = false;
3864 for (f = 0; f < ExportedFileCounter - 1; ++f) {
3865 if (strcmp(TheFilesList[f], TheFilesList[f + 1]) > 0) {
3866 strcpy(TempArray, TheFilesList[f]);
3867 strcpy(TheFilesList[f], TheFilesList[f + 1]);
3868 strcpy(TheFilesList[f + 1], TempArray);
3869 flag = true;
3870 ++Scount;
3871 }
3872 }
3873 }
3874}
3875/*********************************************************************************************************************************/
3876void BuildDirectory()
3877{
3878 char MOD[] = ".MOD";
3879 char Entry1[20];
3880 char fn[18];
3881 int i = 0;
3882 File dir = SD.open("/");
3883 ExportedFileCounter = 0;
3884 while (true) {
3885 File entry = dir.openNextFile();
3886 if (!entry || ExportedFileCounter > MAXBACKUPFILES) break;
3887 strcpy(Entry1, entry.name());
3888 if (InStrng(MOD, Entry1) > 0) {
3889 strcpy(fn, entry.name());
3890 for (i = 0; i < 12; ++i)
3891 {
3892 TheFilesList[ExportedFileCounter][i] = fn[i];
3893 }
3894 ExportedFileCounter++;
3895 }
3896 entry.close();
3897 }
3898 SortDirectory();
3899}
3900/*********************************************************************************************************************************/
3901uint16_t WordWrap(char* htext)
3902{
3903 char crlf[] = {13, 10, 0};
3904 char temp1[MAXFILELEN] = "";
3905 char a[] = " ";
3906 uint16_t len = 0;
3907 uint16_t i, j;
3908
3909 for (i = strlen(htext) - 1; i > 1; --i) {
3910 if ((htext[i] == ' ') || (htext[i] == '-')) break; // 'i' now has last space pointer
3911 }
3912 for (j = 0; j < i; ++j) { // get text to i ...
3913 a[0] = htext[j];
3914 strcat(temp1, a);
3915 }
3916 strcat(temp1, crlf); // add crlf ...
3917 for (j = i + 1; j < strlen(htext); ++j) { // then last word on next line by-passing the space
3918 a[0] = htext[j];
3919 strcat(temp1, a);
3920 ++len; // length onto next line
3921 }
3922 strcpy(htext, temp1);
3923 return len;
3924}
3925/*********************************************************************************************************************************/
3926// This function now scrolls by loading only part of the text file
3927// This allows very long files to be handled ok.
3928
3929void ReadTextFile(char* fname, char* htext, uint8_t StartLineNumber, uint8_t MaxLines)
3930{
3931#define MAXWIDTH 68
3932 char errormsg[] = "File not found! -> ";
3933 uint16_t LineCounter = 0;
3934 uint16_t StopLineNumber = 0;
3935 uint16_t i = 0;
3936 uint8_t Column = 0;
3937 File fnumber;
3938
3939 char crlf[] = {13, 10, 0};
3940 char a[] = " ";
3941 char dots[] = "(There's more below ...) ";
3942 char dots1[] = "(There's more above ...) ";
3943 char slash[] = "/";
3944 char OpenBracket[] = "( ";
3945 char CloseBracket[] = " )";
3946 char SearchFile[30];
3947
3948 StopLineNumber = StartLineNumber + MaxLines;
3949 strcpy(SearchFile, slash);
3950 strcat(SearchFile, fname);
3951 strcpy(htext, OpenBracket);
3952 strcat(htext, SearchFile);
3953 strcat(htext, CloseBracket);
3954 strcat(htext, crlf);
3955 strcat(htext, crlf);
3956 if (StartLineNumber > 1) {
3957 strcat(htext, crlf);
3958 strcat(htext, dots1);
3959 strcat(htext, crlf);
3960 }
3961
3962 ThereIsMoreToSee = false;
3963 fnumber = SD.open(SearchFile, FILE_READ);
3964 if (fnumber) {
3965 while (fnumber.available() && i < (MAXFILELEN - 10)) {
3966 a[0] = fnumber.read(); // Read in one byte at a time.
3967 if (a[0] == '|') { // New Line character = '|'
3968 if ((LineCounter >= StartLineNumber) && (LineCounter <= StopLineNumber)) {
3969 strcat(htext, crlf);
3970 ++i;
3971 ++i;
3972 }
3973 Column = 0;
3974 ++LineCounter;
3975 a[0] = 34; // a '34' ( " ) is ignored.
3976 }
3977 if (Column >= MAXWIDTH) {
3978 Column = WordWrap(htext);
3979 ++LineCounter;
3980 }
3981 if ((a[0] == 13) || (a[0] == 10)) a[0] = 34; // Ignore CrLfs
3982 if (a[0] != 34) {
3983 if ((LineCounter >= StartLineNumber) && (LineCounter <= StopLineNumber)) {
3984 strcat(htext, a);
3985 ++Column;
3986 ++i;
3987 }
3988 }
3989 if (LineCounter > StopLineNumber) {
3990 strcat(htext, crlf);
3991 strcat(htext, dots);
3992 ThereIsMoreToSee = true;
3993 break;
3994 }
3995 }
3996 }
3997 else
3998 {
3999 strcpy(htext, errormsg);
4000 strcat(htext, fname);
4001 }
4002 fnumber.close();
4003}
4004
4005/*********************************************************************************************************************************/
4006void ScrollHelpFile()
4007{ // redisplays help file to scroll it ... maybe from top of file
4008 char HelpText[MAXFILELEN + 10]; // MAX = 3K or so
4009 char HelpView[] = "HelpText";
4010 ReadTextFile(RecentTextFile, HelpText, RecentStartLine, MAXLINES); // Then load help text
4011 SendText1(HelpView, HelpText); // Then send it
4012}
4013/*********************************************************************************************************************************/
4014void SendHelp()
4015{ // load new help file
4016 char hcmd[] = "page HelpView";
4017 char HelpFile[20];
4018 int i = 9;
4019 int j = 0;
4020 SendCommand(hcmd); // first load the right screen
4021 while (TextIn[i] != 0 && j < 19) {
4022 HelpFile[j] = TextIn[i];
4023 ++i;
4024 ++j;
4025 HelpFile[j] = 0;
4026 }
4027 strcpy(RecentTextFile, HelpFile);
4028 RecentStartLine = 0;
4029 ScrollHelpFile();
4030}
4031/*********************************************************************************************************************************/
4033int GetChannel()
4034{
4035 unsigned int i;
4036 for (i = 0; i < sizeof(TextIn); ++i) {
4037 if (isdigit(TextIn[i])) break;
4038 }
4039 return atoi(&TextIn[i]);
4040}
4041/*********************************************************************************************************************************/
4042
4043void UpdateSwitchesDisplay()
4044{
4045 char SwitchesView_sw1[] = "sw1";
4046 char SwitchesView_sw2[] = "sw2";
4047 char SwitchesView_sw3[] = "sw3";
4048 char SwitchesView_sw4[] = "sw4";
4049 char NotUsed[] = "Not used";
4050 char Banks123[] = "Banks 1-2-3";
4051 char Auto[] = "Bank 4 (etc)";
4052 char Channel_9[] = "Channel 9" ;
4053 char Channel_10[] = "Channel 10";
4054 char Channel_11[] = "Channel 11";
4055 char Channel_12[] = "Channel 12";
4056 char Safety_Switch[] = "Safety ";
4057 char Buddy_Switch[] = "Buddy ";
4058 char DualRates_Switch[] = "Rates ";
4059
4060 SendText(SwitchesView_sw1, NotUsed);
4061 if (AutoSwitch == 1) SendText(SwitchesView_sw1, Auto);
4062 if (FMSwitch == 1) SendText(SwitchesView_sw1, Banks123);
4063 if (Channel9Switch == 1) SendText(SwitchesView_sw1, Channel_9);
4064 if (Channel10Switch == 1) SendText(SwitchesView_sw1, Channel_10);
4065 if (Channel11Switch == 1) SendText(SwitchesView_sw1, Channel_11);
4066 if (Channel12Switch == 1) SendText(SwitchesView_sw1, Channel_12);
4067 if (SafetySwitch == 1) SendText(SwitchesView_sw1, Safety_Switch);
4068 if (DualRatesSwitch == 1) SendText(SwitchesView_sw1, DualRates_Switch);
4069 if (BuddySwitch == 1) SendText(SwitchesView_sw1, Buddy_Switch);
4070
4071 SendText(SwitchesView_sw2, NotUsed);
4072 if (AutoSwitch == 2) SendText(SwitchesView_sw2, Auto);
4073 if (FMSwitch == 2) SendText(SwitchesView_sw2, Banks123);
4074 if (Channel9Switch == 2) SendText(SwitchesView_sw2, Channel_9);
4075 if (Channel10Switch == 2) SendText(SwitchesView_sw2, Channel_10);
4076 if (Channel11Switch == 2) SendText(SwitchesView_sw2, Channel_11);
4077 if (Channel12Switch == 2) SendText(SwitchesView_sw2, Channel_12);
4078 if (SafetySwitch == 2) SendText(SwitchesView_sw2, Safety_Switch);
4079 if (DualRatesSwitch == 2) SendText(SwitchesView_sw2, DualRates_Switch);
4080 if (BuddySwitch == 2) SendText(SwitchesView_sw2, Buddy_Switch);
4081
4082 SendText(SwitchesView_sw3, NotUsed);
4083 if (AutoSwitch == 3) SendText(SwitchesView_sw3, Auto);
4084 if (FMSwitch == 3) SendText(SwitchesView_sw3, Banks123);
4085 if (Channel9Switch == 3) SendText(SwitchesView_sw3, Channel_9);
4086 if (Channel10Switch == 3) SendText(SwitchesView_sw3, Channel_10);
4087 if (Channel11Switch == 3) SendText(SwitchesView_sw3, Channel_11);
4088 if (Channel12Switch == 3) SendText(SwitchesView_sw3, Channel_12);
4089 if (SafetySwitch == 3) SendText(SwitchesView_sw3, Safety_Switch);
4090 if (DualRatesSwitch == 3) SendText(SwitchesView_sw3, DualRates_Switch);
4091 if (BuddySwitch == 3) SendText(SwitchesView_sw3, Buddy_Switch);
4092
4093 SendText(SwitchesView_sw4, NotUsed);
4094 if (AutoSwitch == 4) SendText(SwitchesView_sw4, Auto);
4095 if (FMSwitch == 4) SendText(SwitchesView_sw4, Banks123);
4096 if (Channel9Switch == 4) SendText(SwitchesView_sw4, Channel_9);
4097 if (Channel10Switch == 4) SendText(SwitchesView_sw4, Channel_10);
4098 if (Channel11Switch == 4) SendText(SwitchesView_sw4, Channel_11);
4099 if (Channel12Switch == 4) SendText(SwitchesView_sw4, Channel_12);
4100 if (SafetySwitch == 4) SendText(SwitchesView_sw4, Safety_Switch);
4101 if (DualRatesSwitch == 4) SendText(SwitchesView_sw4, DualRates_Switch);
4102 if (BuddySwitch == 4) SendText(SwitchesView_sw4, Buddy_Switch);
4103
4104}
4105
4106/*********************************************************************************************************************************/
4107int CheckRange(int v, int min, int max)
4108{
4109 if (v > max) v = max;
4110 if (v < min) v = min;
4111 return v;
4112}
4113/*********************************************************************************************************************************/
4114
4115void DoNewChannelName(int ch, int k)
4116{
4117 int j = 0;
4118 ChannelNames[ch - 1][0] = 32;
4119 ChannelNames[ch - 1][1] = 0; // remove old name
4120 while (uint8_t(TextIn[k]) > 0) {
4121 ChannelNames[ch - 1][j] = TextIn[k];
4122 ++j;
4123 ++k;
4124 ChannelNames[ch - 1][j] = 0;
4125 }
4126 SaveOneModel(ModelNumber);
4127}
4128
4129/*********************************************************************************************************************************/
4130
4132void ShowFileNumber()
4133{
4134 char ModelsView_filename[] = "filename";
4135 char newfname[17];
4136 if (FileNumberInView >= ExportedFileCounter) FileNumberInView = 0;
4137 if (FileNumberInView < 0) FileNumberInView = ExportedFileCounter - 1;
4138 for (int i = 0; i < 12; ++i) {
4139 newfname[i] = TheFilesList[FileNumberInView][i];
4140 newfname[i + 1] = 0;
4141 if (newfname[i] <= 32 || newfname[i] > 127) break;
4142 }
4143 SendText(ModelsView_filename, newfname);
4144}
4145
4146/*********************************************************************************************************************************/
4147
4148void ShowFileErrorMsg()
4149{
4150 char ErrorOn[] = "vis error,1";
4151 char ErrorOff[] = "vis error,0";
4152 for (int pp = 0; pp < 3; ++pp) {
4153 SendCommand(ErrorOn);
4154 Procrastinate(200);
4155 SendCommand(ErrorOff);
4156 Procrastinate(100);
4157 }
4158 FileError = false;
4159}
4160
4161/*********************************************************************************************************************************/
4162
4163void SaveAllParameters()
4164{
4165 if (!ModelsFileOpen) OpenModelsFile();
4166 SaveTransmitterParameters();
4167 MemoryForTransmtter = SDCardAddress - 2;
4168 SaveOneModel(ModelNumber);
4169#ifdef DB_SD
4170 Serial.println(" ");
4171 Serial.print(MemoryForTransmtter);
4172 Serial.println(" bytes written to SD CARD FOR TX.");
4173 Serial.print(TXSIZE);
4174 Serial.println(" bytes reserved for TX.");
4175 Serial.print(TXSIZE - MemoryForTransmtter);
4176 Serial.println(" Spare bytes still for any new TX params.");
4177 Serial.print("Saved model: ");
4178 Serial.print(ModelNumber);
4179 Serial.print(" (");
4180 Serial.print(ModelName);
4181 Serial.println(")");
4182#endif // defined DB_SD
4183}
4184
4185/*********************************************************************************************************************************/
4186
4187void ShowDirectory()
4188{
4189 char filelistbuf[1024];
4190 char nul[] = "";
4191 char crlf[] = {13, 10, 0};
4192 char space[] = {' ', 0};
4193 char fileviewlist[] = "FilesView.list";
4194 char t[2] = "P";
4195 uint8_t n = 0;
4196 uint8_t nlp = 0;
4197 strcpy(filelistbuf, nul);
4198 for (int i = 0; i < ExportedFileCounter; ++i) {
4199 nlp = 13;
4200 for (int z = 0; z < 12; ++z) {
4201 t[0] = TheFilesList[i][z];
4202 if (t[0] == 0) break;
4203 nlp--;
4204 strcat(filelistbuf, t);
4205 }
4206 n++;
4207 if (n > 2) {
4208 strcat(filelistbuf, crlf);
4209 n = 0;
4210 }
4211 else
4212 {
4213 for (int q = 0; q < nlp; ++q) {
4214 strcat(filelistbuf, space);
4215 }
4216 }
4217 }
4218 SendText1(fileviewlist, filelistbuf);
4219}
4220
4221/*********************************************************************************************************************************/
4222
4223void SetDefaultValues()
4224{
4225 uint16_t j;
4226 uint16_t i;
4227 char ProgressStart[] = "vis Progress,1";
4228 char ProgressEnd[] = "vis Progress,0";
4229 char Progress[] = "Progress";
4230
4231 char DefaultChannelNames[CHANNELSUSED][11] = {{"Aileron"}, {"Elevator"}, {"Throttle"}, {"Rudder"}, {"Ch 5"}, {"Ch 6"}, {"Ch 7"}, {"Ch 8"}, {"Ch 9"}, {"Ch 10"}, {"Ch 11"}, {"Ch 12"}, {"Ch 13"}, {"Ch 14"}, {"Ch 15"}, {"Ch 16"}};
4232 SendCommand(ProgressStart);
4233 SendValue(Progress, 5);
4234 Procrastinate(10);
4235
4236 for (i = 0; i < CHANNELSUSED; ++i) {
4237 for (j = 1; j <= 4; ++j) {
4238 if (i == 1) {
4239 MaxDegrees[j][i] = 30; // Elevator goes the other way by default
4240 MidHiDegrees[j][i] = 60;
4241 CentreDegrees[j][i] = 90;
4242 MidLowDegrees[j][i] = 120;
4243 MinDegrees[j][i] = 150;
4244 }
4245 else {
4246 MaxDegrees[j][i] = 150;
4247 MidHiDegrees[j][i] = 120;
4248 CentreDegrees[j][i] = 90;
4249 MidLowDegrees[j][i] = 60;
4250 MinDegrees[j][i] = 30;
4251 }
4252 }
4253 }
4254 SendValue(Progress, 15);
4255 Procrastinate(10);
4256 for (j = 0; j < MAXMIXES; ++j) {
4257 for (i = 0; i < CHANNELSUSED; ++i) {
4258 Mixes[j][i] = 0;
4259 }
4260 }
4261 SendValue(Progress, 25);
4262 Procrastinate(10);
4263
4264 for (j = 0; j < BANKSUSED + 1; ++j) { // must have fudged this somewhere.... 5?!
4265 for (i = 0; i < CHANNELSUSED; ++i) {
4266 Trims[j][i] = 80; // MIDPOINT is 80 !
4267 TrimsReversed[j][i] = 0;
4268 }
4269 }
4270 RXCellCount = 3;
4271
4272 SendValue(Progress, 45);
4273 Procrastinate(10);
4274 for (i = 0; i < CHANNELSUSED; ++i) {
4275 InPutStick[i] = i;
4276 }
4277 FMSwitch = 4;
4278 AutoSwitch = 1;
4279 Channel9Switch = 2;
4280 Channel10Switch = 3;
4281 Channel11Switch = 0;
4282 Channel12Switch = 0;
4283 SWITCH1Reversed = false;
4284 SWITCH2Reversed = false;
4285 SWITCH3Reversed = false;
4286 SWITCH4Reversed = false;
4287 SendValue(Progress, 65);
4288 Procrastinate(10);
4289 for (i = 0; i < CHANNELSUSED; ++i) {
4290 FailSafeChannel[i] = false;
4291 }
4292 SendValue(Progress, 75);
4293 Procrastinate(10);
4294 for (i = 0; i < CHANNELSUSED; ++i) {
4295 for (j = 0; j < 10; ++j) {
4296 ChannelNames[i][j] = DefaultChannelNames[i][j];
4297 }
4298 }
4299 for (j = 0; j < BANKSUSED + 1; ++j) {
4300 for (i = 0; i < CHANNELSUSED + 1; ++i) {
4301 Exponential[j][i] = DEFAULT_EXPO; // 0% (50) expo = default
4302 }
4303 }
4304 for (j = 0; j < BANKSUSED + 1; ++j) {
4305 for (i = 0; i < CHANNELSUSED + 1; ++i) {
4306 InterpolationTypes[j][i] = EXPONENTIALCURVES; // Expo is default
4307 }
4308 }
4309 for (i = 0; i < CHANNELSUSED + 1; ++i) {
4310 SubTrims[i] = 127; // centre (0 - 254)
4311 }
4312 for (j = 0; j < BYTESPERMACRO; ++j) {
4313 for (i = 0; i < MAXMACROS; ++i) {
4314 MacrosBuffer[i][j] = 0;
4315 }
4316 }
4317 for (int i = 0; i < 4; ++i) {
4318 InputTrim[i] = i;
4319 }
4320 UseMotorKill = false;
4321 MotorChannelZero = 0;
4322 MotorChannel = 2;
4323
4324 ReversedChannelBITS = 0; // No channel reversed
4325 SendValue(Progress, 95);
4326 Procrastinate(10);
4327 LEDBrightness = DEFAULTLEDBRIGHTNESS;
4328 RxVoltageCorrection = 0;
4329 ModelsMacUnionSaved.Val32[0] = 0;
4330 ModelsMacUnionSaved.Val32[1] = 0;
4331 UseDualRates = false;
4332 Drate1 = 100;
4333 Drate2 = 75;
4334 Drate3 = 50;
4335
4336 DualRateChannels[0] = 1;
4337 DualRateChannels[1] = 2;
4338 DualRateChannels[2] = 4;
4339 DualRateChannels[3] = 0;
4340 DualRateChannels[4] = 0;
4341 DualRateChannels[5] = 0;
4342 DualRateChannels[6] = 0;
4343 DualRateChannels[7] = 0;
4344 SaveOneModel(ModelNumber);
4345 CloseModelsFile();
4346 SendValue(Progress, 100);
4347 SDCardAddress = TXSIZE; // spare bytes for TX stuff
4348 SDCardAddress += (ModelNumber - 1) * MODELSIZE; // spare bytes for Model params
4349 StartLocation = SDCardAddress;
4350 ModelDefined = 0;
4351 OpenModelsFile();
4352 SDUpdate8BITS(SDCardAddress, ModelDefined); // mark this model as undefined
4353 CloseModelsFile();
4354 ReadOneModel(ModelNumber);
4355 UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere();
4356 Procrastinate(100);
4357 SendCommand(ProgressEnd);
4358}
4359
4360/*********************************************************************************************************************************/
4361
4362void CheckDualRatesValues(){
4363
4364 bool KO = false;
4365 if (Drate1 > MAXDUALRATE) KO = true;
4366 if (Drate2 > MAXDUALRATE) KO = true;
4367 if (Drate3 > MAXDUALRATE) KO = true;
4368
4369
4370 for (int i = 0; i < 8;++i){
4371 if (DualRateChannels[i] > 16) KO = true;
4372 }
4373 if (KO) {
4374 // UseDualRates = false;
4375 Drate1 = 100;
4376 Drate2 = 75; // 1 is always 100%
4377 Drate3 = 50;
4378
4379 DualRateChannels[0] = 1;
4380 DualRateChannels[1] = 2;
4381 DualRateChannels[2] = 4;
4382 DualRateChannels[3] = 0;
4383 DualRateChannels[4] = 0;
4384 DualRateChannels[5] = 0;
4385 DualRateChannels[6] = 0;
4386 DualRateChannels[7] = 0;
4387 }
4388}
4389
4390/*********************************************************************************************************************************/
4391
4392
4393void ClearBox()
4394{
4395 char nb[10];
4396 char cmd[50];
4397 //char fillcmd[] = "fill 30,30,380,365,";
4398 char fillcmd[] = "fill 20,20,388,375,";
4399 strcpy(cmd, fillcmd);
4400 Str(nb, BackGroundColour, 0);
4401 strcat(cmd, nb);
4402 SendCommand(cmd);
4403
4404}
4405
4406/*********************************************************************************************************************************/
4407
4415void DrawLine(int x1, int y1, int x2, int y2, int c)
4416{
4417 char line[] = "line ";
4418 char nb[12];
4419 char cb[50];
4420 char comma[] = ",";
4421 strcpy(cb, line);
4422 strcat(cb, Str(nb, x1, 0));
4423 strcat(cb, comma);
4424 strcat(cb, Str(nb, y1, 0));
4425 strcat(cb, comma);
4426 strcat(cb, Str(nb, x2, 0));
4427 strcat(cb, comma);
4428 strcat(cb, Str(nb, y2, 0));
4429 strcat(cb, comma);
4430 strcat(cb, Str(nb, c, 0));
4431 SendCommand(cb);
4432}
4433
4434/*********************************************************************************************************************************/
4442void FillBox(int x1, int y1, int w, int h, int c)
4443{
4444 char line[] = "fill ";
4445 char nb[12];
4446 char cb[50];
4447 char comma[] = ",";
4448 strcpy(cb, line);
4449 strcat(cb, Str(nb, x1, 0));
4450 strcat(cb, comma);
4451 strcat(cb, Str(nb, y1, 0));
4452 strcat(cb, comma);
4453 strcat(cb, Str(nb, w, 0));
4454 strcat(cb, comma);
4455 strcat(cb, Str(nb, h, 0));
4456 strcat(cb, comma);
4457 strcat(cb, Str(nb, c, 0));
4458 SendCommand(cb);
4459}
4460/*********************************************************************************************************************************/
4461
4469FASTRUN void DrawBox(int x1, int y1, int x2, int y2, int c)
4470{
4471 char line[] = "draw ";
4472 char nb[12];
4473 char cb[50];
4474 char comma[] = ",";
4475 strcpy(cb, line);
4476 strcat(cb, Str(nb, x1, 0));
4477 strcat(cb, comma);
4478 strcat(cb, Str(nb, y1, 0));
4479 strcat(cb, comma);
4480 strcat(cb, Str(nb, x2, 0));
4481 strcat(cb, comma);
4482 strcat(cb, Str(nb, y2, 0));
4483 strcat(cb, comma);
4484 strcat(cb, Str(nb, c, 0));
4485 SendCommand(cb);
4486}
4487
4488/*********************************************************************************************************************************/
4489
4490int DegsToPercent(int degs)
4491{
4492 return map(degs, 0, 180, -100, 100);
4493}
4494
4495/*********************************************************************************************************************************/
4496
4497#define BOXLEFT 35
4498#define BOXTOP 35 // NOT YET FULLY INTEGRATED
4499#define BOXSIZE 395
4500
4501/*********************************************************************************************************************************/
4502
4504FASTRUN void GetDotPositions()
4505{
4506 int p = 0;
4507 BoxLeft = BOXLEFT;
4508 BoxTop = BOXTOP;
4509 BoxRight = BOXLEFT + BOXSIZE;
4510 BoxBottom = BOXTOP + BOXSIZE;
4511 xPoints[0] = BoxLeft;
4512 xPoints[4] = BoxRight - BOXLEFT;
4513 p = map(MinDegrees[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1], 0, 180, BOXSIZE, BOXLEFT);
4514 yPoints[0] = constrain(p, 39, 391);
4515 p = map(MidLowDegrees[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1], 0, 180, BOXSIZE, BOXLEFT);
4516 yPoints[1] = constrain(p, 39, 391);
4517 xPoints[1] = BOXLEFT + 90;
4518 xPoints[2] = BOXLEFT + 180;
4519 p = map(CentreDegrees[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1], 0, 180, BOXSIZE, BOXLEFT);
4520 yPoints[2] = constrain(p, 39, 391);
4521 xPoints[3] = BOXLEFT + 270;
4522 p = map(MidHiDegrees[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1], 0, 180, BOXSIZE, BOXLEFT);
4523 yPoints[3] = constrain(p, 39, 391);
4524 p = map(MaxDegrees[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1], 0, 180, BOXSIZE, BOXLEFT);
4525 yPoints[4] = constrain(p, 39, 391);
4526}
4527
4528/*********************************************************************************************************************************/
4529
4530FASTRUN void DrawDot(int xx, int yy, int rad, int colr)
4531{
4532 char cirs[] = "cirs ";
4533 char nb[12];
4534 char cb[50];
4535 char comma[] = ",";
4536 strcpy(cb, cirs);
4537 strcat(cb, Str(nb, xx, 0));
4538 strcat(cb, comma);
4539 strcat(cb, Str(nb, yy, 0));
4540 strcat(cb, comma);
4541 strcat(cb, Str(nb, rad, 0));
4542 strcat(cb, comma);
4543 strcat(cb, Str(nb, colr, 0));
4544 SendCommand(cb);
4545}
4546
4547/*********************************************************************************************************************************/
4548
4549FASTRUN void updateInterpolationTypes()
4550{
4551 char ExpR[] = "Exp";
4552 char Smooth[] = "Smooth";
4553 char Lines[] = "Lines";
4554 char Expon[] = "Expo"; // number display
4555 char Ex1[] = "Ex1"; // slider
4556 char t3on[] = "vis t3,1"; // expo value lable
4557 char b13on[] = "vis b13,1"; // expo -
4558 char b12on[] = "vis b12,1"; // expo +
4559 char ExponOn[] = "vis Expo,1"; // number display
4560 char Ex1On[] = "vis Ex1,1"; // slider
4561 char t3off[] = "vis t3,0"; // expo value lable
4562 char b13off[] = "vis b13,0"; // expo -
4563 char b12off[] = "vis b12,0"; // expo +
4564 char ExponOff[] = "vis Expo,0"; // number display
4565 char Ex1Off[] = "vis Ex1,0"; // slider
4566
4567 switch (InterpolationTypes[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1]) {
4568 case STRAIGHTLINES:
4569 SendValue(Lines, 1);
4570 SendValue(Smooth, 0);
4571 SendValue(ExpR, 0);
4572 SendCommand(t3off);
4573 SendCommand(b13off);
4574 SendCommand(b12off);
4575 SendCommand(ExponOff);
4576 SendCommand(Ex1Off);
4577 break;
4578 case SMOOTHEDCURVES:
4579 SendValue(Lines, 0);
4580 SendValue(Smooth, 1);
4581 SendValue(ExpR, 0);
4582 SendCommand(t3off);
4583 SendCommand(b13off);
4584 SendCommand(b12off);
4585 SendCommand(ExponOff);
4586 SendCommand(Ex1Off);
4587 break;
4588 case EXPONENTIALCURVES:
4589 SendValue(Lines, 0);
4590 SendValue(Smooth, 0);
4591 SendValue(ExpR, 1);
4592 SendCommand(t3on);
4593 SendCommand(b13on);
4594 SendCommand(b12on);
4595 SendCommand(ExponOn);
4596 SendCommand(Ex1On);
4597 SendValue(Ex1, (Exponential[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1])); // The slider
4598 SendValue(Expon, (Exponential[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1]) - 50); // the number
4599 break;
4600 default:
4601 break;
4602 }
4603}
4604
4605/*********************************************************************************************************************************/
4606
4607FASTRUN void DisplayCurve()
4608{
4609 int p = 0;
4610 char Gn1[] = "n1";
4611 char Gn2[] = "n2";
4612 char Gn3[] = "n3";
4613 char Gn4[] = "n4";
4614 char Gn5[] = "n5";
4615 char b3on[] = "vis b3,1";
4616 char b4on[] = "vis b4,1";
4617 char b7on[] = "vis b7,1";
4618 char b8on[] = "vis b8,1";
4619 char n2on[] = "vis n2,1";
4620 char n4on[] = "vis n4,1";
4621 char b3off[] = "vis b3,0";
4622 char b4off[] = "vis b4,0";
4623 char b7off[] = "vis b7,0";
4624 char b8off[] = "vis b8,0";
4625 char n2off[] = "vis n2,0";
4626 char n4off[] = "vis n4,0";
4627
4628 int Step = 8;
4629 float HalfXRange;
4630 float TopHalfYRange;
4631 float BottomHalfYRange;
4632 int xDot1;
4633 int yDot1;
4634 int xDot2 = 0;
4635 int yDot2 = 0;
4636 int DotSize = 4;
4637 int DotColour = ForeGroundColour;
4638 ClearBox();
4639 p = constrain(MinDegrees[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1], 0, 180);
4640 MinDegrees[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1] = p;
4641 p = constrain(MidLowDegrees[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1], 0, 180);
4642 MidLowDegrees[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1] = p;
4643 p = constrain(CentreDegrees[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1], 0, 180);
4644 CentreDegrees[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1] = p;
4645 p = constrain(MidHiDegrees[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1], 0, 180);
4646 MidHiDegrees[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1] = p;
4647 p = constrain(MaxDegrees[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1], 0, 180);
4648 MaxDegrees[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1] = p;
4649
4650 GetDotPositions();
4651 SendValue(Gn1, DegsToPercent(MinDegrees[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1])); // put numbers at top row
4652 SendValue(Gn2, DegsToPercent(MidLowDegrees[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1]));
4653 SendValue(Gn3, DegsToPercent(CentreDegrees[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1]));
4654 SendValue(Gn4, DegsToPercent(MidHiDegrees[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1]));
4655 SendValue(Gn5, DegsToPercent(MaxDegrees[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1]));
4656
4657 DrawBox(BoxLeft, BoxTop, BoxRight - BoxLeft, BoxBottom - BoxTop, HighlightColour);
4658 xDot1 = xPoints[0];
4659 yDot1 = ((BoxBottom - BoxTop) / 2) + 20; // ?
4660 xDot2 = BoxRight - BOXLEFT;
4661 yDot2 = yDot1;
4662 DrawLine(xDot1, yDot1, xDot2, yDot1, SpecialColour);
4663
4664 xDot1 = xPoints[2];
4665 yDot1 = BoxTop;
4666 xDot2 = xDot1;
4667 yDot2 = BoxBottom - BOXTOP; //(BOXLEFT)
4668 DrawLine(xDot1, yDot1, xDot2, yDot2, SpecialColour);
4669
4670 if (InterpolationTypes[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1] == STRAIGHTLINES) { // Linear
4671 SendCommand(b3on);
4672 SendCommand(b4on);
4673 SendCommand(b7on);
4674 SendCommand(b8on);
4675 SendCommand(n2on);
4676 SendCommand(n4on);
4677 DrawLine(xPoints[0], yPoints[0], xPoints[1], yPoints[1], ForeGroundColour); // this adds the straight version of the curve
4678 DrawLine(xPoints[1], yPoints[1], xPoints[2], yPoints[2], ForeGroundColour);
4679 DrawLine(xPoints[2], yPoints[2], xPoints[3], yPoints[3], ForeGroundColour);
4680 DrawLine(xPoints[3], yPoints[3], xPoints[4], yPoints[4], ForeGroundColour);
4681 }
4682
4683 if (InterpolationTypes[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1] == SMOOTHEDCURVES) { // CatmullSpline
4684
4685 SendCommand(b3on);
4686 SendCommand(b4on);
4687 SendCommand(b7on);
4688 SendCommand(b8on);
4689 SendCommand(n2on);
4690 SendCommand(n4on);
4691 yDot2 = 0;
4692 for (xPoint = xPoints[0]; xPoint <= xPoints[4]; xPoint += Step) {
4693 if (Step > xPoints[4] - xPoint) {
4694 Step = xPoints[4] - xPoint;
4695 }
4696 if (Step < 1) Step = 1;
4697 yPoint = Interpolation::CatmullSpline(xPoints, yPoints, PointsCount, xPoint);
4698 xDot1 = xPoint;
4699 yDot1 = yPoint;
4700 if (yDot2 == 0) {
4701 xDot2 = xDot1;
4702 yDot2 = yDot1;
4703 }
4704 DrawLine(xDot1, yDot1, xDot2, yDot2, ForeGroundColour);
4705 xDot2 = xDot1;
4706 yDot2 = yDot1;
4707 }
4708 }
4709
4710 if (InterpolationTypes[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1] == EXPONENTIALCURVES) { // EXPO ************************************************************************************************
4711#define APPROXIMATION 7 // This is the approximation of the screen curve
4712 SendCommand(b3off);
4713 SendCommand(b4off);
4714 SendCommand(b7off);
4715 SendCommand(b8off);
4716 SendCommand(n2off);
4717 SendCommand(n4off);
4718 HalfXRange = xPoints[4] - xPoints[2];
4719 TopHalfYRange = yPoints[4] - yPoints[2];
4720 BottomHalfYRange = yPoints[2] - yPoints[0];
4721 yDot2 = 0;
4722 Step = APPROXIMATION; // This is the approximation of the screen curve
4723
4724 CheckInvisiblePoint();
4725
4726 for (xPoint = 0; xPoint <= HalfXRange; xPoint += Step) { // Simulate a curve with many short lines to speed it up
4727 yPoint = MapWithExponential(HalfXRange - xPoint, HalfXRange, 0, 0, BottomHalfYRange, Exponential[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1]);
4728 if (Step > HalfXRange - xPoint) {
4729 Step = HalfXRange - xPoint;
4730 }
4731 if (Step < 1) Step = 1;
4732 yDot1 = yPoint + yPoints[0];
4733 xDot1 = xPoint + xPoints[0];
4734 if (yDot2 == 0) {
4735 xDot2 = xDot1;
4736 yDot2 = yDot1;
4737 }
4738 DrawLine(xDot1, yDot1, xDot2, yDot2, ForeGroundColour); // Draw short line from this point to previous point
4739 xDot2 = xDot1;
4740 yDot2 = yDot1;
4741
4742 }
4743 Step = APPROXIMATION;
4744 yDot2 = 0;
4745 for (xPoint = HalfXRange; xPoint >= 0; xPoint -= Step) { // Simulate a curve with many short lines to speed it up
4746 yPoint = MapWithExponential(xPoint, 0, HalfXRange, 0, TopHalfYRange, Exponential[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1]);
4747 if (Step > xPoint) {
4748 Step = xPoint;
4749 }
4750 if (Step < 1) Step = 1;
4751 yDot1 = yPoint + yPoints[2];
4752 xDot1 = xPoint + xPoints[2];
4753 if (yDot2 == 0) {
4754 xDot2 = xDot1;
4755 yDot2 = yDot1;
4756 }
4757 DrawLine(xDot1, yDot1, xDot2, yDot2, ForeGroundColour); // Draw short line from this point to previous point
4758 xDot2 = xDot1;
4759 yDot2 = yDot1;
4760
4761 }
4762
4763
4764 DrawDot(xPoints[0], yPoints[0], DotSize, DotColour); // This adds 3 dots
4765 DrawDot(xPoints[2], yPoints[2], DotSize, DotColour);
4766 DrawDot(xPoints[4], yPoints[4], DotSize, DotColour);
4767 }
4768 if (InterpolationTypes[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1] != EXPONENTIALCURVES) {
4769 DrawDot(xPoints[0], yPoints[0], DotSize, DotColour); // This adds 5 dots
4770 DrawDot(xPoints[1], yPoints[1], DotSize, DotColour);
4771 DrawDot(xPoints[2], yPoints[2], DotSize, DotColour);
4772 DrawDot(xPoints[3], yPoints[3], DotSize, DotColour);
4773 DrawDot(xPoints[4], yPoints[4], DotSize, DotColour);
4774 }
4775
4776 DrawDot(xPoints[CurrentPoint-1], yPoints[CurrentPoint-1], DotSize+5, HighlightColour); // Show selected point
4777 updateInterpolationTypes();
4778}
4779
4780/*********************************************************************************************************************************/
4781
4782void BindNow() // Bind button was pressed
4783{
4784#ifdef DB_BIND
4785 Serial.println("Saving model's ID");
4786#endif
4787 BindingNow = 1;
4788 ModelMatched = true;
4789 ModelsMacUnionSaved.Val32[0] = ModelsMacUnion.Val32[0];
4790 ModelsMacUnionSaved.Val32[1] = ModelsMacUnion.Val32[1];
4791 SaveOneModel(ModelNumber);
4792 MakeBindButtonInvisible();
4793 if (AnnounceConnected) PlaySound(BINDSUCCEEDED);
4794 Procrastinate(1700);
4795 UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere();
4796}
4797
4798/*********************************************************************************************************************************/
4799
4800int GetDifference(int YtouchPlace, int oldy)
4801{
4802 int dd;
4803 dd = (YtouchPlace - oldy) / 2;
4804 if (dd < 0) dd = -dd;
4805 return dd;
4806}
4807/*********************************************************************************************************************************/
4808void MoveCurrentPointUp()
4809{
4810
4811 switch (CurrentPoint){
4812 case 1:
4813 ++ MinDegrees[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1];
4814 break;
4815
4816 case 2:
4817 ++ MidLowDegrees[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1];
4818 break;
4819
4820 case 3:
4821 ++ CentreDegrees[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1];
4822 break;
4823 case 4:
4824 ++ MidHiDegrees[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1];
4825 break;
4826
4827 case 5:
4828 ++ MaxDegrees[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1];
4829 break;
4830
4831 default:
4832 break;
4833
4834 }
4835 DisplayCurve();
4836}
4837
4838/*********************************************************************************************************************************/
4839void MoveCurrentPointDown()
4840{
4841
4842 switch (CurrentPoint){
4843 case 1:
4844 -- MinDegrees[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1];
4845 break;
4846
4847 case 2:
4848 -- MidLowDegrees[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1];
4849 break;
4850
4851 case 3:
4852 -- CentreDegrees[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1];
4853 break;
4854
4855 case 4:
4856 -- MidHiDegrees[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1];
4857 break;
4858
4859 case 5:
4860 -- MaxDegrees[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1];
4861 break;
4862
4863 default:
4864 break;
4865
4866 }
4867 DisplayCurve();
4868}
4869
4870/*********************************************************************************************************************************/
4871
4873void MovePoint()
4874{
4875 int rjump = 0;
4876 GetDotPositions(); // current
4877 if (XtouchPlace > BoxRight - BOXLEFT) return; // out of range
4878 if (XtouchPlace < BOXLEFT) return; // out of range
4879 if (YtouchPlace < BoxTop) return; // out of range
4880 if (YtouchPlace > BoxBottom - BOXLEFT) return; // out of range
4881
4882 if (XtouchPlace < BOXLEFT + xPoints[0]) { // do leftmost point ?
4883 CurrentPoint = 1;
4884
4885 rjump = GetDifference(YtouchPlace, yPoints[0]);
4886 if (YtouchPlace > yPoints[0]) {
4887 if (MinDegrees[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1] >= rjump) MinDegrees[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1] -= rjump;
4888 }
4889 else {
4890 if (MinDegrees[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1] <= (180 - rjump)) MinDegrees[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1] += rjump;
4891 }
4892 }
4893
4894 if (XtouchPlace > xPoints[1] - BOXLEFT && XtouchPlace < xPoints[1] + BOXLEFT) { // do next point ?
4895 CurrentPoint = 2;
4896 CheckInvisiblePoint();
4897 if (InterpolationTypes[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1] == EXPONENTIALCURVES) return; // expo = ignore this area
4898 rjump = GetDifference(YtouchPlace, yPoints[1]);
4899 if (YtouchPlace > yPoints[1]) {
4900 if (MidLowDegrees[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1] >= rjump) MidLowDegrees[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1] -= rjump;
4901 }
4902 else {
4903 if (MidLowDegrees[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1] <= 180 - rjump) MidLowDegrees[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1] += rjump;
4904 }
4905 }
4906
4907 if (XtouchPlace > xPoints[2] - BOXLEFT && XtouchPlace < xPoints[2] + BOXLEFT) { // do next point ?
4908 CurrentPoint = 3;
4909 rjump = GetDifference(YtouchPlace, yPoints[2]);
4910 if (YtouchPlace > yPoints[2]) {
4911 if (CentreDegrees[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1] >= rjump) CentreDegrees[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1] -= rjump;
4912 }
4913 else {
4914 if (CentreDegrees[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1] <= 180 - rjump) CentreDegrees[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1] += rjump;
4915 }
4916 }
4917
4918 if (XtouchPlace > xPoints[3] - BOXLEFT && XtouchPlace < xPoints[3] + BOXLEFT) { // do next point ?
4919 CurrentPoint = 4;
4920 CheckInvisiblePoint();
4921 if (InterpolationTypes[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1] == EXPONENTIALCURVES) return; // expo = ignore this area
4922 rjump = GetDifference(YtouchPlace, yPoints[3]);
4923 if (YtouchPlace > yPoints[3]) {
4924 if (MidHiDegrees[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1] >= rjump) MidHiDegrees[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1] -= rjump;
4925 }
4926 else {
4927 if (MidHiDegrees[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1] <= 180 - rjump) MidHiDegrees[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1] += rjump;
4928 }
4929 }
4930 if (XtouchPlace > xPoints[3] + BOXLEFT) // do hi point ?
4931 {
4932 CurrentPoint = 5;
4933 rjump = GetDifference(YtouchPlace, yPoints[4]);
4934 if (YtouchPlace > yPoints[4]) {
4935 if (MaxDegrees[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1] > rjump) MaxDegrees[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1] -= rjump;
4936 }
4937 else {
4938 if (MaxDegrees[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1] <= 180 - rjump) MaxDegrees[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1] += rjump;
4939 }
4940 }
4941
4942}
4943
4944/*********************************************************************************************************************************/
4945
4946void NormaliseTheRadio()
4947{
4948 SetThePipe(DefaultPipe);
4949 Radio1.setCRCLength(RF24_CRC_8);
4950 Radio1.setRetries(RETRYCOUNT, RETRYWAIT);
4951}
4952
4953/*********************************************************************************************************************************/
4954void ShowFileProgress(char* Msg)
4955{
4956 char t1[] = "t1";
4957 SendText(t1, Msg);
4958}
4959/*********************************************************************************************************************************/
4960// SEND AND RECEIVE A MODEL FILE
4961/*********************************************************************************************************************************/
4962
4963#define FILEPIPEADDRESS 0xFEFEFEFEFELL // Unique pipe address for FILE EXCHANGE
4964#define BUFFERSIZE 28 // + 4 = 32
4965#define FILEDATARATE RF24_250KBPS
4966#define FILEPALEVEL RF24_PA_MAX
4967#define FILECHANNEL 123
4968#define FILETIMEOUT 30
4969
4970/*********************************************************************************************************************************/
4971
4973void ReceiveModelFile()
4974{
4975 uint64_t RXPipe;
4976 uint32_t RXTimer = 0;
4977 char ModelsView_filename[] = "filename";
4978 char ProgressStart[] = "vis Progress,1";
4979 char ProgressEnd[] = "vis Progress,0";
4980 char Progress[] = "Progress";
4981 char Fbuffer[BUFFERSIZE + 8]; // spare space
4982 uint8_t Fack = 1; // just a token byte
4983 char Waiting[] = "Waiting ";
4984 char WaitTime[6];
4985 char WaitMsg[17];
4986 char ThreeDots[] = "...";
4987 char Receiving[] = "Receiving ...";
4988 char TimeoutMsg[] = "TIMEOUT";
4989 char Success[] = "* Success! *";
4990 unsigned long Fsize = 0;
4991 unsigned long Fposition = 0;
4992 float SecondsElapsed = 0;
4993 uint8_t p = 5;
4994 char nb1[20];
4995 char Received[] = "Received ";
4996 char of[] = " of ";
4997 char msg[50];
4998 char bytes[] = " bytes.";
4999
5000#ifdef DB_MODEL_EXCHANGE
5001 uint8_t PacketNumber = 0;
5002 Serial.println("Receiving model ...");
5003 Serial.println(Waiting);
5004#endif
5005 BlueLedOn();
5006 SendText(ModelsView_filename, Waiting);
5007 RXPipe = FILEPIPEADDRESS;
5008 Radio1.setRetries(15, 15);
5009 Radio1.setChannel(FILECHANNEL);
5010 Radio1.flush_tx();
5011 Radio1.openReadingPipe(1, RXPipe);
5012 Radio1.startListening();
5013 RXTimer = millis(); // Start timer
5014 while (!Radio1.available()) { // Await the sender....
5015 Procrastinate(5);
5016 if (GetButtonPress()) {
5017 NormaliseTheRadio();
5018 RedLedOn();
5019 ButtonWasPressed();
5020 return;
5021 }
5022 KickTheDog(); // Watchdog
5023 if ((millis() - RXTimer) / 1000 >= FILETIMEOUT) {
5024#ifdef DB_MODEL_EXCHANGE
5025 Serial.println("Timeout");
5026#endif
5027 SendText(ModelsView_filename, TimeoutMsg);
5028 NormaliseTheRadio();
5029 return; // Give up waiting
5030 }
5031 else {
5032 SecondsElapsed = (millis() - RXTimer) / 1000;
5033 if (SecondsElapsed == (int)SecondsElapsed) { // whole number of seconds?
5034 strcpy(WaitMsg, Waiting);
5035 strcat(WaitMsg, Str(WaitTime, (FILETIMEOUT - SecondsElapsed), 0));
5036 strcat(WaitMsg, ThreeDots);
5037 SendText(ModelsView_filename, WaitMsg); // Show user how long remains to wait
5038 }
5039 }
5040 } // *First* packet must have arrived!
5041 SendCommand(ProgressStart);
5042 SendValue(Progress, p);
5043 SendText(ModelsView_filename, Receiving);
5044 Radio1.writeAckPayload(1, &Fack, sizeof(Fack)); // Ack first packet
5045 Radio1.read(&Fbuffer, BUFFERSIZE + 4); // Read it was 12
5046 strcpy(SingleModelFile, Fbuffer); // Get filename
5047 Fsize = Fbuffer[BUFFERSIZE];
5048 Fsize += Fbuffer[BUFFERSIZE + 1] << 8;
5049 Fsize += Fbuffer[BUFFERSIZE + 2] << 16;
5050 Fsize += Fbuffer[BUFFERSIZE + 3] << 24; // Get file size
5051#ifdef DB_MODEL_EXCHANGE
5052 Serial.println("CONNECTED!");
5053 Serial.print("FileName=");
5054 Serial.println(SingleModelFile);
5055 Serial.print("File size = ");
5056 Serial.println(Fsize);
5057#endif
5058 Fposition = 0;
5059 ModelsFileNumber = SD.open(SingleModelFile, FILE_WRITE); // Open file to receive
5060 RXTimer = millis(); // zero timeout
5061 while ((Fposition < Fsize) && (millis() - RXTimer) / 1000 <= FILETIMEOUT) { // (Fposition<Fsize) ********************
5062 KickTheDog(); // Watchdog
5063 if (GetButtonPress()) { // user can abandon the transfer by hitting a button
5064 NormaliseTheRadio();
5065 RedLedOn();
5066 ButtonWasPressed();
5067 return;
5068 }
5069 if (Radio1.available()) {
5070 Radio1.flush_tx();
5071 Radio1.writeAckPayload(1, &Fack, sizeof(Fack));
5072 Radio1.read(&Fbuffer, BUFFERSIZE + 4);
5073 ModelsFileNumber.seek(Fposition); // Move filepointer IS NEEDED!!
5074 ModelsFileNumber.write(Fbuffer, BUFFERSIZE); // Write part of file
5075 Radio1.flush_rx();
5076 Fposition += BUFFERSIZE;
5077 if (Fposition > Fsize) Fposition = Fsize;
5078 p = ((float)Fposition / (float)Fsize) * 100;
5079 SendValue(Progress, p);
5080 strcpy(msg, Received);
5081 strcat(msg, Str(nb1, Fposition, 0));
5082 strcat(msg, of);
5083 strcat(msg, Str(nb1, Fsize, 0));
5084 ShowFileProgress(msg);
5085#ifdef DB_MODEL_EXCHANGE
5086 PacketNumber = Fbuffer[25];
5087 Serial.print("PacketNumber: ");
5088 Serial.println(PacketNumber);
5089#endif
5090 }
5091 }
5092 SendValue(Progress, 100);
5093 ModelsFileNumber.close();
5094 BuildDirectory();
5095 SendText(ModelsView_filename, Success);
5096 Procrastinate(750);
5097 SendText(ModelsView_filename, SingleModelFile);
5098 Radio1.setRetries(RETRYCOUNT, RETRYWAIT);
5099 // **************************************** Below Here the new model is imported for immediate use
5100 SingleModelFlag = true;
5101 CloseModelsFile();
5102 ReadOneModel(1);
5103 SingleModelFlag = false;
5104 CloseModelsFile();
5105 SaveAllParameters();
5106 CloseModelsFile();
5107 UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere();
5108 NormaliseTheRadio();
5109 SendCommand(ProgressEnd);
5110 RedLedOn();
5111 strcpy(msg, Received);
5112 strcat(msg, Str(nb1, Fsize, 0));
5113 strcat(msg, bytes);
5114 ShowFileProgress(msg);
5115 PlaySound(BEEPCOMPLETE);
5116}
5117
5118/*********************************************************************************************************************************/
5119
5121void SendModelFile()
5122{
5123
5124 char ProgressStart[] = "vis Progress,1";
5125 char ProgressEnd[] = "vis Progress,0";
5126 char Progress[] = "Progress";
5127 uint64_t TXPipe;
5128 uint8_t Fack = 1;
5129 unsigned long Fsize = 0;
5130 unsigned long Fposition = 0;
5131 char Fbuffer[BUFFERSIZE + 8]; // spare space
5132 uint8_t PacketNumber = 0;
5133 int p = 5;
5134 char nb1[20];
5135 char Sent[] = "Sent ";
5136 char of[] = " of ";
5137 char msg[50];
5138 char bytes[] = " bytes.";
5139 uint32_t SentMoment = 0;
5140
5141 BlueLedOn();
5142 SendCommand(ProgressStart);
5143 SendValue(Progress, p);
5144 Procrastinate(10);
5145#ifdef DB_MODEL_EXCHANGE
5146 Serial.print("Sending model: ");
5147 Serial.println(SingleModelFile);
5148#endif
5149 TXPipe = FILEPIPEADDRESS;
5150 ModelsFileNumber = SD.open(SingleModelFile, O_READ); // Open file for reading
5151 Fsize = ModelsFileNumber.size(); // Get file size
5152#ifdef DB_MODEL_EXCHANGE
5153 Serial.print("File Size: ");
5154 Serial.print(Fsize);
5155 Serial.println(" bytes.");
5156#endif
5157 Radio1.setChannel(FILECHANNEL);
5158 Radio1.setPALevel(FILEPALEVEL, true);
5159 Radio1.setRetries(15, 15);
5160 Radio1.openWritingPipe(TXPipe);
5161 Radio1.stopListening();
5162 Procrastinate(4);
5163 while (Fposition < Fsize) {
5164 KickTheDog(); // Watchdog
5165 p = ((float)Fposition / (float)Fsize) * 100;
5166 strcpy(msg, Sent);
5167 strcat(msg, Str(nb1, Fposition, 0));
5168 strcat(msg, of);
5169 strcat(msg, Str(nb1, Fsize, 0));
5170 ShowFileProgress(msg);
5171 SendValue(Progress, p);
5172 PacketNumber++;
5173 if (PacketNumber == 1) {
5174 strcpy(Fbuffer, SingleModelFile); // Filename in first packet
5175 Fbuffer[BUFFERSIZE] = Fsize;
5176 Fbuffer[BUFFERSIZE + 1] = Fsize >> 8;
5177 Fbuffer[BUFFERSIZE + 2] = Fsize >> 16;
5178 Fbuffer[BUFFERSIZE + 3] = Fsize >> 24; // SEND FILE SIZE (four bytes)
5179 }
5180 else {
5181 ModelsFileNumber.seek(Fposition); // Move filepointer
5182 ModelsFileNumber.read(Fbuffer, BUFFERSIZE); // Read part of file
5183 Fposition += BUFFERSIZE;
5184 if (Fposition > Fsize) Fposition = Fsize;
5185 }
5186 while ((millis() - SentMoment) < PACEMAKER * 2 ) {
5187 Radio1.flush_tx();
5188 Radio1.flush_rx();
5189 }
5190 if (Radio1.write(&Fbuffer, BUFFERSIZE + 4)) {
5191 SentMoment = millis();
5192 Procrastinate(1);
5193 if (Radio1.isAckPayloadAvailable()) {
5194 Radio1.read(&Fack, sizeof(Fack));
5195 Serial.println("ACK received");
5196 Serial.println(Fposition);
5197 }
5198 else {
5199 Serial.println("NO ACK received");
5200 }
5201 }
5202 else {
5203 if (PacketNumber == 2) { // error - no connection
5204 SetThePipe(DefaultPipe);
5205 SendCommand(ProgressEnd);
5206 return;
5207 }
5208 }
5209#ifdef DB_MODEL_EXCHANGE
5210 Serial.println(PacketNumber);
5211#endif
5212 }
5213 ModelsFileNumber.close();
5214#ifdef DB_MODEL_EXCHANGE
5215 Serial.println("ALL SENT.");
5216#endif
5217 SendValue(Progress, 100);
5218 Procrastinate(750);
5219 NormaliseTheRadio();
5220 SendCommand(ProgressEnd);
5221 RedLedOn();
5222 strcpy(msg, Sent);
5223 strcat(msg, Str(nb1, Fsize, 0));
5224 strcat(msg, bytes);
5225 ShowFileProgress(msg);
5226 PlaySound(BEEPCOMPLETE);
5227}
5228
5229/*********************************************************************************************************************************/
5230
5231void SoundBank()
5232{
5233 uint8_t Sounds[4] = {BANKONE, BANKTWO, BANKTHREE, BANKFOUR};
5234 PlaySound(Sounds[Bank - 1]);
5235 ScreenTimeTimer = millis(); // reset screen counter
5236 if (ScreenIsOff) {
5237 RestoreBrightness();
5238 ScreenIsOff = false;
5239 }
5240}
5241/*********************************************************************************************************************************/
5242void ShowBank(){
5243 char FMPress[4][12] = {"click fm1,1", "click fm2,1", "click fm3,1", "click fm4,1"};
5244 SendCommand(FMPress[Bank - 1]);
5245}
5246
5247/*********************************************************************************************************************************/
5248void ShowMotor(int on)
5249{
5250 char bt0[] = "bt0";
5251 char OnMsg[] = "Motor ON";
5252 char OffMsg[] = "Motor OFF";
5253 if (on == 1) SendText(bt0, OnMsg);
5254 if (on == 0) SendText(bt0, OffMsg);
5255
5256}
5257/*********************************************************************************************************************************/
5258
5259void updateOneSwitchView()
5260{
5261 char OneSwitchView_r0[] = "r0"; // Not used
5262 char OneSwitchView_r1[] = "r1"; // Flight modes
5263 char OneSwitchView_r2[] = "r2"; // Auto
5264 char OneSwitchView_r3[] = "r3"; // Ch9
5265 char OneSwitchView_r4[] = "r4"; // Ch10
5266 char OneSwitchView_r5[] = "r5"; // Ch11
5267 char OneSwitchView_r6[] = "r6"; // Ch12
5268 char OneSwitchView_r7[] = "r7"; // Safety
5269 char OneSwitchView_r8[] = "r8"; // Dual Rates
5270 char OneSwitchView_r9[] = "r9"; // Buddy
5271 char OneSwitchViewc_revd[] = "c_revd"; // Reversed
5272 char SwNum[] = "Sw";
5273
5274 if (SwitchEditNumber == 1) {
5275 ValueSent = false; // If no setting, = Not Used
5276 if (FMSwitch == 1) SendValue(OneSwitchView_r1, 1);
5277 if (AutoSwitch == 1) SendValue(OneSwitchView_r2, 1);
5278 if (Channel9Switch == 1) SendValue(OneSwitchView_r3, 1);
5279 if (Channel10Switch == 1) SendValue(OneSwitchView_r4, 1);
5280 if (Channel11Switch == 1) SendValue(OneSwitchView_r5, 1);
5281 if (Channel12Switch == 1) SendValue(OneSwitchView_r6, 1);
5282 if (SafetySwitch == 1) SendValue(OneSwitchView_r7, 1);
5283 if (DualRatesSwitch == 1) SendValue(OneSwitchView_r8, 1);
5284 if (BuddySwitch == 1) SendValue(OneSwitchView_r9, 1);
5285
5286
5287 if (!ValueSent) SendValue(OneSwitchView_r0, 1); // nothing yet, so not used
5288 if (SWITCH1Reversed) SendValue(OneSwitchViewc_revd, 1);
5289 }
5290 if (SwitchEditNumber == 2) {
5291 ValueSent = false;
5292 if (FMSwitch == 2) SendValue(OneSwitchView_r1, 1);
5293 if (AutoSwitch == 2) SendValue(OneSwitchView_r2, 1);
5294 if (Channel9Switch == 2) SendValue(OneSwitchView_r3, 1);
5295 if (Channel10Switch == 2) SendValue(OneSwitchView_r4, 1);
5296 if (Channel11Switch == 2) SendValue(OneSwitchView_r5, 1);
5297 if (Channel12Switch == 2) SendValue(OneSwitchView_r6, 1);
5298 if (SafetySwitch == 2) SendValue(OneSwitchView_r7, 1);
5299 if (DualRatesSwitch == 2) SendValue(OneSwitchView_r8, 1);
5300 if (BuddySwitch == 2) SendValue(OneSwitchView_r9, 1);
5301 if (!ValueSent) SendValue(OneSwitchView_r0, 1); // nothing yet, so not used
5302 if (SWITCH2Reversed) SendValue(OneSwitchViewc_revd, 1);
5303 }
5304 if (SwitchEditNumber == 3) {
5305 ValueSent = false;
5306 if (FMSwitch == 3) SendValue(OneSwitchView_r1, 1);
5307 if (AutoSwitch == 3) SendValue(OneSwitchView_r2, 1);
5308 if (Channel9Switch == 3) SendValue(OneSwitchView_r3, 1);
5309 if (Channel10Switch == 3) SendValue(OneSwitchView_r4, 1);
5310 if (Channel11Switch == 3) SendValue(OneSwitchView_r5, 1);
5311 if (Channel12Switch == 3) SendValue(OneSwitchView_r6, 1);
5312 if (SafetySwitch == 3) SendValue(OneSwitchView_r7, 1);
5313 if (DualRatesSwitch == 3) SendValue(OneSwitchView_r8, 1);
5314 if (BuddySwitch == 3) SendValue(OneSwitchView_r9, 1);
5315
5316 if (!ValueSent) SendValue(OneSwitchView_r0, 1); // nothing yet, so not used
5317 if (SWITCH3Reversed) SendValue(OneSwitchViewc_revd, 1);
5318 }
5319 if (SwitchEditNumber == 4) {
5320 ValueSent = false;
5321 if (FMSwitch == 4) SendValue(OneSwitchView_r1, 1);
5322 if (AutoSwitch == 4) SendValue(OneSwitchView_r2, 1);
5323 if (Channel9Switch == 4) SendValue(OneSwitchView_r3, 1);
5324 if (Channel10Switch == 4) SendValue(OneSwitchView_r4, 1);
5325 if (Channel11Switch == 4) SendValue(OneSwitchView_r5, 1);
5326 if (Channel12Switch == 4) SendValue(OneSwitchView_r6, 1);
5327 if (SafetySwitch == 4) SendValue(OneSwitchView_r7, 1);
5328 if (DualRatesSwitch == 4) SendValue(OneSwitchView_r8, 1);
5329 if (BuddySwitch == 4) SendValue(OneSwitchView_r9, 1);
5330 if (!ValueSent) SendValue(OneSwitchView_r0, 1); // nothing yet, so not used
5331 if (SWITCH4Reversed) SendValue(OneSwitchViewc_revd, 1);
5332 }
5333 SendValue(SwNum, SwitchEditNumber); // show switch number
5334}
5335
5336/*********************************************************************************************************************************/
5337
5338void RestoreBrightness()
5339{
5340 char cmd[20];
5341 char dim[] = "dim=";
5342 char nb[10];
5343 if (Brightness < 10) Brightness = 10;
5344 strcpy(cmd, dim);
5345 Str(nb, Brightness, 0);
5346 strcat(cmd, nb);
5347 SendCommand(cmd);
5348 ScreenTimeTimer = millis(); // reset screen counter
5349}
5350/*********************************************************************************************************************************/
5351
5352void ZeroDataScreen()
5353{ // ZERO Those parameters that are zeroable
5354 TotalLostPackets = 0;
5355 GapLongest = 0;
5356 GapSum = 0;
5357 GapAverage = 0;
5358 GapCount = 0;
5359 GapStart = 0;
5360 RXMAXModelAltitude = 0;
5361 GPSMaxAltitude = 0;
5362 ThisGap = 0;
5363 GPSMaxDistance = 0;
5364 GPSMaxSpeed = 0;
5365 SavedRadioSwaps = RadioSwaps; // Cannot easily zero these, so do a subtraction
5366 SavedRX1TotalTime = RX1TotalTime;
5367 SavedRX2TotalTime = RX2TotalTime;
5368 SavedSbusRepeats = SbusRepeats;
5369 LastShowTime = 0; // for instant redisplay
5370}
5371/***************************************************** ReadNewSwitchFunction ****************************************************************************/
5372
5373void ReadNewSwitchFunction(){
5374 char OneSwitchView_r1[] = "r1"; // Flight modes
5375 char OneSwitchView_r2[] = "r2"; // Auto
5376 char OneSwitchView_r3[] = "r3"; // Ch9
5377 char OneSwitchView_r4[] = "r4"; // Ch10
5378 char OneSwitchView_r5[] = "r5"; // Ch11
5379 char OneSwitchView_r6[] = "r6"; // Ch12
5380 char OneSwitchView_r7[] = "r7"; // Safety
5381 char OneSwitchView_r8[] = "r8"; // Dual Rates
5382 char OneSwitchView_r9[] = "r9"; // Buddy
5383 char PageSwitchView[] = "page SwitchesView";
5384 char OneSwitchViewc_revd[] = "c_revd"; // Reversed
5385 char ProgressStart[] = "vis Progress,1";
5386 char ProgressEnd[] = "vis Progress,0";
5387 char Progress[] = "Progress";
5388
5389 SendCommand(ProgressStart);
5390 SendValue(Progress, 10);
5391
5392 if (GetValue(OneSwitchView_r1)) {
5393 FMSwitch = SwitchEditNumber;
5394 }
5395 else {
5396 if (FMSwitch == SwitchEditNumber) FMSwitch = 0;
5397 }
5398
5399 SendValue(Progress, 15);
5400 if (GetValue(OneSwitchView_r2)) {
5401 AutoSwitch = SwitchEditNumber;
5402 }
5403 else {
5404 if (AutoSwitch == SwitchEditNumber) AutoSwitch = 0;
5405 }
5406 SendValue(Progress, 25);
5407 if (GetValue(OneSwitchView_r3)) {
5408 Channel9Switch = SwitchEditNumber;
5409 }
5410 else {
5411 if (Channel9Switch == SwitchEditNumber) Channel9Switch = 0;
5412 }
5413 SendValue(Progress, 30);
5414 if (GetValue(OneSwitchView_r4)) {
5415 Channel10Switch = SwitchEditNumber;
5416 }
5417 else {
5418 if (Channel10Switch == SwitchEditNumber) Channel10Switch = 0;
5419 }
5420 SendValue(Progress, 40);
5421 if (GetValue(OneSwitchView_r5)) {
5422 Channel11Switch = SwitchEditNumber;
5423 }
5424 else {
