5425 if (Channel11Switch == SwitchEditNumber) Channel11Switch = 0;
5426 }
5427 SendValue(Progress, 50);
5428 if (GetValue(OneSwitchView_r6)) {
5429 Channel12Switch = SwitchEditNumber;
5430 }
5431 else {
5432 if (Channel12Switch == SwitchEditNumber) Channel12Switch = 0;
5433 }
5434 SendValue(Progress, 60);
5435 if (GetValue(OneSwitchView_r7)) {
5436 SafetySwitch = SwitchEditNumber;
5437 }
5438 else {
5439 if (SafetySwitch == SwitchEditNumber) SafetySwitch = 0;
5440 }
5441 SendValue(Progress, 70);
5442 if (GetValue(OneSwitchView_r8)) {
5443 DualRatesSwitch = SwitchEditNumber;
5444 }
5445 else {
5446 if (DualRatesSwitch == SwitchEditNumber) DualRatesSwitch = 0;
5447 }
5448 SendValue(Progress, 80);
5449 if (GetValue(OneSwitchView_r9)) {
5450 BuddySwitch = SwitchEditNumber;
5451 }
5452 else {
5453 if (BuddySwitch == SwitchEditNumber) BuddySwitch = 0;
5454 }
5455
5456 SendValue(Progress, 90);
5457 if (SwitchEditNumber == 1) {
5458 if (GetValue(OneSwitchViewc_revd)) {
5459 SWITCH1Reversed = true;
5460 }
5461 else {
5462 SWITCH1Reversed = false;
5463 }
5464 }
5465 if (SwitchEditNumber == 2) {
5466 if (GetValue(OneSwitchViewc_revd)) {
5467 SWITCH2Reversed = true;
5468 }
5469 else {
5470 SWITCH2Reversed = false;
5471 }
5472 SendValue(Progress, 95);
5473 }
5474 if (SwitchEditNumber == 3) {
5475 if (GetValue(OneSwitchViewc_revd)) {
5476 SWITCH3Reversed = true;
5477 }
5478 else {
5479 SWITCH3Reversed = false;
5480 }
5481 }
5482 if (SwitchEditNumber == 4) {
5483 if (GetValue(OneSwitchViewc_revd)) {
5484 SWITCH4Reversed = true;
5485 }
5486 else {
5487 SWITCH4Reversed = false;
5488 }
5489 }
5490 SendValue(Progress, 100);
5491 SaveOneModel(ModelNumber);
5492 SendCommand(PageSwitchView); // change to all switches screen
5493 UpdateSwitchesDisplay(); // update its info
5494 ClearText();
5495 SendCommand(ProgressEnd);
5496 return;
5497
5498}
5499/***************************************************** ShowChannelName ****************************************************************************/
5500
5501
5502void ShowChannelName()
5503{
5504 char MoveToChannel[] = "Mch";
5505 char MacrosView_chM[] = "chM";
5506 uint8_t ch = GetValue(MoveToChannel);
5507 if (ch > 0) --ch; // no zero
5508 SendText(MacrosView_chM, ChannelNames[ch]);
5509}
5510/***************************************************** Populate Macros View ****************************************************************************/
5511
5512void PopulateMacrosView()
5513{
5514 char MacroNumber[] = "Mno";
5515 char TriggerChannel[] = "Tch";
5516 char MoveToChannel[] = "Mch";
5517 char MoveToPosition[] = "Pos";
5518 char Delay[] = "Del";
5519 char Duration[] = "Dur";
5520 uint8_t n = PreviousMacroNumber;
5521
5522 if (n < 8) { // Read previous values before moveing to next
5523 MacrosBuffer[n][MACROTRIGGERCHANNEL] = GetValue(TriggerChannel);
5524 MacrosBuffer[n][MACROMOVECHANNEL] = GetValue(MoveToChannel);
5525 MacrosBuffer[n][MACROMOVETOPOSITION] = GetValue(MoveToPosition);
5526 MacrosBuffer[n][MACROSTARTTIME] = GetValue(Delay);
5527 MacrosBuffer[n][MACRODURATION] = GetValue(Duration);
5528 }
5529 n = GetValue(MacroNumber) - 1;
5530 SendValue(TriggerChannel, MacrosBuffer[n][MACROTRIGGERCHANNEL]);
5531 SendValue(MoveToChannel, MacrosBuffer[n][MACROMOVECHANNEL]);
5532 SendValue(MoveToPosition, MacrosBuffer[n][MACROMOVETOPOSITION]);
5533 SendValue(Delay, MacrosBuffer[n][MACROSTARTTIME]);
5534 SendValue(Duration, MacrosBuffer[n][MACRODURATION]);
5535 ShowChannelName();
5536 PreviousMacroNumber = n;
5537}
5538
5539/*********************************************************************************************************************************/
5540
5541void ExitMacrosView()
5542{
5543 char pSetupView[] = "page SetupView";
5544 char MacroNumber[] = "Mno";
5545 char TriggerChannel[] = "Tch";
5546 char MoveToChannel[] = "Mch";
5547 char MoveToPosition[] = "Pos";
5548 char Delay[] = "Del";
5549 char Duration[] = "Dur";
5550 uint8_t n = GetValue(MacroNumber) - 1;
5551 MacrosBuffer[n][MACROTRIGGERCHANNEL] = GetValue(TriggerChannel);
5552 MacrosBuffer[n][MACROMOVECHANNEL] = GetValue(MoveToChannel);
5553 MacrosBuffer[n][MACROMOVETOPOSITION] = GetValue(MoveToPosition);
5554 MacrosBuffer[n][MACROSTARTTIME] = GetValue(Delay);
5555 MacrosBuffer[n][MACRODURATION] = GetValue(Duration);
5556 UseMacros = true;
5557 SaveOneModel(ModelNumber);
5558 b5isGrey = false;
5559 SendCommand(pSetupView);
5560 CurrentView = MAINSETUPVIEW;
5561 UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere();
5562
5563}
5564
5565/*********************************************************************************************************************************/
5566
5567void EndReverseView()
5568{ // channel reverse flags are 16 individual BITs in var 'ReversedChannelBITS'
5569 char fs[16][5] = {"fs1", "fs2", "fs3", "fs4", "fs5", "fs6", "fs7", "fs8", "fs9", "fs10", "fs11", "fs12", "fs13", "fs14", "fs15", "fs16"};
5570 uint8_t i;
5571 char pSetupView[] = "page SetupView";
5572 char ProgressStart[] = "vis Progress,1";
5573 char ProgressEnd[] = "vis Progress,0";
5574 char Progress[] = "Progress";
5575 SendCommand(ProgressStart);
5576 ReversedChannelBITS = 0;
5577 for (i = 0; i < 16; ++i) {
5578 SendValue(Progress, (i * (100 / 16)));
5579 if (GetValue(fs[i])) ReversedChannelBITS |= 1 << i; // set a BIT
5580 }
5581 CurrentView = MAINSETUPVIEW;
5582 SaveOneModel(ModelNumber);
5583 SendCommand(ProgressEnd);
5584 b5isGrey = false;
5585 SendCommand(pSetupView);
5586 UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere();
5587}
5588
5589/*********************************************************************************************************************************/
5590
5591void StartReverseView()
5592{ // channel reverse flags are 16 individual BITs in ReversedChannelBITS
5593 char pReverseView[] = "page ReverseView";
5594 char fs[16][5] = {"fs1", "fs2", "fs3", "fs4", "fs5", "fs6", "fs7", "fs8", "fs9", "fs10", "fs11", "fs12", "fs13", "fs14", "fs15", "fs16"};
5595 uint8_t i;
5596 char Progress[] = "Progress";
5597 char ProgressStart[] = "vis Progress,1";
5598 char ProgressEnd[] = "vis Progress,0";
5599 CurrentView = REVERSEVIEW;
5600 SendCommand(pReverseView);
5601 UpdateButtonLabels();
5602 SendCommand(ProgressStart);
5603 for (i = 0; i < 16; ++i) {
5604 SendValue(Progress, (i * (100 / 16)));
5605 if (ReversedChannelBITS & 1 << i) { // is BIT set??
5606 SendValue(fs[i], 1);
5607 }
5608 else {
5609 SendValue(fs[i], 0);
5610 }
5611 }
5612 SendCommand(ProgressEnd);
5613 UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere();
5614}
5615
5616/*********************************************************************************************************************************/
5617
5618void StartBuddyView()
5619{
5620 char BuddyM[] = "BuddyM";
5621 char BuddyP[] = "BuddyP";
5622 char pBuddyView[] = "page BuddyView";
5623 SendCommand(pBuddyView);
5624 CurrentView = BUDDYVIEW;
5625 SendValue(BuddyM, BuddyMaster);
5626 SendValue(BuddyP, BuddyPupilOnSbus);
5627}
5628
5629/*********************************************************************************************************************************/
5630
5631void EndBuddyView()
5632{
5633 char BuddyM[] = "BuddyM";
5634 char BuddyP[] = "BuddyP";
5635
5636
5637 char pSetupView[] = "page SetupView";
5638 BuddyPupilOnSbus = GetValue(BuddyP); // Pupil, wired
5639 BuddyMaster = GetValue(BuddyM); // Master, either.
5640 SaveAllParameters();
5641 b5isGrey = false;
5642 SendCommand(pSetupView);
5643 CurrentView = MAINSETUPVIEW;
5644 UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere();
5645}
5646/*********************************************************************************************************************************/
5647FASTRUN void DisplayCurveAndServoPos(){
5648
5649 ClearBox();
5650 Procrastinate(5);
5651 SavedLineX = 52735; // just to be massvely different
5652 ShowServoPos(); // this calls displaycurve!!!
5653 ClearText();
5654}
5655/******************************** FUNCTIONS FOR ARRAY OF POINTERS *************************************************************/
5656void Blank()
5657{
5658 return;
5659}
5660/******************************************************************************************************************************/
5661void DecFileInView()
5662{ // 1
5663 --FileNumberInView;
5664 ShowFileNumber();
5665 CloseModelsFile();
5666}
5667/******************************************************************************************************************************/
5668void IncFileInView()
5669{ // 2
5670 ++FileNumberInView;
5671 ShowFileNumber();
5672 CloseModelsFile();
5673}
5674/******************************************************************************************************************************/
5675void DoLastTimeRead()
5676{
5677 LastTimeRead = 0;
5678}
5679/******************************************************************************************************************************/
5680void GotoModelsView()
5681{
5682 char pModelsView[] = "page ModelsView";
5683 char mn[] = "ModelNumber";
5684 if (ModelMatched) return; // must not change when model connected
5685 SendCommand(pModelsView);
5686 CurrentView = MODELSVIEW;
5687 UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere();
5688 BuildDirectory(); // of SD card
5689 ShowFileNumber();
5690 SendValue(mn, ModelNumber);
5691}
5692/******************************************************************************************************************************/
5693void GotoMacrosView()
5694{
5695 char pMacrosView[] = "page MacrosView";
5696 PreviousMacroNumber = 200; // i.e. no usable number
5697 SendCommand(pMacrosView); // Display MacroView
5698 CurrentView = MACROS_VIEW;
5699 Procrastinate(200); // allow enough time for screen to display
5700 UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere();
5701 PopulateMacrosView();
5702}
5703/******************************************************************************************************************************/
5704void UpLog()
5705{
5706 if (RecentStartLine > 0 && (CurrentView == LOGVIEW)) {
5707 RecentStartLine -= 1;
5708 if (RecentStartLine < 0) RecentStartLine = 0;
5709 ShowLogFile(RecentStartLine);
5710 }
5711 if (RecentStartLine > 0 && (CurrentView == HELP_VIEW)) {
5712 RecentStartLine -= 1;
5713 if (RecentStartLine < 1) RecentStartLine = 0;
5714 ScrollHelpFile();
5715 }
5716}
5717/******************************************************************************************************************************/
5718void DownLog()
5719{
5720
5721 if (ThereIsMoreToSee && (CurrentView == LOGVIEW)) {
5722 RecentStartLine += 1;
5723 ShowLogFile(RecentStartLine);
5724 }
5725 if (ThereIsMoreToSee && (CurrentView == HELP_VIEW)) {
5726 RecentStartLine += 1;
5727 ScrollHelpFile();
5728 }
5729}
5730/******************************************************************************************************************************/
5731void RefreshLog()
5732{ // refresh log screen
5733 if (UseLog) {
5734 RecentStartLine = 0;
5735 ShowLogFile(RecentStartLine);
5736 ClearText();
5737 }
5738}
5739/******************************************************************************************************************************/
5740void LogEND()
5741{ // close log screen
5742 char n0[] = "n0";
5743 char c0[] = "c0";
5744 char sw0[] = "sw0";
5745 char pDataView[] = "page DataView";
5746 CurrentMode = NORMAL;
5747 CurrentView = DATAVIEW;
5748 LastShowTime = 0;
5749 MinimumGap = GetValue(n0);
5750 LogRXSwaps = GetValue(c0);
5751 UseLog = GetValue(sw0);
5752 SaveTransmitterParameters();
5753 SendCommand(pDataView);
5754}
5755/******************************************************************************************************************************/
5756void DelLOG()
5757{ // delete log and start new one
5758 DeleteLogFile1();
5759 ClearText();
5760}
5761/******************************************************************************************************************************/
5762void LogVIEW()
5763{ // Start log screen
5764 char n0[] = "n0";
5765 char c0[] = "c0";
5766 char sw0[] = "sw0";
5767 char pLogView[] = "page LogView";
5768 SendCommand(pLogView);
5769 CurrentView = LOGVIEW;
5770 SendValue(n0, MinimumGap);
5771 SendValue(c0, LogRXSwaps);
5772 SendValue(sw0, UseLog);
5773 if (UseLog) {
5774 RecentStartLine = 0;
5775 ShowLogFile(RecentStartLine);
5776 }
5777}
5778
5779/******************************************************************************************************************************/
5780void SetupViewFM()
5781{ // (Exit from models screen) New model name occurs at offset 4 in TextIn
5782
5783 char page_SetupView[] = "page SetupView";
5784 SaveAllParameters();
5785 CurrentView = MAINSETUPVIEW;
5786 SendCommand(page_SetupView);
5787 CurrentMode = NORMAL; // Send data again
5788 UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere();
5789}
5790
5791/******************************************************************************************************************************/
5792void StartSubTrimView()
5793{ // Subtrim view start
5794 char pSubTrimView[] = "page SubTrimView";
5795 char t2[] = "t2";
5796 char n0[] = "n0";
5797 char h0[] = "h0";
5798 SendCommand(pSubTrimView);
5799 SubTrimToEdit = 0;
5800 CurrentView = SUBTRIMVIEW;
5801 SendText(t2, ChannelNames[SubTrimToEdit]);
5802 SendValue(n0, SubTrims[SubTrimToEdit] - 127);
5803 SendValue(h0, SubTrims[SubTrimToEdit]);
5804 UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere();
5805}
5806/******************************************************************************************************************************/
5807void EndSubTrimView()
5808{ // Subtrim view exit
5809 char page_SetupView[] = "page SetupView";
5810 SaveOneModel(ModelNumber);
5811 CurrentView = MAINSETUPVIEW;
5812 SendCommand(page_SetupView);
5813 LastTimeRead = 0;
5814 UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere();
5815}
5816/******************************************************************************************************************************/
5817void StartTrimDefView()
5818{
5819 char pTrimDefView[] = "page TrimDefView";
5820 CurrentView = TRIMDEFVIEW;
5821 SendCommand(pTrimDefView);
5822 ResetAllTrims();
5823 BlueLedOn();
5824 CurrentMode = SENDNOTHING;
5825 for (int i = 0; i < 4; ++i) TrimDefined[i] = false;
5826 DefiningTrims = true;
5827
5828}
5829/******************************************************************************************************************************/
5830void DefineTrimsEnd()
5831{ // exit from trim defining screen
5832 char pCalibrateView[] = "page CalibrateView";
5833 CurrentView = MAINSETUPVIEW;
5834 SendCommand(pCalibrateView);
5835 Force_ReDisplay();
5836 CurrentView = CALIBRATEVIEW;
5837 DefiningTrims = false;
5838 CurrentMode = NORMAL;
5839 SaveTransmitterParameters();
5840 UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere();
5841}
5842/******************************************************************************************************************************/
5843void ResetAllTrims()
5844{
5845 uint8_t T[8] = {TRIM1A, TRIM1B, TRIM2A, TRIM2B, TRIM3A, TRIM3B, TRIM4A, TRIM4B};
5846 for (int i = 0; i < 8; ++i) {
5847 TrimNumber[i] = T[i];
5848 }
5849}
5850/******************************************************************************************************************************/
5851void Options2End()
5852{ // back to setup?
5853 char dGMT[] = "dGMT";
5854 char page_SetupView[] = "page SetupView";
5855 DeltaGMT = GetValue(dGMT);
5856 SaveTransmitterParameters();
5857 CurrentView = MAINSETUPVIEW;
5858 SendCommand(page_SetupView);
5859 UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere();
5860}
5861/******************************************************************************************************************************/
5862
5863void OptionView2Start()
5864{
5865 char dGMT[] = "dGMT"; // Time zone
5866 char n1[] = "n1";
5867 char n2[] = "n2";
5868 char t10[] = "t10";
5869 char n3[] = "n3";
5870 char lpm[] = "c0"; // Auto model match
5871 char OptionV2Start[] = "page OptionView2";
5872 char TxVCorrextion[] = "t2";
5873 char RxVCorrextion[] = "n0"; // RX Voltage correction
5874 char fbuf[10];
5875
5876 if (CurrentView == OPTIONVIEW3) { // TODO: And what if was Options 1??
5877 GetText(t10, fbuf);
5878 StopFlyingVoltsPerCell = atof(fbuf);
5879 SFV = StopFlyingVoltsPerCell * 100;// this makes it a 16 bit value I can save easily
5880 RxVoltageCorrection = GetValue(RxVCorrextion);
5881 TxVoltageCorrection = GetValue(TxVCorrextion);
5882 PowerOffWarningSeconds = GetValue(n2);
5883 PowerOffWarningSeconds = CheckRange(PowerOffWarningSeconds, 1, 10);
5884 AutoModelSelect = GetValue(lpm);
5885 if (LEDBrightness != GetValue(n1)) UpdateLED();
5886 ConnectionAssessSeconds = GetValue(n3);
5887 ConnectionAssessSeconds = CheckRange(ConnectionAssessSeconds, 1, 6);
5888 SaveAllParameters();
5889 }
5890
5891 CurrentView = OPTIONVIEW2;
5892 LastTimeRead = 0;
5893 SendCommand(OptionV2Start);
5894 Procrastinate(100);
5895 SendValue(dGMT, DeltaGMT);
5896}
5897
5898/******************************************************************************************************************************/
5899
5900void OptionView3Start()
5901{
5902 char TxVCorrextion[] = "t2";
5903 char n1[] = "n1";
5904 char n2[] = "n2";
5905 char t10[] = "t10";
5906 char n3[] = "n3";
5907 char RxVCorrextion[] = "n0"; // RX Voltage correction
5908 char lpm[] = "c0"; // Low power mode
5909 char Vbuf[10];
5910 char OptionV3Start[] = "page OptionView3";
5911 CurrentView = OPTIONVIEW3;
5912 SendCommand(OptionV3Start);
5913 Procrastinate(250);
5914 snprintf(Vbuf, 5, "%f", StopFlyingVoltsPerCell);
5915 SendText(t10, Vbuf);
5916 SendValue(TxVCorrextion, TxVoltageCorrection);
5917 SendValue(RxVCorrextion, RxVoltageCorrection);
5918 SendValue(n2, PowerOffWarningSeconds);
5919 SendValue(n3, ConnectionAssessSeconds);
5920 SendValue(lpm, AutoModelSelect);
5921 SendValue(n1, LEDBrightness);
5922}
5923
5924/******************************************************************************************************************************/
5925
5926void OptionView4Start()
5927{
5928 char OptionV4Start[] = "page OptionView4";
5929 char UseKill[] = "c0";
5930 char Mchannel[] = "n1";
5931 char Mvalue[] = "n0";
5932
5933 SendCommand(OptionV4Start);
5934 Procrastinate(100);
5935 SendValue(Mvalue, MotorChannelZero);
5936 SendValue(Mchannel, MotorChannel + 1);
5937 SendValue(UseKill, UseMotorKill);
5938 CurrentView = OPTIONVIEW4;
5939}
5940/******************************************************************************************************************************/
5941
5942void OptionView4End()
5943{
5944 char page_SetupView[] = "page SetupView";
5945 char UseKill[] = "c0";
5946 char Mchannel[] = "n1";
5947 char Mvalue[] = "n0";
5948 Look(42);
5949 MotorChannelZero = GetValue(Mvalue);
5950 UseMotorKill = GetValue(UseKill);
5951 MotorChannel = GetValue(Mchannel) - 1;
5952 CurrentView = MAINSETUPVIEW;
5953 SendCommand(page_SetupView);
5954 SaveAllParameters();
5955 UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere();
5956}
5957
5958/******************************************************************************************************************************/
5959
5960void UpdateLED(){ // LED Brightness has changed so this ensures it is redisplayed
5961 char n1[] = "n1";
5962 LEDBrightness = GetValue(n1);
5963 LEDBrightness = CheckRange(LEDBrightness, 1, 254);
5964 LedWasGreen = false; // Forces a redisplay if brightness has changed
5965}
5966
5967/******************************************************************************************************************************/
5968
5969void OptionView3End()
5970{
5971 char TxVCorrextion[] = "t2";
5972 char RxVCorrextion[] = "n0";
5973 char n2[] = "n2";
5974 char n3[] = "n3";
5975 char n1[] = "n1";
5976 char t10[] = "t10";
5977 char page_SetupView[] = "page SetupView";
5978 char lpm[] = "c0"; // Auto model selection
5979 char fbuf[10];
5980 GetText(t10, fbuf);
5981 StopFlyingVoltsPerCell = atof(fbuf);
5982 SFV = StopFlyingVoltsPerCell * 100; // this makes it a 16 bit value I can save easily
5983 TxVoltageCorrection = GetValue(TxVCorrextion);
5984 RxVoltageCorrection = GetValue(RxVCorrextion);
5985 PowerOffWarningSeconds = GetValue(n2);
5986 PowerOffWarningSeconds = CheckRange(PowerOffWarningSeconds, 1, 10);
5987 AutoModelSelect = GetValue(lpm);
5988 if (LEDBrightness != GetValue(n1)) UpdateLED();
5989 ConnectionAssessSeconds = GetValue(n3);
5990 ConnectionAssessSeconds = CheckRange(ConnectionAssessSeconds, 1, 6);
5991 SaveAllParameters();
5992 CloseModelsFile();
5993 CurrentView = MAINSETUPVIEW;
5994 SendCommand(page_SetupView);
5995 UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere();
5996}
5997
5998/******************************************************************************************************************************/
5999
6000void BuddyChViewStart()
6001{
6002 char page_BuddyChView[] = "page BuddyChView";
6003 char fs[16][5] = {"fs1", "fs2", "fs3", "fs4", "fs5", "fs6", "fs7", "fs8", "fs9", "fs10", "fs11", "fs12", "fs13", "fs14", "fs15", "fs16"};
6004 SendCommand(page_BuddyChView);
6005 CurrentView = BUDDYCHVIEW;
6006 UpdateButtonLabels();
6007 for (int i = 0; i < 16; ++i) {
6008 if (BuddyControlled & 1 << i) {
6009 SendValue(fs[i], 1);
6010 } else {
6011 SendValue(fs[i], 0);
6012 }
6013 }
6014}
6015
6016/******************************************************************************************************************************/
6017
6018void BuddyChViewEnd()
6019{
6020 char ProgressStart[] = "vis Progress,1";
6021 char ProgressEnd[] = "vis Progress,0";
6022 char Progress[] = "Progress";
6023 char page_BuddyView[] = "page BuddyView";
6024 char fs[16][5] = {"fs1", "fs2", "fs3", "fs4", "fs5", "fs6", "fs7", "fs8", "fs9", "fs10", "fs11", "fs12", "fs13", "fs14", "fs15", "fs16"};
6025 SendCommand(ProgressStart);
6026 BuddyControlled = 0;
6027 for (int i = 0; i < 16; ++i) {
6028 BuddyControlled |= GetValue(fs[i]) << i;
6029 SendValue(Progress, i * (100 / 16));
6030 }
6031 SaveOneModel(ModelNumber);
6032 SendCommand(ProgressEnd);
6033 SendCommand(page_BuddyView);
6034 CurrentView = BUDDYVIEW;
6035}
6036/******************************************************************************************************************************/
6037void RudderLeftTrim(){MoveaTrim(7);}
6038/******************************************************************************************************************************/
6039void RudderRightTrim(){MoveaTrim(6);}
6040/******************************************************************************************************************************/
6041void AileronRightTrim(){MoveaTrim(0);}
6042/******************************************************************************************************************************/
6043void AileronLeftTrim(){MoveaTrim(1);}
6044/******************************************************************************************************************************/
6045void ElevatorUpTrim(){
6046 uint8_t tt = 2;
6047 if (SticksMode == 2) tt = 5;
6048 MoveaTrim(tt);
6049}
6050/******************************************************************************************************************************/
6051void ElevatorDownTrim(){
6052 uint8_t tt = 3;
6053 if (SticksMode == 2) tt = 4;
6054 MoveaTrim(tt);
6055}
6056/******************************************************************************************************************************/
6057void ThrottleUpTrim(){
6058 uint8_t tt = 4;
6059 if (SticksMode == 2) tt = 3;
6060 MoveaTrim(tt);
6061}
6062/******************************************************************************************************************************/
6063void ThrottleDownTrim(){
6064 uint8_t tt = 5;
6065 if (SticksMode == 2) tt = 2;
6066 MoveaTrim(tt);
6067}
6068/******************************************************************************************************************************/
6069void ResetTransmitterSettings(){ // This function resets all transmitter parameters to the default state.
6070 // But not the clock. Calibration shoulw be done next.
6071
6072const char Tn[32] = "Unknown";
6073
6074 BuddyPupilOnSbus = false;
6075 BuddyMaster = false;
6076 ModelNumber = 1;
6077 ScreenTimeout = 120;
6078 Inactivity_Timeout = INACTIVITYTIMEOUT;
6079 strcpy(TxName, Tn);
6080 Qnh = 1009;
6081 DeltaGMT = 0;
6082 BackGroundColour = 214;
6083 ForeGroundColour = White;
6084 SpecialColour = Red;
6085 HighlightColour = Yellow;
6086 SticksMode = 2;
6087 AudioVolume = 50;
6088 Brightness = 100;
6089 PlayFanfare = true;
6090 TrimClicks = true;
6091 ButtonClicks = true;
6092 SpeakingClock = true;
6093 AnnounceBanks = true;
6094 ResetSwitchNumbers();
6095 MinimumGap = 75;
6096 LogRXSwaps = true;
6097 UseLog = false;
6098 AnnounceConnected = true;
6099 ResetAllTrims();
6100 TxVoltageCorrection = 0;
6101 PowerOffWarningSeconds = DEFAULTPOWEROFFWARNING;
6102 LEDBrightness = DEFAULTLEDBRIGHTNESS;
6103 ConnectionAssessSeconds = 1;
6104 AutoModelSelect = true;
6105 MotorChannel = 15;
6106 MotorChannelZero = 0;
6107 SetDS1307ToCompilerTime();
6108 delay (250);
6109 SaveTransmitterParameters();
6110 SaveTransmitterParameters();
6111}
6112
6113/*********************************************************************************************************************************/
6114
6115void PointUp(){
6116 MoveCurrentPointUp();
6117}
6118/******************************************************************************************************************************/
6119
6120void PointDown(){
6121 MoveCurrentPointDown();
6122}
6123
6124/******************************************************************************************************************************/
6125
6126void CheckInvisiblePoint(){
6127 if (InterpolationTypes[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1] == EXPONENTIALCURVES) {
6128 if ((CurrentPoint == 2) || (CurrentPoint == 4)) ++CurrentPoint;
6129 }
6130}
6131
6132/******************************************************************************************************************************/
6133
6134void PointSelect(){
6135 ++CurrentPoint;
6136 if (CurrentPoint > 5) CurrentPoint = 1;
6137 CheckInvisiblePoint();
6138 DisplayCurve();
6139}
6140
6141/******************************************************************************************************************************/
6142
6143void ShowDualRateChannelsName(char* nm, uint8_t n){
6144 char nu[] = "Not used";
6145
6146 if (n) {SendText(nm, ChannelNames[n-1]);
6147 } else {SendText(nm, nu); } // not user if zero
6148}
6149
6150/******************************************************************************************************************************/
6151
6152void DisplayDualRateValues(){
6153 char rate1[] = "rate1";
6154 char rate2[] = "rate2";
6155 char rate3[] = "rate3";
6156 char ChName1[] = "t12";
6157 char ChName2[] = "t8";
6158 char ChName3[] = "t11";
6159 char ChName4[] = "t13";
6160 char ChName5[] = "t16";
6161 char ChName6[] = "t14";
6162 char ChName7[] = "t15";
6163 char ChName8[] = "t17";
6164 char ChNumber1[] = "n2";
6165 char ChNumber2[] = "n0";
6166 char ChNumber3[] = "n1";
6167 char ChNumber4[] = "n3";
6168 char ChNumber5[] = "n6";
6169 char ChNumber6[] = "n4";
6170 char ChNumber7[] = "n5";
6171 char ChNumber8[] = "n7";
6172
6173 SendValue(rate1,Drate1);
6174 SendValue(rate2,Drate2);
6175 SendValue(rate3,Drate3);
6176
6177 SendValue(ChNumber1, DualRateChannels[0]);
6178 SendValue(ChNumber2, DualRateChannels[1]);
6179 SendValue(ChNumber3, DualRateChannels[2]);
6180 SendValue(ChNumber4, DualRateChannels[3]);
6181 SendValue(ChNumber5, DualRateChannels[4]);
6182 SendValue(ChNumber6, DualRateChannels[5]);
6183 SendValue(ChNumber7, DualRateChannels[6]);
6184 SendValue(ChNumber8, DualRateChannels[7]);
6185
6186 ShowDualRateChannelsName(ChName1, DualRateChannels[0]);
6187 ShowDualRateChannelsName(ChName2, DualRateChannels[1]);
6188 ShowDualRateChannelsName(ChName3, DualRateChannels[2]);
6189 ShowDualRateChannelsName(ChName4, DualRateChannels[3]);
6190 ShowDualRateChannelsName(ChName5, DualRateChannels[4]);
6191 ShowDualRateChannelsName(ChName6, DualRateChannels[5]);
6192 ShowDualRateChannelsName(ChName7, DualRateChannels[6]);
6193 ShowDualRateChannelsName(ChName8, DualRateChannels[7]);
6194
6195}
6196
6197/******************************************************************************************************************************/
6198
6199void DualRatesStart(){
6200
6201 char GotoDualRates[] = "page DualRatesView";
6202
6203 SendCommand(GotoDualRates);
6204 CurrentView = DUALRATESVIEW;
6205 DisplayDualRateValues();
6206 UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere();
6207}
6208
6209/******************************************************************************************************************************/
6210
6211void ReadDualRatesValues(){
6212 char ProgressStart[] = "vis Progress,1";
6213 char ProgressEnd[] = "vis Progress,0";
6214 char Progress[] = "Progress";
6215 char rate2[] = "rate2";
6216 char rate3[] = "rate3";
6217 char rate1[] = "rate1";
6218 char ChNumber1[] = "n2";
6219 char ChNumber2[] = "n0";
6220 char ChNumber3[] = "n1";
6221 char ChNumber4[] = "n3";
6222 char ChNumber5[] = "n6";
6223 char ChNumber6[] = "n4";
6224 char ChNumber7[] = "n5";
6225 char ChNumber8[] = "n7";
6226 SendCommand(ProgressStart);
6227 SendValue(Progress, 10);
6228 Procrastinate(10);
6229 Drate1 = GetValue(rate1);
6230 if (Drate1 > MAXDUALRATE) Drate1 = MAXDUALRATE;
6231 Drate2 = GetValue(rate2);
6232 if (Drate2 > MAXDUALRATE) Drate2 = MAXDUALRATE;
6233 Drate3 = GetValue(rate3);
6234 if (Drate3 > MAXDUALRATE) Drate3 = MAXDUALRATE;
6235 SendValue(Progress, 50);
6236 Procrastinate(10);
6237 DualRateChannels[0] = CheckRange(GetValue(ChNumber1),0,8);
6238 DualRateChannels[1] = CheckRange(GetValue(ChNumber2),0,8);
6239 DualRateChannels[2] = CheckRange(GetValue(ChNumber3),0,8);
6240 SendValue(Progress, 60);
6241 Procrastinate(10);
6242 DualRateChannels[3] = CheckRange(GetValue(ChNumber4),0,8);
6243 DualRateChannels[4] = CheckRange(GetValue(ChNumber5),0,8);
6244 DualRateChannels[5] = CheckRange(GetValue(ChNumber6),0,8);
6245 SendValue(Progress, 75);
6246 Procrastinate(10);
6247 DualRateChannels[6] = CheckRange(GetValue(ChNumber7),0,8);
6248 DualRateChannels[7] = CheckRange(GetValue(ChNumber8),0,8);
6249 SendValue(Progress, 100);
6250 Procrastinate(10);
6251 SendCommand(ProgressEnd);
6252}
6253/******************************************************************************************************************************/
6254
6255void DualRatesEnd(){
6256 char GotoSticksView[] = "page SticksView";
6257 ReadDualRatesValues();
6258 SaveOneModel(ModelNumber);
6259 SendCommand(GotoSticksView);
6260 Force_ReDisplay();
6261 ShowServoPos();
6262 CurrentView = STICKSVIEW;
6263}
6264
6265
6266/******************************************************************************************************************************/
6267
6268void DualRatesRefresh(){
6269
6270 ReadDualRatesValues();
6271 DisplayDualRateValues();
6272}
6273
6274
6275// ******************************** Global Array of numbered function pointers - OK up to 127 functions ... **********************************
6276#define LASTFUNCTION 49 // one more than final one
6277
6278void (*NumberedFunctions[LASTFUNCTION])() {
6279 Blank, // 0 (spare)
6280 DecFileInView, // 1
6281 IncFileInView, // 2
6282 DoLastTimeRead, // 3
6283 GotoModelsView, // 4
6284 GotoMacrosView, // 5
6285 PopulateMacrosView, // 6
6286 ExitMacrosView, // 7
6287 ShowChannelName, // 8
6288 StartReverseView, // 9
6289 EndReverseView, // 10
6290 StartBuddyView, // 11
6291 EndBuddyView, // 12
6292 UpLog, // 13
6293 DownLog, // 14
6294 RefreshLog, // 15
6295 LogEND, // 16
6296 DelLOG, // 17
6297 LogVIEW, // 18
6298 SetupViewFM, // 19
6299 StartSubTrimView, // 20
6300 EndSubTrimView, // 21
6301 StartTrimDefView, // 22
6302 Options2End, // 23
6303 DefineTrimsEnd, // 24
6304 OptionView2Start, // 25
6305 OptionView3Start, // 26
6306 OptionView3End, // 27
6307 BuddyChViewStart, // 28
6308 BuddyChViewEnd, // 29
6309 RudderLeftTrim, // 30
6310 RudderRightTrim, // 31
6311 AileronRightTrim, // 32
6312 AileronLeftTrim, // 33
6313 ElevatorUpTrim, // 34
6314 ElevatorDownTrim, // 35
6315 ThrottleDownTrim, // 36
6316 ThrottleUpTrim, // 37
6317 OptionView4Start, // 38
6318 OptionView4End, // 39
6319 ResetTransmitterSettings, // 40
6320 BindNow, // 41
6321 PointUp, // 42
6322 PointDown, // 43
6323 PointSelect, // 44
6324 DualRatesStart, // 45
6325 DualRatesEnd, // 46
6326 DualRatesRefresh, // 47
6327 GotoFrontView // 48
6328
6329}; // list will become much longer ...
6330
6331/*********************************************************************************************************************************
6332 * BUTTON WAS PRESSED (DEAL WITH INPUT FROM NEXTION DISPLAY) *
6333 *********************************************************************************************************************************/
6334FASTRUN void ButtonWasPressed()
6335{
6336 if (strlen(TextIn) > 0) {
6337 StartInactvityTimeout();
6338
6339 ScreenTimeTimer = millis(); // reset screen timeout counter
6340 if (ScreenIsOff) {
6341 RestoreBrightness();
6342 ScreenIsOff = false;
6343 ClearText();
6344 return;
6345 }
6346
6347 union
6348 {
6349 uint8_t First4Bytes[4];
6350 uint32_t FirstDWord;
6351 } NextionCommand;
6352 NextionCommand.First4Bytes[0] = TextIn[0];
6353 NextionCommand.First4Bytes[1] = TextIn[1];
6354 NextionCommand.First4Bytes[2] = TextIn[2];
6355 NextionCommand.First4Bytes[3] = TextIn[3];
6356 uint32_t NumberedCommand = NextionCommand.FirstDWord - 128;
6357
6358#ifdef DB_NEXTION
6359 if (TextIn[0] < 128) {
6360 Serial.print("Command WORD: -> ");
6361 Serial.println(TextIn);
6362 }
6363 else {
6364 Serial.print("Command NUMBER: -> ");
6365 Look(NumberedCommand);
6366 }
6367#endif
6368
6369 if (TextIn[0] >= 128) { // (First byte != printable char) indicates a numbered command...
6370 if (NumberedCommand < LASTFUNCTION) { // ...so this system currently only permits 127 numbered functions to be supported.
6371 // But that's OK! Because only about 110 still need converting, after which
6372 // the restriction can be removed and the max will then be a full 32 bit value.
6373 // **********************************************************************************************************************************
6374 NumberedFunctions[NumberedCommand](); // Call the needed function -- with a function pointer *
6375 // **********************************************************************************************************************************
6376 b5isGrey = false;
6377 ClearText();
6378 return;
6379 }
6380 }
