6570
6571
6572 // ************************* test input words from Nextion *****************
6573
6574 if (InStrng(StCH, TextIn)) { // select sub trim channel
6575 SubTrimToEdit = GetValue(s0);
6576 SendText(t2, ChannelNames[SubTrimToEdit]);
6577 SendValue(n0, SubTrims[SubTrimToEdit] - 127);
6578 SendValue(h0, SubTrims[SubTrimToEdit]);
6579 ClearText();
6580 return;
6581 }
6582
6583 if (InStrng(StEDIT, TextIn)) { // edit sub trim value
6584 SubTrims[SubTrimToEdit] = GetValue(n0) + 127; // 127 is mid point in 8 bit value 0 - 254
6585 ClearText();
6586 return;
6587 }
6588
6589 if (InStrng(Delete, TextIn) > 0) {
6590 ModelNumber = GetValue(ModelsView_ModelNumber);
6591 SetDefaultValues();
6592 SaveOneModel(ModelNumber);
6593 ClearText();
6594 return;
6595 }
6596
6597 if (InStrng(AudioView, TextIn) > 0) { // Display screen with audio options
6598 CurrentMode = NORMAL;
6599 CurrentView = AUDIOVIEW;
6600 SendCommand(page_AudioView);
6601 SendValue(n0, AudioVolume);
6602 SendValue(Ex1, AudioVolume);
6603 SendValue(n1, Brightness);
6604 SendValue(h0, Brightness);
6605 SendValue(c0, PlayFanfare);
6606 SendValue(c1, TrimClicks);
6607 SendValue(c2, ButtonClicks);
6608 SendValue(c3, SpeakingClock);
6609 SendValue(c4, AnnounceBanks);
6610 SendValue(c5, AnnounceConnected);
6611 SetAudioVolume(AudioVolume);
6612 RestoreBrightness();
6613 ClearText();
6614 return;
6615 }
6616 if (InStrng(SetupAud, TextIn) > 0) { // Exit from screen with audio options
6617 CurrentMode = NORMAL;
6618 AudioVolume = GetValue(n0);
6619 if (AudioVolume < 5) AudioVolume = 5;
6620 Brightness = GetValue(n1);
6621 PlayFanfare = GetValue(c0);
6622 TrimClicks = GetValue(c1);
6623 ButtonClicks = GetValue(c2);
6624 SpeakingClock = GetValue(c3);
6625 AnnounceBanks = GetValue(c4);
6626 AnnounceConnected = GetValue(c5);
6627 RestoreBrightness();
6628 SetAudioVolume(AudioVolume);
6629 CurrentView = MAINSETUPVIEW;
6630 SendCommand(page_SetupView);
6631 LastTimeRead = 0;
6632 SaveTransmitterParameters();
6633 UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere();
6634 b5isGrey = false;
6635 ClearText();
6636 return;
6637 }
6638 if (InStrng(SetupView, TextIn) > 0) { // goto main setup screen
6639 if (CurrentView == FAILSAFE_VIEW) { // read failsafe blobs
6640 SendCommand(ProgressStart);
6641 for (int i = 0; i < 16; ++i) {
6642 FailSafeChannel[i] = GetValue(fs[i]);
6643 SendValue(Progress, i * (100 / 16));
6644 }
6645 SendCommand(ProgressEnd);
6646 }
6647 ClearText();
6648 SaveAllParameters();
6649 CurrentView = MAINSETUPVIEW;
6650 SendCommand(page_SetupView);
6651 LastTimeRead = 0;
6652 CurrentMode = NORMAL;
6653 CurrentView = MAINSETUPVIEW;
6654 b5isGrey = false;
6655 ClearText();
6656 UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere();
6657 return;
6658 }
6659 if (InStrng(Md1, TextIn) > 0) { // Mode 1 for trims
6660 SticksMode = 1;
6661 ClearText();
6662 return;
6663 }
6664 if (InStrng(Md2, TextIn) > 0) { // Mode 2 for trims
6665 SticksMode = 2;
6666 ClearText();
6667 return;
6668 }
6669 if (InStrng(Mark, TextIn) > 0) {
6670 GPSMarkHere = 255; // Mark this location
6671 GPSMaxDistance = 0;
6672 ClearText();
6673 return;
6674 }
6675 if (InStrng(UKRULES, TextIn) > 0) { // UK Offcom regulations?
6676 ++UkRulesCounter;
6677 if (UkRulesCounter == 1) SwapWaveBandTimer = millis();
6678 if (UkRulesCounter == 3) {
6679 if ((millis() - SwapWaveBandTimer) < 5000) { // pressed three times in under 5 seconds?!
6680 if (!UkRules) {
6681 SwapWaveBand = 1;
6682 UkRules = true;
6683 SendText(b17, Htext1);
6684 }
6685 else {
6686 SwapWaveBand = 2;
6687 UkRules = false;
6688 SendText(b17, Htext0);
6689 }
6690 }
6691 UkRulesCounter = 0;
6692 }
6693 ClearText();
6694 return;
6695 }
6696 if (InStrng(OptionsEnd, TextIn) > 0) { // Exit from Options screen
6697 SendCommand(ProgressStart);
6698 SendValue(Progress, 10);
6699 GetText(TxNme, TxName);
6700 SendValue(Progress, 20);
6701 GetText(RxName, ModelName);
6702 SendValue(Progress, 30);
6703 Qnh = (uint16_t)GetValue(QNH);
6704 SendValue(Progress, 40);
6705 TrimFactor = GetValue(trf);
6706 SendValue(Progress, 50);
6707 LowBattery = GetValue(Bwn);
6708 SendValue(Progress, 60);
6709 ScreenTimeout = GetValue(ScreenViewTimeout);
6710 SendValue(Progress, 70);
6711 CopyTrimsToAll = GetValue(c0);
6712 SendValue(Progress, 80);
6713 Inactivity_Timeout = GetValue(Pto) * TICKSPERMINUTE;
6714 if (Inactivity_Timeout < INACTIVITYMINIMUM) Inactivity_Timeout = INACTIVITYMINIMUM;
6715 if (Inactivity_Timeout > INACTIVITYMAXIMUM) Inactivity_Timeout = INACTIVITYMAXIMUM;
6716 SendValue(Progress, 90);
6717 FixDeltaGMTSign();
6718 if (BuddyPupilOnSbus)
6719 {
6720 Connected = false;
6721 LostContactFlag = true;
6722 PacketsPerSecond = 0;
6723 RangeTestGoodPackets = 0;
6724 BlueLedOn();
6725 }
6726 SaveAllParameters();
6727 SendValue(Progress, 95);
6728 SendValue(Progress, 100);
6729 CurrentView = MAINSETUPVIEW;
6730 SendCommand(page_SetupView);
6731 LastTimeRead = 0;
6732 CurrentMode = NORMAL;
6733 b5isGrey = false;
6734 SendCommand(ProgressEnd);
6735 LedWasGreen = false;
6736 UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere();
6737 ClearText();
6738 return;
6739 }
6740
6741 if (InStrng(DataEnd, TextIn) > 0) { // Exit from Data screen
6742 CurrentView = MAINSETUPVIEW;
6743 b5isGrey = false;
6744 CurrentMode = NORMAL;
6745 UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere();
6746 ClearText();
6747 return;
6748 }
6749 if (InStrng(DataView_Clear, TextIn) > 0) { // Clear Data screen
6750 ZeroDataScreen();
6751 ClearText();
6752 return;
6753 }
6754 if (InStrng(DataView_AltZero, TextIn) > 0) { // Set zero altitude on data screen
6755 if (!GroundModelAltitude) {
6756 GroundModelAltitude = RXModelAltitude;
6757 }
6758 else {
6759 GroundModelAltitude = 0;
6760 }
6761 if (!GPSGroundAltitude) {
6762 GPSGroundAltitude = GPSAltitude;
6763 }
6764 else {
6765 GPSGroundAltitude = 0;
6766 }
6767 GPSMaxAltitude = 0;
6768 RXMAXModelAltitude = 0;
6769 ClearText();
6770 return;
6771 }
6772
6773
6774 if (InStrng(Scan_End, TextIn) > 0) { // goto setup screen from Scan screen
6775 CurrentView = MAINSETUPVIEW;
6776 b5isGrey = false;
6777 SendCommand(page_SetupView);
6778 LastTimeRead = 0;
6779 DoScanEnd();
6780 UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere();
6781 ClearText();
6782 return;
6783 }
6784
6785 if (InStrng(HelpView, TextIn) > 0) { // Display Help screen(s)
6786 SavedCurrentView = CurrentView;
6787 CurrentView = HELP_VIEW;
6788 SendHelp();
6789 ClearText();
6790 return;
6791 }
6792 if (InStrng(Dec_Minute, TextIn) > 0) {
6793 DecMinute();
6794 ClearText();
6795 return;
6796 }
6797 if (InStrng(AddMinute, TextIn) > 0) {
6798 IncMinute();
6799 ClearText();
6800 return;
6801 }
6802
6803 if (InStrng(Dec_Hour, TextIn) > 0) {
6804 DecHour();
6805 ClearText();
6806 return;
6807 }
6808 if (InStrng(Inc_Hour, TextIn) > 0) {
6809 IncHour();
6810 ClearText();
6811 return;
6812 }
6813
6814 if (InStrng(Dec_Year, TextIn) > 0) {
6815 DecYear();
6816 ClearText();
6817 return;
6818 }
6819 if (InStrng(Inc_Year, TextIn) > 0) {
6820 IncYear();
6821 ClearText();
6822 return;
6823 }
6824
6825 if (InStrng(Dec_Date, TextIn) > 0) {
6826 DecDate();
6827 ClearText();
6828 return;
6829 }
6830 if (InStrng(Inc_Date, TextIn) > 0) {
6831 IncDate();
6832 ClearText();
6833 return;
6834 }
6835
6836 if (InStrng(Dec_Month, TextIn) > 0) {
6837 DecMonth();
6838 ClearText();
6839 return;
6840 }
6841 if (InStrng(Inc_Month, TextIn) > 0) {
6842 IncMonth();
6843 ClearText();
6844 return;
6845 }
6846
6847 if (InStrng(OptionsViewS, TextIn) > 0) {
6848 FixDeltaGMTSign();
6849 if (CurrentView == OPTIONVIEW2) DeltaGMT = GetValue(dGMT);
6850 SendCommand(pOptionsViewS);
6851 SendValue(ScreenViewTimeout, ScreenTimeout);
6852 SendValue(Pto, (Inactivity_Timeout / TICKSPERMINUTE));
6853 SendText(Tx_Name, TxName);
6854 SendValue(QNH, Qnh);
6855 SendText(RxName, ModelName);
6856 SendValue(trf, TrimFactor);
6857 SendValue(Bwn, LowBattery);
6858 SendValue(c0, CopyTrimsToAll);
6859 CurrentView = OPTIONS_VIEW;
6860 CurrentMode = NORMAL;
6861 ClearText();
6862 return;
6863 }
6864 if (InStrng(GOTO, TextIn) > 0) { // Return from Help screen returns here to relevent config screen
6865 i = 5;
6866 while (uint8_t(TextIn[i]) && i < 30) {
6867 WhichPage[i] = TextIn[i];
6868 ++i;
6869 WhichPage[i] = 0;
6870 } // Get page name to which to return
6871 SendCommand(WhichPage); // this sends nextion back to last screen
6872 CurrentView = SavedCurrentView;
6873
6874 if (CurrentView == GRAPHVIEW) {
6875 DisplayCurveAndServoPos();
6876 SendValue(CopyToAllBanks, 0);
6877 }
6878 if (CurrentView == SWITCHES_VIEW) {
6879 UpdateSwitchesDisplay();
6880 }
6881 if (CurrentView == ONE_SWITCH_VIEW) {
6882 updateOneSwitchView();
6883 }
6884 if (CurrentView == MODELSVIEW) {
6885 SendValue(ModelsView_ModelNumber, ModelNumber);
6886 }
6887 if (CurrentView == MIXESVIEW) {
6888 if (MixNumber == 0) MixNumber = 1;
6889 LastMixNumber = 33; // just to be differernt
6890 SendValue(MixesView_MixNumber, MixNumber); // New load of mix window
6891 SendMixValues();
6892 }
6893 if (CurrentView == FILESVIEW) {
6894 ShowDirectory();
6895 }
6896 if (CurrentView == MACROS_VIEW) {
6897 // Do nothing!
6898 }
6899 if (CurrentView == CALIBRATEVIEW) {
6900 Force_ReDisplay();
6901 ShowServoPos();
6902 }
6903 if (CurrentView == REVERSEVIEW) {
6904 StartReverseView();
6905 }
6906 if ((CurrentView == STICKSVIEW) || (CurrentView == FRONTVIEW)) {
6907 Force_ReDisplay();
6908 ShowServoPos();
6909 if (CurrentView == FRONTVIEW) {
6910 SendValue(FrontView_Secs, Secs);
6911 SendValue(FrontView_Mins, Mins);
6912 SendValue(FrontView_Hours, Hours);
6913 }
6914 }
6915 if (CurrentView == LOGVIEW) {
6916
6917 SendCommand(pLogView);
6918 CurrentView = LOGVIEW;
6919 RecentStartLine = 0;
6920 if (UseLog) ShowLogFile(RecentStartLine);
6921 }
6922 UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere();
6923 ClearText();
6924 return;
6925 }
6926
6927 if (InStrng(Exrite, TextIn) > 0) { // *******************
6928 if (GetValue(ExpR)) {
6929 InterpolationTypes[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1] = EXPONENTIALCURVES;
6930 }
6931 if (GetValue(Smooth)) {
6932 InterpolationTypes[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1] = SMOOTHEDCURVES;
6933 }
6934 if (GetValue(Lines)) {
6935 InterpolationTypes[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1] = STRAIGHTLINES;
6936 }
6937 Exponential[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1] = GetValue(Expo) + 50; // Note: Getting this value from slider was not reliable (could not return 36!)
6938 ClearText();
6939 DisplayCurveAndServoPos();
6940 return;
6941 }
6942 if (InStrng(ReceiveModel, TextIn) > 0) {
6943 i = strlen(ReceiveModel);
6944 j = 0;
6945 while (uint8_t(TextIn[i] && i < 100) > 0) {
6946 SingleModelFile[j] = TextIn[i];
6947 ++j;
6948 ++i;
6949 SingleModelFile[j] = 0;
6950 } // got local name but won't use it.....
6951 ReceiveModelFile();
6952 ClearText();
6953 return;
6954 }
6955 if (InStrng(PowerOff, TextIn) > 0) { // power off button up no longer turns off!
6956 PowerOffTimer = 0;
6957 ClearText();
6958 return;
6959 }
6960
6961 if (InStrng(OffNow, TextIn) > 0) { // redundant
6962 if (UseLog) LogPowerOff();
6963 SaveAllParameters();
6964 delay(250);
6965 digitalWrite(POWER_OFF_PIN, HIGH); // force OFF in Options View
6966 ClearText();
6967 return;
6968 }
6969
6970 if (InStrng(SendModel, TextIn) > 0) {
6971 i = strlen(SendModel);
6972 j = 0;
6973 while (uint8_t(TextIn[i]) > 0) {
6974 SingleModelFile[j] = TextIn[i];
6975 ++j;
6976 ++i;
6977 SingleModelFile[j] = 0;
6978 }
6979 SendModelFile();
6980 ClearText();
6981 return;
6982 }
6983 if (InStrng(FailSAVE, TextIn) > 0) {
6984 SendCommand(ProgressStart);
6985 for (int i = 0; i < 16; ++i) {
6986 FailSafeChannel[i] = GetValue(fs[i]);
6987 SendValue(Progress, i * (100 / 16));
6988 }
6989 SendValue(Progress, 100);
6990 SaveOneModel(ModelNumber);
6991 FailSafeTimer = millis();
6992 SaveFailSafeNow = true;
6993 ClearText();
6994 return;
6995 }
6996 if (InStrng(FailSafe, TextIn) > 0) {
6997 SendCommand(pFailSafe);
6998 CurrentView = FAILSAFE_VIEW;
6999 UpdateButtonLabels();
7000 UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere();
7001 ClearText();
7002 return;
7003 }
7004
7005 if (InStrng(OneSwitchView, TextIn) > 0) {
7006 SwitchEditNumber = GetChannel(); // which switch?
7007 CurrentView = ONE_SWITCH_VIEW;
7008 SendCommand(PageOneSwitchView); // edit one switch - could be 1-4
7009 updateOneSwitchView();
7010 UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere();
7011 ClearText();
7012 return;
7013 }
7014
7015 if (InStrng(SwitchesView1, TextIn) > 0) { // read switch values from screen (could be 1-4)
7016 ReadNewSwitchFunction();
7017 }
7018
7019
7020 if (InStrng(InputsView, TextIn) > 0) {
7021 SendCommand(pInputsView);
7022 CurrentView = INPUTS_VIEW;
7023 UpdateButtonLabels();
7024 UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere();
7025 ClearText();
7026 return;
7027 }
7028
7029 if (InStrng(InputsDone, TextIn) > 0) {
7030 SendCommand(ProgressStart);
7031 for (int i = 0; i < 16; ++i) {
7032 InPutStick[i] = CheckRange((GetValue(InputStick_Labels[i]) - 1), 0, 15);
7033 if (i < 4) InputTrim[i] = CheckRange((GetValue(InputTrim_labels[i]) - 1), 0, 3);
7034 SendValue(Progress, i * (100 / 16));
7035 }
7036 SendValue(Progress, 99);
7037 SaveOneModel(ModelNumber);
7038 SendValue(Progress, 100);
7039 CurrentMode = NORMAL;
7040 SendCommand(ProgressEnd);
7041 UpdateButtonLabels();
7042 CurrentView = MAINSETUPVIEW;
7043 SendCommand(page_SetupView);
7044 b5isGrey = false;
7045 LastTimeRead = 0;
7046 ClearText();
7047 return;
7048 }
7049 if (InStrng(CH1NAME, TextIn) > 0) {
7050 p = InStrng(CH1NAME, TextIn);
7051 i = p + 7;
7052 DoNewChannelName(1, i);
7053 ClearText();
7054 return;
7055 }
7056 if (InStrng(CH2NAME, TextIn) > 0) {
7057 p = InStrng(CH2NAME, TextIn);
7058 i = p + 7;
7059 DoNewChannelName(2, i);
7060 ClearText();
7061 return;
7062 }
7063 if (InStrng(CH3NAME, TextIn) > 0) {
7064 p = InStrng(CH3NAME, TextIn);
7065 i = p + 7;
7066 DoNewChannelName(3, i);
7067 ClearText();
7068 return;
7069 }
7070 if (InStrng(CH4NAME, TextIn) > 0) {
7071 p = InStrng(CH4NAME, TextIn);
7072 i = p + 7;
7073 DoNewChannelName(4, i);
7074 ClearText();
7075 return;
7076 }
7077 if (InStrng(CH5NAME, TextIn) > 0) {
7078 p = InStrng(CH5NAME, TextIn);
7079 i = p + 7;
7080 DoNewChannelName(5, i);
7081 ClearText();
7082 return;
7083 }
7084 if (InStrng(CH6NAME, TextIn) > 0) {
7085 p = InStrng(CH6NAME, TextIn);
7086 i = p + 7;
7087 DoNewChannelName(6, i);
7088 ClearText();
7089 return;
7090 }
7091 if (InStrng(CH7NAME, TextIn) > 0) {
7092 p = InStrng(CH7NAME, TextIn);
7093 i = p + 7;
7094 DoNewChannelName(7, i);
7095 ClearText();
7096 return;
7097 }
7098 if (InStrng(CH8NAME, TextIn) > 0) {
7099 p = InStrng(CH8NAME, TextIn);
7100 i = p + 7;
7101 DoNewChannelName(8, i);
7102 ClearText();
7103 return;
7104 }
7105 if (InStrng(CH9NAME, TextIn) > 0) {
7106 p = InStrng(CH9NAME, TextIn);
7107 i = p + 7;
7108 DoNewChannelName(9, i);
7109 ClearText();
7110 return;
7111 }
7112 if (InStrng(CH10NAME, TextIn) > 0) {
7113 p = InStrng(CH10NAME, TextIn);
7114 i = p + 8;
7115 DoNewChannelName(10, i);
7116 ClearText();
7117 return;
7118 }
7119 if (InStrng(CH11NAME, TextIn) > 0) {
7120 p = InStrng(CH11NAME, TextIn);
7121 i = p + 8;
7122 DoNewChannelName(11, i);
7123 ClearText();
7124 return;
7125 }
7126 if (InStrng(CH12NAME, TextIn) > 0) {
7127 p = InStrng(CH12NAME, TextIn);
7128 i = p + 8;
7129 DoNewChannelName(12, i);
7130 ClearText();
7131 return;
7132 }
7133 if (InStrng(CH13NAME, TextIn) > 0) {
7134 p = InStrng(CH13NAME, TextIn);
7135 i = p + 8;
7136 DoNewChannelName(13, i);
7137 ClearText();
7138 return;
7139 }
7140 if (InStrng(CH14NAME, TextIn) > 0) {
7141 p = InStrng(CH14NAME, TextIn);
7142 i = p + 8;
7143 DoNewChannelName(14, i);
7144 ClearText();
7145 return;
7146 }
7147 if (InStrng(CH15NAME, TextIn) > 0) {
7148 p = InStrng(CH15NAME, TextIn);
7149 i = p + 8;
7150 DoNewChannelName(15, i);
7151 ClearText();
7152 return;
7153 }
7154 if (InStrng(CH16NAME, TextIn) > 0) {
7155 p = InStrng(CH16NAME, TextIn);
7156 i = p + 8;
7157 DoNewChannelName(16, i);
7158 ClearText();
7159 return;
7160 }
7161
7162 if (InStrng(DelFile, TextIn) > 0) { // Delete a file
7163 j = 0;
7164 p = InStrng(DelFile, TextIn);
7165 i = p + 6;
7166 while (uint8_t(TextIn[i]) > 0) {
7167 SingleModelFile[j] = TextIn[i];
7168 ++j;
7169 ++i;
7170 SingleModelFile[j] = 0;
7171 }
7172 SD.remove(SingleModelFile);
7173 BuildDirectory();
7174 --FileNumberInView;
7175 ShowFileNumber();
7176 CloseModelsFile();
7177 ClearText();
7178 return;
7179 }
7180
7181 if (InStrng(SwitchesView, TextIn)) {
7182 SendCommand(pSwitchesView);
7183 UpdateSwitchesDisplay(); // display saved values
7184 CurrentView = SWITCHES_VIEW;
7185 UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere();
7186 ClearText();
7187 return;
7188 }
7189
7190 if (InStrng(CalibrateView, TextIn)) {
7191 SendCommand(pCalibrateView);
7192 Force_ReDisplay();
7193 CurrentView = CALIBRATEVIEW;
7194 ClearText();
7195 return;
7196 }
7197
7198 p = InStrng(Export, TextIn);
7199 if (p > 0) {
7200 j = 0;
7201 i = p + 5;
7202 while ((TextIn[i] > 0) && (i < 18)) {
7203 if (TextIn[i] >= 97 && TextIn[i] <= 122) {
7204 TextIn[i] &= ~0x20; // upper case only
7205 }
7206 SingleModelFile[j] = TextIn[i];
7207 ++j;
7208 ++i;
7209 SingleModelFile[j] = 0;
7210 }
7211
7212 if ((InStrng(ModExt, SingleModelFile) == 0) && (strlen(SingleModelFile) <= 8)) {
7213 strcat(SingleModelFile, ModExt);
7214 }
7215 if ((strlen(SingleModelFile) <= 12) && (InStrng(ModExt, SingleModelFile) > 0))
7216 {
7217 SendText(ModelsView_filename, SingleModelFile);
7218 SendCommand(ProgressStart);
7219 for (uint8_t WriteTwice = 1; WriteTwice <= 3; ++WriteTwice) { // Write many times is needed. Once does't work ... no idea why!
7220 SingleModelFlag = true;
7221 SaveOneModel(1);
7222 SendValue(Progress, WriteTwice * 15);
7223 }
7224 SingleModelFlag = false;
7225 SendValue(Progress, 80);
7226 BuildDirectory();
7227 SendValue(Progress, 100);
7228 Procrastinate(300);
7229 SendCommand(ProgressEnd);
7230 }
7231 else {
7232 FileError = true;
7233 }
7234 if (FileError) ShowFileErrorMsg();
7235 ClearText();
7236 return;
7237 }
7238 p = InStrng(Import, TextIn);
7239 if (p > 0) {
7240 SendCommand(ProgressStart);
7241 Procrastinate(10);
7242 SendValue(Progress, 5);
7243 Procrastinate(10);
7244 j = 0;
7245 i = p + 5;
7246 while (TextIn[i] > 0) {
7247 if (TextIn[i] >= 97 && TextIn[i] <= 122) {
7248 TextIn[i] &= ~0x20;
7249 }
7250 SingleModelFile[j] = TextIn[i];
7251 ++j;
7252 ++i;
7253 SingleModelFile[j] = 0;
7254 }
7255 if (InStrng(ModExt, SingleModelFile) == 0) strcat(SingleModelFile, ModExt);
7256 SingleModelFlag = true;
7257 SendValue(Progress, 10);
7258 Procrastinate(10);
7259 CloseModelsFile();
7260 ReadOneModel(1);
7261 SendValue(Progress, 50);
7262 Procrastinate(10);
7263 SingleModelFlag = false;
7264 CloseModelsFile();
7265 SendValue(Progress, 75);
7266 Procrastinate(10);
7267 SaveAllParameters();
7268 CloseModelsFile();
7269 UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere();
7270 SendValue(Progress, 100);
7271 Procrastinate(10);
7272 SendCommand(ProgressEnd);
7273 if (FileError) ShowFileErrorMsg();
7274 ClearText();
7275 return;
7276 }
7277 if (InStrng(ListFiles, TextIn) > 0) {
7278 SendCommand(PageFilesView);
7279 CurrentView = FILESVIEW; // Can't change this until I can change it back! :-)
7280 SavedCurrentView = FILESVIEW;
7281 ShowDirectory();
7282 ClearText();
7283 return;
7284 }
7285
7286 if (InStrng(GoSetupView, TextIn) > 0) {
7287 CurrentView = MAINSETUPVIEW;
7288 SendCommand(page_SetupView);
7289 b5isGrey = false;
7290 UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere();
7291 ClearText();
7292 return;
7293 }
7294
7295 if (InStrng(ColoursView, TextIn) > 0) {
7296 CurrentView = COLOURS_VIEW;
7297 SendCommand(page_ColoursView);
7298 SendCommand(StartBackGround);
7299 ClearText();
7300 return;
7301 }
7302
7303 if (InStrng(SetupCol, TextIn) > 0) { // This is the return from Colours setup
7304 HighlightColour = GetOtherValue(High_pco);
7305 ForeGroundColour = GetOtherValue(b0_pco);
7306 BackGroundColour = GetOtherValue(b0_bco);
7307 SpecialColour = GetOtherValue(Fm_pco);
7308 SendValue(FrontView_BackGround, BackGroundColour);
7309 SendValue(FrontView_ForeGround, ForeGroundColour);
7310 SendValue(FrontView_Special, SpecialColour);
7311 SendValue(FrontView_Highlight, HighlightColour);
7312 SaveTransmitterParameters();
7313 CurrentView = MAINSETUPVIEW;
7314 b5isGrey = false;
7315 SendCommand(page_SetupView);
7316 LastTimeRead = 0;
7317 UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere();
7318 ClearText();
7319 return;
7320 }
7321
7322 if (InStrng(TypeView, TextIn) > 0) {
7323 SendCommand(pTypeView);
7324 SendValue(r2s, 0); // Zero all RX batt cell count
7325 SendValue(r3s, 0);
7326 SendValue(r4s, 0);
7327 SendValue(r5s, 0);
7328 SendValue(r6s, 0);
7329 SendValue(r12s, 0);
7330 SendValue(r0, 0);
7331 SendValue(r1, 0);
7332 if (RXCellCount == 2) SendValue(r2s, 1); // Then update RX batt cell count
7333 if (RXCellCount == 3) SendValue(r3s, 1);
7334 if (RXCellCount == 4) SendValue(r4s, 1);
7335 if (RXCellCount == 5) SendValue(r5s, 1);
7336 if (RXCellCount == 6) SendValue(r6s, 1);
7337 if (RXCellCount == 12) SendValue(r12s, 1);
7338 if (TXLiPo) SendValue(r1, 1); else
7339 SendValue(r0, 1);
7340
7341 ClearText();
7342 UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere();
7343 return;
7344 }
7345
7346 if (InStrng(RXBAT, TextIn) > 0) { // UPdate RX batt cell count
7347 if (GetValue(r2s) == 1) RXCellCount = 2;
7348 if (GetValue(r3s) == 1) RXCellCount = 3;
7349 if (GetValue(r4s) == 1) RXCellCount = 4;
7350 if (GetValue(r5s) == 1) RXCellCount = 5;
7351 if (GetValue(r6s) == 1) RXCellCount = 6;
7352 if (GetValue(r12s) == 1) RXCellCount = 12;
7353 if (GetValue(r0) == 1) TXLiPo = false; // TX LIFE
7354 if (GetValue(r1) == 1) TXLiPo = true; // TX LIPO
7355 SaveAllParameters();
7356 ClearText();
7357 return;
7358 }
7359
7360 if (InStrng(TrimView, TextIn) > 0) { // TrimView just appeared, so update it.
7361 SendCommand(pTrimView);
7362 CurrentView = TRIM_VIEW;
7363 UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere(); // also updates trimview (If CurrentView == TRIM_VIEW!! :-)
7364 if (!UkRules) {
7365 SendText(b17, Htext0);
7366 }
7367 else {
7368 SendText(b17, Htext1);
7369 }
7370 ClearText();
7371 return;
7372 }
7373 if (InStrng(RTRIM, TextIn) > 0) {
7374 TrimsReversed[Bank][0] = GetValue(TrimView_r1);
7375 TrimsReversed[Bank][1] = GetValue(TrimView_r4);
7376 TrimsReversed[Bank][2] = GetValue(TrimView_r2);
7377 TrimsReversed[Bank][3] = GetValue(TrimView_r3);
7378 if (CopyTrimsToAll) {
7379 for (j = 0; j < 4; ++j) {
7380 for (i = 1; i < 5; ++i) {
7381 TrimsReversed[i][j] = TrimsReversed[Bank][j];
7382 }
7383 }
7384 }
7385 ClearText();
7386 return;
7387 }
7388 if (InStrng(TRIMS50, TextIn) > 0) {
7389 for (i = 0; i < 4; ++i) {
7390 Trims[Bank][i] = 80; // Mid value is 80
7391 if (CopyTrimsToAll) {
7392 for (i = 0; i < 4; ++i) {
7393 for (int fm = 1; fm < 5; ++fm) {
7394 Trims[fm][i] = 80;
7395 TrimsReversed[fm][i] = TrimsReversed[Bank][i];
7396 }
7397 }
7398 }
7399 }
7400 ClearText();
7401 return;
7402 }
7403
7404 if (InStrng(Trim, TextIn) > 0) { // This is the return from Trim view
7405 if (GetValue(Mode1) == 1) SticksMode = 1;
7406 if (GetValue(Mode2) == 1) SticksMode = 2;
7407 SaveAllParameters(); // save trims to SDcard
7408 b5isGrey = false;
7409 CurrentView = MAINSETUPVIEW;
7410 SendCommand(page_SetupView);
7411 LastTimeRead = 0;
7412 CurrentMode = NORMAL;
7413 UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere();
7414 ClearText();
7415 return;
7416 }
7417
7418 if (InStrng(Write, TextIn) > 0) { // write new data to SD
7419 p = GetValue(CopyToAllBanks);
7420 if (p == 1) {
7421 for (p = 1; p <= 4; ++p) {
7422 if (p != Bank) {
7423 MinDegrees[p][ChanneltoSet - 1] = MinDegrees[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1];
7424 MidLowDegrees[p][ChanneltoSet - 1] = MidLowDegrees[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1];
7425 CentreDegrees[p][ChanneltoSet - 1] = CentreDegrees[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1];
7426 MidHiDegrees[p][ChanneltoSet - 1] = MidHiDegrees[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1];
7427 MaxDegrees[p][ChanneltoSet - 1] = MaxDegrees[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1];
7428 InterpolationTypes[p][ChanneltoSet - 1] = InterpolationTypes[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1];
7429 Exponential[p][ChanneltoSet - 1] = Exponential[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1];
7430 }
7431 }
7432 }
7433 ChanneltoSet = 0;
7434 SaveOneModel(ModelNumber);
7435 Force_ReDisplay();
7436 SendCommand(page_SticksView); // Set to SticksView
7437 CurrentView = STICKSVIEW;
7438 UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere();
7439 ClearText();
7440 return;
7441 }
7442
7443 if (InStrng(Setup, TextIn) > 0) { // Which channel to setup ... Goes to GraphView
7444 ChanneltoSet = GetChannel();
7445 CurrentView = GRAPHVIEW;
7446 SendCommand(page_GraphView); // Set to GraphView
7447 DisplayCurve();
7448 updateInterpolationTypes();
7449 UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere();
7450 SendValue(CopyToAllBanks, 0);
7451 ClearText();
7452 return;
7453 }
7454
7455 if (InStrng(Front_View, TextIn)) {
7456 CurrentView = FRONTVIEW;
7457 ClearText();
7458 PreviousBank = 250; // sure to be different
7459 CurrentMode = NORMAL;
7460 UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere();
7461 ClearText();
7462 return;
7463 }
7464
7465 if (InStrng(Sticks_View, TextIn)) {
7466 SendCommand(page_SticksView);
7467 Force_ReDisplay();
7468 CurrentView = STICKSVIEW;
7469 SendCommand(page_SticksView); // Set to SticksView
7470 UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere();
7471 UpdateButtonLabels();
7472 ClearText();
7473 return;
7474 }
7475
7476 if (InStrng(Fhss_View, TextIn)) {
7477 if (!b5isGrey) // no scan while connected!!!
7478 {
7479 SendCommand(page_FhssView);
7480 DrawFhssBox();
7481 DoScanInit();
7482 CurrentMode = SCANWAVEBAND;
7483 CurrentView = SCANVIEW;
7484 BlueLedOn();
7485 }
7486 ClearText();
7487 return;
7488 }
7489
7490 if (InStrng(ReScan, TextIn))
7491 {
7492 DrawFhssBox();
7493 DoScanInit();
7494 ClearText();
7495 return;
7496 }
7497
7498 if (InStrng(MIXES_VIEW, TextIn)) {
7499 SendCommand(pMixesView);
7500 CurrentView = MIXESVIEW;
7501 UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere();
7502 if (MixNumber == 0) MixNumber = 1;
7503 LastMixNumber = 33; // just to be differernt
7504 SendValue(MixesView_MixNumber, MixNumber); // New load of mix window
7505 SendMixValues();
7506 ClearText();
7507 return;
7508 }
7509
7510 if (InStrng(Mixes_View, TextIn)) {
7511 CurrentView = MIXESVIEW;
7512 Procrastinate(100); // allow screen changes to appear
7513 UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere();
7514 MixNumber = GetValue(MixesView_MixNumber);
7515 if (LastMixNumber != MixNumber) { // Did it change?
7516 LastMixNumber = MixNumber;
7517 SendMixValues();
7518 }
7519 else {
7520 Mixes[MixNumber][M_Enabled] = GetValue(MixesView_Enabled);
7521 Mixes[MixNumber][M_Bank] = GetValue(MixesView_Bank);
7522 Mixes[MixNumber][M_MasterChannel] = GetValue(MixesView_MasterChannel);
7523 Mixes[MixNumber][M_SlaveChannel] = GetValue(MixesView_SlaveChannel);
7524 Mixes[MixNumber][M_Reversed] = GetValue(MixesView_Reversed);
7525 Mixes[MixNumber][M_Percent] = GetValue(MixesView_Percent);
7526 SendText(MixesView_chM, ChannelNames[Mixes[MixNumber][M_MasterChannel] - 1]);
7527 SendText(MixesView_chS, ChannelNames[Mixes[MixNumber][M_SlaveChannel] - 1]);
7528 }
7529 ClearText();
7530 return;
7531 }
7532
7533 if (InStrng(Graph_View, TextIn))
7534 {
7535 CurrentView = GRAPHVIEW;
7536 ClearText();
7537 return;
7538 }
7539
7540 if (InStrng(Data_View, TextIn))
7541 {
7542 CurrentMode = NORMAL;
7543 CurrentView = DATAVIEW;
7544 LastShowTime = 0;
7545 SendCommand(pDataView);
7546 ClearText();
7547 return;
7548 }
7549
7550 if (InStrng(FM1, TextIn))
7551 {
7552 Bank = 1;
7553 PreviousBank = 1;
7554 UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere();
7555 ClearText();
7556 return;
7557 }
7558
7559 if (InStrng(FM2, TextIn))
7560 {
7561 Bank = 2;
7562 PreviousBank = 2;
7563 UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere();
7564 ClearText();
7565 return;
7566 }
7567
7568 if (InStrng(FM3, TextIn))
7569 {
7570 Bank = 3;
7571 PreviousBank = 3;
7572 UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere();
7573 ClearText();
7574 return;
7575 }
7576
7577 if (InStrng(FM4, TextIn))
7578 {
7579 Bank = 4;
7580 PreviousBank = 4;
7581 UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere();
7582 ClearText();
7583 return;
7584 }
7585
7586
7587 if (InStrng(Reset, TextIn)) // Now zeros EXPO only
7588 {
7589 // MinDegrees[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1] = 30;
7590 // MidLowDegrees[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1] = 60;
7591 // CentreDegrees[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1] = 90;
7592 // MidHiDegrees[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1] = 120;
7593 // MaxDegrees[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1] = 150;
7594
7595 Exponential[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1] = DEFAULT_EXPO;
7596 InterpolationTypes[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1] = EXPONENTIALCURVES; // expo = default
7597 DisplayCurveAndServoPos();
7598 return;
7599 }
7600
7601 if (InStrng(Reverse, TextIn)) // REVERSE always reverses ALL FLIGHT MODES
7602 {
7603 for (int i = 1; i <= 4;++i){
7604 p = MinDegrees[i][ChanneltoSet - 1];
7605 MinDegrees[i][ChanneltoSet - 1] = 180 - p;
7606 p = MidLowDegrees[i][ChanneltoSet - 1];
7607 MidLowDegrees[i][ChanneltoSet - 1] = 180 - p;
7608 p = CentreDegrees[i][ChanneltoSet - 1];
7609 CentreDegrees[i][ChanneltoSet - 1] = 180 - p;
7610 p = MidHiDegrees[i][ChanneltoSet - 1];
7611 MidHiDegrees[i][ChanneltoSet - 1] = 180 - p;
7612 p = MaxDegrees[i][ChanneltoSet - 1];
7613 MaxDegrees[i][ChanneltoSet - 1] = 180 - p;
7614 }
7615 DisplayCurveAndServoPos();
7616 ClearText();
7617 return;
7618 }
7619 p = (InStrng(ClickX, TextIn)); // Clicked to move point?
7620 if (p > 0) {
7621 XtouchPlace = GetNextNumber(p + 7, TextIn);
7622 // This drops through to get Y as well before moving the point
7623 }
7624 p = (InStrng(ClickY, TextIn)); // Clicked to move point?
7625 if (p > 0) {
7626 YtouchPlace = GetNextNumber(p + 7, TextIn);
7627 MovePoint();
7628 DisplayCurveAndServoPos();
7629 return;
7630 }
7631 if (CurrentMode == NORMAL) {
7632 if (strcmp(TextIn, "Calibrate1") == 0) {
7633 ResetSwitchNumbers();
7634 SaveTransmitterParameters();
7635 ReduceLimits(); // Get setup for sticks calibration
7636 CurrentMode = CALIBRATELIMITS;
7637 CurrentView = CALIBRATEVIEW;
7638 SendText1(SvT11, CMsg1);
7639 SendText(SvB0, CMsg2);
7640 ClearText();
7641 BlueLedOn();
7642 return;
7643 }
7644 }
7645
7646 if (CurrentMode == CALIBRATELIMITS) {
7647 if (strcmp(TextIn, "Calibrate1") == 0) {
7648 CurrentMode = CENTRESTICKS;
7649 CurrentView = CALIBRATEVIEW;
7650 SendText1(SvT11, Cmsg3);
7651 SendText(SvB0, Cmsg4);
7652 ClearText();
7653 return;
7654 }
7655 }
7656 if (CurrentMode == CENTRESTICKS) {
7657 if (strcmp(TextIn, "Calibrate1") == 0) {
7658 CurrentMode = NORMAL;
7659 RedLedOn();
7660 SaveTransmitterParameters(); // Save calibrations
7661 LoadAllParameters(); // Restore all current model settings
7662 SendText(SvB0, Cmsg5);
7663 SendText(SvT11, Cmsg6);
7664 LastTimeRead = 0;
7665 ClearText();
7666 return;
7667 }
7668 }
7669 }
7670 ClearText(); // Let's have cleared text for next one!
7671} // end ButtonWasPressed() (... at last!!!)
7672
7673/************************************************************************************************************/
7674
7675uint16_t MakeTwobytes(bool* f)
7676{ // Pass arraypointer. Returns the two bytes
7677 uint16_t tb = 0; // all false is default
7678 for (int i = 0; i < 16; ++i) {
7679 if (f[15 - i] == true) {
7680 tb |= 1 << (i);
7681 } // sets a bit if true
7682 }
7683 return tb;
7684}
7685
7686/************************************************************************************************************/
7687
7688void LoadPacketData()
7689{
7690 uint16_t Twobytes = 0; // Extra data can be send using the last four bytes of each data packet. These are defined by the packet number
7691 uint8_t FS_Byte1;
7692 uint8_t FS_Byte2;
7693 char ProgressEnd[] = "vis Progress,0";
7694 SendBuffer[CHANNELSUSED] = PacketNumber;
7695 Twobytes = MakeTwobytes(FailSafeChannel); // 16 bool values compressed to 16 bits
7696 FS_Byte1 = uint8_t(Twobytes >> 8); // sent as two bytes
7697 FS_Byte2 = uint8_t(Twobytes & 0x00FF);
7698 SendBuffer[CHANNELSUSED + 1] = 0;
7699 SendBuffer[CHANNELSUSED + 2] = 0;
7700 switch (PacketNumber) {
7701 case 0:
7702 SendBuffer[CHANNELSUSED + 2] = BindingNow;
7703 if (BindingNow == 1) {
7704 BindingNow = 2;
7705 }
7706 if (((millis() - FailSafeTimer) > 1500) && SaveFailSafeNow) {
7707 SendBuffer[CHANNELSUSED + 1] = SaveFailSafeNow; // FailSafeSaveMoment
7708 SaveFailSafeNow = false; // once should do it.
7709 SendCommand(ProgressEnd);
7710 }
7711 break;
7712 case 1:
7713 SendBuffer[CHANNELSUSED + 1] = FS_Byte2; // these are failsafe flags
7714 SendBuffer[CHANNELSUSED + 2] = FS_Byte1; // these are failsafe flags
7715 break;
7716 case 2:
7717 SendBuffer[CHANNELSUSED + 1] = Qnh >> 8; // (HiByte) Qnh is current atmospheric pressure at sea level here (an aviation term)
7718 SendBuffer[CHANNELSUSED + 2] = Qnh & 0x00ff; // (LowByte) Qnh is current atmospheric pressure at sea level here (an aviation term)
7719 break;
7720 case 3:
7721 if (GPSMarkHere) {
7722 SendBuffer[CHANNELSUSED + 1] = 0;
7723 SendBuffer[CHANNELSUSED + 2] = GPSMarkHere;
7724 GPSMarkHere = 0;
7725 }
7726 break;
7727 case 4:
7728 SendBuffer[CHANNELSUSED + 1] = ModelMatched; // let receiver know whether correct model is loaded.
7729 SendBuffer[CHANNELSUSED + 2] = SwapWaveBand;
7730 if (SwapWaveBand == 2) SetTestFrequencies();
7731 if (SwapWaveBand == 1) SetUKFrequencies();
7732 SwapWaveBand = 0;
7733 break;
7734 default:
7735 break;
7736 }
7737}
7738
7739/************************************************************************************************************/
7740
7741void ReadDRSwitch(bool sw1, bool sw2, bool rev) // Dual Rate Switch
7742{
7743 if ((sw1 == false) && (sw2 == false))
7744 {
7745 DualRateInUse = 2;
7746 }
7747 else {
7748 if (rev) {
7749 if (sw1) DualRateInUse = 1;
7750 if (sw2) DualRateInUse = 3;
7751 }
7752 else {
7753 if (sw1) DualRateInUse = 3;
7754 if (sw2) DualRateInUse = 1;
7755 }
7756 }
7757}
7758
7759/************************************************************************************************************/
7760
7761void ReadFMSwitch(bool sw1, bool sw2, bool rev) // Bank Switch
7762{
7763 if ((sw1 == false) && (sw2 == false))
7764 {
7765 Bank = 2;
7766 }
7767 else {
7768 if (rev) {
7769 if (sw1) Bank = 1;
7770 if (sw2) Bank = 3;
7771 }
7772 else {
7773 if (sw1) Bank = 3;
7774 if (sw2) Bank = 1;
7775 }
7776 }
7777}
7778
7779/************************************************************************************************************/
7780
7781uint8_t ReadCHSwitch(bool sw1, bool sw2, bool rev)
7782{
7783 uint8_t ttmp = 90;
7784 if (sw1 == false && sw2 == false) ttmp = 90;
7785 if (rev) {
7786 if (sw1) ttmp = 0;
7787 if (sw2) ttmp = 180;
7788 }
7789 else {
7790 if (sw1) ttmp = 180;
7791 if (sw2) ttmp = 0;
7792 }
7793 return ttmp;
7794}
7795
7796/************************************************************************************************************/
7797
7798uint8_t CheckSwitch(uint8_t swt)
7799{
7800 uint8_t rtv = 90;
7801 if (swt == 1) rtv = ReadCHSwitch(Switch[7], Switch[6], SWITCH1Reversed);
7802 if (swt == 2) rtv = ReadCHSwitch(Switch[5], Switch[4], SWITCH2Reversed);
7803 if (swt == 3) rtv = ReadCHSwitch(Switch[0], Switch[1], SWITCH3Reversed);
7804 if (swt == 4) rtv = ReadCHSwitch(Switch[2], Switch[3], SWITCH4Reversed);
7805 return rtv;
7806}
7807
7808/************************************************************************************************************/
7809
7810void CheckMotorOff(){ // For Safety
7811
7812 ReadSwitches();
7813 MotorEnabled = !UseMotorKill; // If not using motor switch then motor is always enabled.
7814 if (AutoSwitch == 1 && Switch[7] == SWITCH1Reversed) MotorEnabled = true;
7815 if (AutoSwitch == 2 && Switch[5] == SWITCH2Reversed) MotorEnabled = true;
7816 if (AutoSwitch == 3 && Switch[0] == SWITCH3Reversed) MotorEnabled = true;
7817 if (AutoSwitch == 4 && Switch[2] == SWITCH4Reversed) MotorEnabled = true;
7818 if (SafetySwitch == 1 && Switch[7] == SWITCH1Reversed) SafetyON = true;
7819 if (SafetySwitch == 2 && Switch[5] == SWITCH2Reversed) SafetyON = true;
7820 if (SafetySwitch == 3 && Switch[0] == SWITCH3Reversed) SafetyON = true;
7821 if (SafetySwitch == 4 && Switch[2] == SWITCH4Reversed) SafetyON = true;
7822 if (SafetyON) MotorEnabled = false;
7823}
7824
7825/************************************************************************************************************/
7826
7827void GetBank()
7828{ // and motor switch and safety switch ETC ...
7829
7830 if (CurrentMode != NORMAL) return; // not needed if calibrating
7831
7832 SafetyON = false;
7833 BuddyON = false;
7834
7835 DualRateInUse = 4;
7836
7837 MotorEnabled = !UseMotorKill; // If not using motor switch then motor is always enabled.
7838
7839 if (AutoSwitch == 1 && Switch[7] == SWITCH1Reversed) MotorEnabled = true;
7840 if (AutoSwitch == 2 && Switch[5] == SWITCH2Reversed) MotorEnabled = true;
7841 if (AutoSwitch == 3 && Switch[1] == SWITCH3Reversed) MotorEnabled = true;
7842 if (AutoSwitch == 4 && Switch[2] == SWITCH4Reversed) MotorEnabled = true;
7843
7844 if (SafetySwitch == 1 && Switch[7] == SWITCH1Reversed) SafetyON = true;
7845 if (SafetySwitch == 2 && Switch[5] == SWITCH2Reversed) SafetyON = true;
7846 if (SafetySwitch == 3 && Switch[1] == SWITCH3Reversed) SafetyON = true;
7847 if (SafetySwitch == 4 && Switch[2] == SWITCH4Reversed) SafetyON = true;
7848
7849 if (BuddySwitch == 1 && Switch[7] == SWITCH1Reversed) BuddyON = true;
7850 if (BuddySwitch == 2 && Switch[5] == SWITCH2Reversed) BuddyON = true;
7851 if (BuddySwitch == 3 && Switch[1] == SWITCH3Reversed) BuddyON = true;
7852 if (BuddySwitch == 4 && Switch[2] == SWITCH4Reversed) BuddyON = true;
7853
7854 if (DualRatesSwitch == 4) ReadDRSwitch(Switch[2], Switch[3], SWITCH4Reversed);
7855 if (DualRatesSwitch == 3) ReadDRSwitch(Switch[0], Switch[1], SWITCH3Reversed);
7856 if (DualRatesSwitch == 2) ReadDRSwitch(Switch[4], Switch[5], SWITCH2Reversed);
7857 if (DualRatesSwitch == 1) ReadDRSwitch(Switch[6], Switch[7], SWITCH1Reversed);
7858
7859 if (DualRateInUse == 1) DualRateValue = Drate1;
7860 if (DualRateInUse == 2) DualRateValue = Drate2;
7861 if (DualRateInUse == 3) DualRateValue = Drate3;
7862 if (DualRateInUse == 4) DualRateValue = 100; // Switch not in use, so use 100%
7863
7864 if (PreviousDualRateInUse != DualRateInUse){
7865 PreviousDualRateInUse = DualRateInUse;
7866 LastShowTime = 0;
7867 LastTimeRead = 0;
7868 RestoreBrightness();
7869 if (AnnounceBanks){
7870 switch (DualRateInUse)
7871 {
7872 case 1:
7873 PlaySound(RATE1);
7874 break;
7875 case 2:
7876 PlaySound(RATE2);
7877 break;
7878 case 3:
7879 PlaySound(RATE3);
7880 break;
7881 default:
7882 break;
7883 }
7884 }
7885 // if (UseLog) LogNewRATE();
7886 }
7887
7888 if (FMSwitch == 4) ReadFMSwitch(Switch[2], Switch[3], SWITCH4Reversed);
7889 if (FMSwitch == 3) ReadFMSwitch(Switch[0], Switch[1], SWITCH3Reversed);
7890 if (FMSwitch == 2) ReadFMSwitch(Switch[4], Switch[5], SWITCH2Reversed);
7891 if (FMSwitch == 1) ReadFMSwitch(Switch[6], Switch[7], SWITCH1Reversed);
7892
7893 if (AutoSwitch == 1 && Switch[6] == SWITCH1Reversed) Bank = 4; // Flight mode 4 (Auto) overrides modes 1,2,3.
7894 if (AutoSwitch == 2 && Switch[4] == SWITCH2Reversed) Bank = 4;
7895 if (AutoSwitch == 3 && Switch[1] == SWITCH3Reversed) Bank = 4;
7896 if (AutoSwitch == 4 && Switch[3] == SWITCH4Reversed) Bank = 4;
7897
7898 if (SafetyWasOn != SafetyON){
7899 if (SafetyON) ShowSafetyIsOn(); else ShowSafetyIsOff();
7900 SafetyWasOn = SafetyON;
7901 }
7902
7903 if (SafetyON) MotorEnabled = false;
7904
7905 if ((MotorEnabled != MotorWasEnabled) && (UseMotorKill)) { // MotorEnabled changed ?
7906 if (MotorEnabled) {
7907 if (LedWasRed)
7908 {
7909 MotorEnabled = false;
7910 PlaySound(PLSTURNOFF);
7911 delay(4000);
7912 return;
7913 }
7914
7915 ShowMotor(1);
7916 if (AnnounceBanks) PlaySound(MOTORON); // Tell the pilot motor is on!
7917 if (UseLog) LogMotor(1);
7918 TimerMillis = millis();
7919 } else {
7920 if (AnnounceBanks) PlaySound(MOTOROFF);
7921 if (UseLog) LogMotor(0);
7922 ShowMotor(0); // Tell the pilot motor is off
7923 if (SendNoData){
7924 SendCommand(WarnOff);
7925 SendNoData = false; // user turned off motor
7926 }
7927 PausedSecs = Secs + (Mins * 60) + (Hours * 3600); // Remember how long so far
7928 }
7929 LastSeconds = 0;
7930 CheckTimer();
7931 }
7932 Channel9SwitchValue = CheckSwitch(Channel9Switch);
7933 Channel10SwitchValue = CheckSwitch(Channel10Switch);
7934 Channel11SwitchValue = CheckSwitch(Channel11Switch);
7935 Channel12SwitchValue = CheckSwitch(Channel12Switch);
7936 if (Bank != PreviousBank) {
7937 RestoreBrightness();
7938 LastShowTime = 0;
7939 LastTimeRead = 0;
7940 if (UseLog) LogNewBank();
7941 if (MotorEnabled == MotorWasEnabled) { // When turning off motor, don't sound bank too.
7942 if (AnnounceBanks) SoundBank();
7943 }
7944 if (CurrentView == FRONTVIEW) ShowBank();
7945 UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere();
7946 if (CurrentView == GRAPHVIEW) DisplayCurveAndServoPos();
7947 }
7948 MotorWasEnabled = MotorEnabled; // Remember motor state
7949 PreviousBank = Bank; // Remember BANK
7950}
7951
7952// *************************************************************************************************************
7953
7954void IncTrim(uint8_t t)
7955{
7956 bool Sounded = false;
7957 Trims[Bank][t] += 1;
7958 if (Trims[Bank][t] >= 120) {
7959 Trims[Bank][t] = 120;
7960 if (TrimClicks) {
7961
7962 PlaySound(BEEPCOMPLETE);
7963 Sounded = true;
7964 TrimRepeatSpeed = DefaultTrimRepeatSpeed;
7965 }
7966 }
7967 if (Trims[Bank][t] == 80) {
7968 TrimRepeatSpeed = DefaultTrimRepeatSpeed; // Restore default trim repeat speed at centre
7969 if (TrimClicks) {
7970 PlaySound(BEEPMIDDLE);
7971 Sounded = true;
7972 }
7973 }
7974 if ((CurrentView == TRIM_VIEW) || (CurrentView == FRONTVIEW)) UpdateTrimView();
7975 if ((TrimClicks) && (!Sounded)) PlaySound(CLICKZERO);
7976}
7977// *************************************************************************************************************
7978
7979void DecTrim(uint8_t t)
7980{
7981
7982 bool Sounded = false;
7983 Trims[Bank][t] -= 1;
7984 if (Trims[Bank][t] <= 40) {
7985 Trims[Bank][t] = 40;
7986 if (TrimClicks) {
7987 PlaySound(BEEPCOMPLETE);
7988 Sounded = true;
7989 TrimRepeatSpeed = DefaultTrimRepeatSpeed;
7990 }
7991 }
7992 if (Trims[Bank][t] == 80) {
7993 TrimRepeatSpeed = DefaultTrimRepeatSpeed; // Restore default trim repeat speed at centre
7994 if (TrimClicks) {
7995 PlaySound(BEEPMIDDLE);
7996 Sounded = true;
7997 }
7998 }
7999 if ((CurrentView == TRIM_VIEW) || (CurrentView == FRONTVIEW)) UpdateTrimView();
8000 if ((TrimClicks) && (!Sounded)) PlaySound(CLICKZERO);
8001}
8002
8003// *************************************************************************************************************
8004
8005void MoveaTrim(uint8_t i)
8006{
8007 uint8_t Elevator = 1;
8008 uint8_t Throttle = 2;
8009
8010 if (SticksMode == 2) {
8011 Elevator = 2;
8012 Throttle = 1;
8013 }
8014
8015 switch (i) {
8016 case 0:
8017 IncTrim(0); // Aileron
8018 break;
8019 case 1:
8020 DecTrim(0); // Aileron
8021 break;
8022 case 2:
8023 IncTrim(Elevator);
8024 break;
8025 case 3:
8026 DecTrim(Elevator);
8027 break;
8028 case 4:
8029 DecTrim(Throttle);
8030 break;
8031 case 5:
8032 IncTrim(Throttle);
8033 break;
8034 case 6:
8035 IncTrim(3); // Rudder
8036 break;
8037 case 7:
8038 DecTrim(3); // Rudder
8039 break;
8040 default:
8041 break;
8042 }
8043 if (ScreenIsOff) RestoreBrightness();
8044 if (CopyTrimsToAll) {
8045 for (i = 0; i < 4; ++i)
8046 for (int fm = 1; fm < 5; ++fm) {
8047 Trims[fm][i] = Trims[Bank][i];
8048 TrimsReversed[fm][i] = TrimsReversed[Bank][i];
8049 }
8050 }
8051}
8052
8053/************************************************************************************************************/
8054
8055void SetATrimDefinition(int i)
8056{
8057 char AilDone[] = "Aileron trim is defined!";
8058 char EleDone[] = "Elevator trim is defined!";
8059 char ThrDone[] = "Throttle trim is defined!";
8060 char RudDone[] = "Rudder trim is defined!";
8061 char ail[] = "ail";
8062 char ele[] = "ele";
8063 char thr[] = "thr";
8064 char rud[] = "rud";
8065 // Aileron
8066 if (!TrimDefined[0]) {
8067 if ((i == 0) || (i == 1)) {
8068 PlaySound(BEEPCOMPLETE);
8069 SendText(ail, AilDone);
8070 TrimDefined[0] = true;
8071 }
8072 if (i == 0) {
8073 TrimNumber[0] = TRIM1A;
8074 TrimNumber[1] = TRIM1B;
8075 }
8076 if (i == 1) {
8077 TrimNumber[1] = TRIM1A;
8078 TrimNumber[0] = TRIM1B;
8079 }
8080 }
8081 // Elevator
8082 if (!TrimDefined[1]) {
8083 if ((i == 2) || (i == 3)) {
8084 PlaySound(BEEPCOMPLETE);
8085 SendText(ele, EleDone);
8086 TrimDefined[1] = true;
8087 }
8088 if (i == 3) {
8089 TrimNumber[2] = TRIM2A;
8090 TrimNumber[3] = TRIM2B;
8091 }
8092 if (i == 2) {
8093 TrimNumber[3] = TRIM2A;
8094 TrimNumber[2] = TRIM2B;
8095 }
8096 }
8097 // Throttle
8098 if (!TrimDefined[2]) {
8099 if ((i == 4) || (i == 5)) {
8100 PlaySound(BEEPCOMPLETE);
8101 SendText(thr, ThrDone);
8102 TrimDefined[2] = true;
8103 }
8104 if (i == 4) {
8105 TrimNumber[4] = TRIM3A;
8106 TrimNumber[5] = TRIM3B;
8107 }
8108 if (i == 5) {
8109 TrimNumber[5] = TRIM3A;
8110 TrimNumber[4] = TRIM3B;
8111 }
8112 }
8113 // Rudder
8114 if (!TrimDefined[3]) {
8115 if ((i == 6) || (i == 7)) {
8116 PlaySound(BEEPCOMPLETE);
8117 SendText(rud, RudDone);
8118 TrimDefined[3] = true;
8119 }
8120 if (i == 6) {
8121 TrimNumber[6] = TRIM4A;
8122 TrimNumber[7] = TRIM4B;
8123 }
8124 if (i == 7) {
8125 TrimNumber[7] = TRIM4A;
8126 TrimNumber[6] = TRIM4B;
8127 }
8128 }
8129}
8130
8131/************************************************************************************************************/
8132
8133void CheckHardwareTrims()
8134{
8135 int i;
8136 if ((millis() - TrimTimer) < TrimRepeatSpeed) return; // check occasionally for trim press
8137 TrimTimer = millis();
8138 for (i = 0; i < 8; ++i) {
8139 if (TrimSwitch[i]) {
8140 if (DefiningTrims) {
8141 SetATrimDefinition(i);
8142 return;
8143 }
8144 MoveaTrim(i);
8145 TransmitterLastManaged = 0; // to speed up repeat
8146 TrimRepeatSpeed -= (TrimRepeatSpeed / 4); // accelerate repeat...
8147 if (TrimRepeatSpeed < 10) TrimRepeatSpeed = 30; // ... up to a point...
8148 }
8149 }
8150}
8151/************************************************************************************************************/
8152void swap(uint8_t* a, uint8_t* b)
8153{ // Just swap over two bytes, a & b :-)
8154 uint8_t c;
8155 c = *a;
8156 *a = *b;
8157 *b = c;
8158}
8159/************************************************************************************************************/
8160void CalibrateEdgeSwitches()
8161{ // This function avoids the need to rotate the four edge switches if installed backwards
8162 for (int i = 0; i < 8; ++i) {
8163 if (digitalRead(SwitchNumber[i])) {
8164 if (i == 0) swap(&SwitchNumber[i], &SwitchNumber[i + 1]); // swap over switches' pin number if wrongly installed
8165 if (i == 2) swap(&SwitchNumber[i], &SwitchNumber[i + 1]); // swap over switches' pin number if wrongly installed
8166 if (i == 4) swap(&SwitchNumber[i], &SwitchNumber[i + 1]); // swap over switches' pin number if wrongly installed
8167 if (i == 6) swap(&SwitchNumber[i], &SwitchNumber[i + 1]); // swap over switches' pin number if wrongly installed
8168 }
8169 }
8170}
8171/************************************************************************************************************/
8172
8173FASTRUN void ReadSwitches() // and indeed read digital trims if these are fitted
8174{
8175 byte flag = 0;
8176 for (int i = 0; i < 8; ++i) {
8177 Switch[i] = !digitalRead(SwitchNumber[i]); // These are reversed because they are active low
8178 TrimSwitch[i] = !digitalRead(TrimNumber[i]); // These are reversed because they are active low
8179 if (TrimSwitch[i]) ++flag; // a finger is on a trim lever...
8180 if ((TrimSwitch[i]) && (PreviousTrim != i)) { // is it a new one?
8181 TrimTimer = 0; // it IS a new one, so no delay please.
8182 PreviousTrim = i; // remember which trim it was
8183 }
8184 }
8185 if (flag > 1) { // one at a time please!!
8186 TrimRepeatSpeed = DefaultTrimRepeatSpeed; // Restore default trim repeat speed
8187 for (int i = 0; i < 8; ++i) {
8188 (TrimSwitch[i]) = 0;
8189 flag = 0;
8190 }
8191 }
8192 if (!flag) {
8193 PreviousTrim = 254; // Previous trim must now match none
8194 TrimRepeatSpeed = DefaultTrimRepeatSpeed; // Restore default trim repeat speed
8195 }
8196
8197}
8198/************************************************************************************************************/
8199
8200void GetRXVersionNumber()
8201{
8202 char nbuf[5];
8203 Str(nbuf, AckPayload.Byte1, 0);
8204 strcpy(ThisRadio, nbuf);
8205 if (LastRadio != AckPayload.Byte1) {
8206 LastRadio = AckPayload.Byte1;
8207 if (LogRXSwaps && UseLog) LogThisRX();
8208 }
8209 Str(ReceiverVersionNumber, AckPayload.Byte2, 2);
8210 Str(nbuf, AckPayload.Byte3, 2);
8211 strcat(ReceiverVersionNumber, nbuf);
8212 Str(nbuf, AckPayload.Byte4, 0);
8213 strcat(ReceiverVersionNumber, nbuf);
8214}
8215
8216/************************************************************************************************************/
8217
8218FASTRUN float GetFromAckPayload()
8219{
8220 union
8221 {
8222 float Val32;
8223 uint8_t Val8[4];
8224 } ThisUnion;
8225 ThisUnion.Val8[0] = AckPayload.Byte1;
8226 ThisUnion.Val8[1] = AckPayload.Byte2;
8227 ThisUnion.Val8[2] = AckPayload.Byte3;
8228 ThisUnion.Val8[3] = AckPayload.Byte4;
8229 return ThisUnion.Val32;
8230}
8231/************************************************************************************************************/
8232void GetTimeFromAckPayload()
8233{
8234 GPSSecs = AckPayload.Byte1;
8235 GPSMins = AckPayload.Byte2;
8236 GPSHours = AckPayload.Byte3;
8237}
8238/************************************************************************************************************/
8239void GetDateFromAckPayload()
8240{
8241 GPSDay = AckPayload.Byte1;
8242 GPSMonth = AckPayload.Byte2;
8243 GPSYear = AckPayload.Byte3;
8244}
8245/************************************************************************************************************/
8246void GetAltitude()
8247{
8248 RXModelAltitude = int(GetFromAckPayload()) - GroundModelAltitude;
8249 if (RXMAXModelAltitude < RXModelAltitude) RXMAXModelAltitude = RXModelAltitude;
8250 snprintf(MaxAltitude, 5, "%d", RXMAXModelAltitude);
8251 snprintf(ModelAltitude, 5, "%d", RXModelAltitude);
8252}
8253/************************************************************************************************************/
8254void GetTemperature()
8255{
8256 RXModelTemperature = GetFromAckPayload();
8257 snprintf(ModelTemperature, 5, "%f", RXModelTemperature);
8258}
8259/************************************************************************************************************/
8260FASTRUN uint32_t GetIntFromAckPayload() // This one uses a uint32_t int
8261{
8262 union
8263 {
8264 uint32_t Val32 = 0;
8265 uint8_t Val8[4];
8266 } ThisUnion;
8267 ThisUnion.Val8[0] = AckPayload.Byte1;
8268 ThisUnion.Val8[1] = AckPayload.Byte2;
8269 ThisUnion.Val8[2] = AckPayload.Byte3;
8270 ThisUnion.Val8[3] = AckPayload.Byte4;
8271 return ThisUnion.Val32;
8272}
8273
8274/************************************************************************************************************/
8275
8276void GotoFrontView(){
8277 if (CurrentView != FRONTVIEW)
8278 {
8279 if (CurrentView == SCANVIEW) DoScanEnd();
8280 SendCommand(page_FrontView);
8281 CurrentView = FRONTVIEW;
8282 UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere();
8283 SafetyWasOn ^= 1; // this forces a re-display of safety state
8284 ShowBank();
8285 LastTimeRead = 0;
8286 Reconnected = false; // this is to make '** Connected! **' redisplay (in ShowComms())
8287 LastSeconds = 0; // This forces redisplay of timer...
8288 Force_ReDisplay();
8289 CheckTimer();
8290 ClearText();
8291 LastShowTime = 0; // this is to make redisplay sooner (in ShowComms())
8292 SendText(FrontView_Connected, na);
8293 }
8294}
8295
8296/************************************************************************************************************/
8297
8298void CompareModelsIDs(){ // The saved MacAddress is compared with the one just received from the model ... etc ...
8299
8300 uint8_t SavedModelNumber = ModelNumber;
8301 ModelMatched = false;
8302 GotoFrontView();
8303 RestoreBrightness();
8304 if (ModelIdentified) { // We have both bits of Model ID?
8305 if ((ModelsMacUnion.Val32[0] == ModelsMacUnionSaved.Val32[0]) && (ModelsMacUnion.Val32[1] == ModelsMacUnionSaved.Val32[1])) {
8306 if (AnnounceConnected) {
8307 PlaySound(MMMATCHED);
8308 Procrastinate(1000);
8309 }
8310 ModelMatched = true; // It's a match so start flying!
8311 BindButton = true;
8312 } else {
8313 if (AutoModelSelect){ // It's not a match so maybe search for it.
8314 ModelNumber = 0;
8315 while ((ModelMatched == false) && (ModelNumber < 99)) { // Try to match the ID with a save one
8316 ++ModelNumber;
8317 ReadOneModel(ModelNumber);
8318 if ((ModelsMacUnion.Val32[0] == ModelsMacUnionSaved.Val32[0]) && (ModelsMacUnion.Val32[1] == ModelsMacUnionSaved.Val32[1])) {
8319 ModelMatched = true;
8320 BindButton = true;
8321 }
8322 }
8323 if (ModelMatched){ // Found it!
8324 UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere(); // Use it.
8325 if (AnnounceConnected) {
8326 PlaySound(MMFOUND);
8327 Procrastinate(1500);
8328 }
8329 SaveAllParameters(); // Save it
8330 }else{
8331 if (AnnounceConnected) {
8332 if ((millis() - WarningTimer) > 10000) {
8333 PlaySound(MMNOTFOUND);
8334 Procrastinate(1500);
8335 }
8336 }
8337 ModelNumber = SavedModelNumber; // Not found anywhere. So offer to bind the restored selected one
8338 ReadOneModel(ModelNumber);
8339 SendCommand(BindButtonVisible);
8340 if ((millis() - WarningTimer) > 10000) {
8341 WarningTimer = millis();
8342 if (AnnounceConnected) PlaySound(BINDNEEDED);
8343 }
8344 BindButton = true;
8345 ModelMatched = false;
8346 } return;
8347 } else {
8348 SendCommand(BindButtonVisible);
8349 if ((millis() - WarningTimer) > 10000) {
8350 WarningTimer = millis();
8351 if (AnnounceConnected) PlaySound(BINDNEEDED);
8352 }
8353 BindButton = true;
8354 ModelMatched = false;
8355 }
8356 }
8357 }
8358}
8359/************************************************************************************************************/
8360void GetModelsMacAddress(){
8361 switch (AckPayload.Purpose)
8362 {
8363 case 0:
8364 ModelsMacUnion.Val32[0] = GetIntFromAckPayload();
8365 break;
8366 case 1:
8367 ModelsMacUnion.Val32[1] = GetIntFromAckPayload();
8368 break;
8369 default:
8370 break;
8371 }
8372
8373 if (ModelMatched == false) {
8374 if ((ModelsMacUnion.Val32[0] > 0) && (ModelsMacUnion.Val32[1] > 0)){ // got both bits yet?
8375 ModelIdentified = true;
8376 }
8377 CompareModelsIDs();
8378 }
8379 if (!BindingTimer) BindingTimer = millis();
8380 if (BindButton) {
8381 if ((millis() - BindingTimer) > 1500) {
8382 SendCommand(BindButtonVisible);
8383 BindButton = true;
8384 }
8385 }
8386}
8387/************************************************************************************************************/
8388FASTRUN void ParseAckPayload()
8389{
8390 if (BuddyPupilOnSbus) return; // buddy pupil need none of this
8391
8392 if (AckPayload.Purpose & 0x80) // Hi bit is now the **HOP NOW!!** flag
8393 {
8394 NextChannelNumber = AckPayload.Byte5; // This is just the array pointer or offset
8395 NextChannel = *(FHSSChPointer + NextChannelNumber); // The actual channel number pointed to.
8396 HopToNextChannel();
8397 AckPayload.Purpose &= 0x7f; // Clear the high BIT, use the remainder ...
8398 }
8399
8400 if (!BoundFlag){
8401 GetModelsMacAddress();
8402 return;
8403 }
8404
8405 switch (AckPayload.Purpose) // Only look at the low 7 BITS
8406 {
8407 case 0:
8408 GetRXVersionNumber();
8409 break;
8410 case 1:
8411 SbusRepeats = GetFromAckPayload();
8412 break;
8413 case 2:
8414 RadioSwaps = GetFromAckPayload();
8415 break;
8416 case 3:
8417 RX1TotalTime = GetFromAckPayload();
8418 break;
8419 case 4:
8420 RX2TotalTime = GetFromAckPayload();
8421 break;
8422 case 5:
8423 RXModelVolts = GetFromAckPayload();
8424 RXVoltsDetected = false;
8425 if (RXModelVolts > 0) {
8426 RXVoltsDetected = true;
8427 if (RXCellCount == 12) RXModelVolts *= 2; // voltage divider needed !
8428 snprintf(ModelVolts, 5, "%f", RXModelVolts);
8429 }
8430 break;
8431 case 6:
8432 GetAltitude();
8433 break;
8434 case 7:
8435 GetTemperature();
8436 break;
8437 case 8:
8438 GPSLatitude = GetFromAckPayload();
8439 break;
8440 case 9:
8441 GPSLongitude = GetFromAckPayload();
8442 break;
8443 case 10:
8444 GPSAngle = GetFromAckPayload();
8445 break;
8446 case 11:
8447 GPSSpeed = GetFromAckPayload();
8448 if (GPSMaxSpeed < GPSSpeed) GPSMaxSpeed = GPSSpeed;
8449 break;
8450 case 12:
8451 GpsFix = GetFromAckPayload();
8452 break;
8453 case 13:
8454 GPSAltitude = GetFromAckPayload() - GPSGroundAltitude;
8455 if (GPSAltitude < 0) GPSAltitude = 0;
8456 if (GPSMaxAltitude < GPSAltitude) GPSMaxAltitude = GPSAltitude;
8457 break;
8458 case 14:
8459 GPSDistanceTo = GetFromAckPayload();
8460 if (GPSMaxDistance < GPSDistanceTo) GPSMaxDistance = GPSDistanceTo;
8461 break;
8462 case 15:
8463 GPSCourseTo = GetFromAckPayload();
8464 break;
8465 case 16:
8466 GPSSatellites = (uint8_t)GetFromAckPayload();
8467 break;
8468 case 17:
8469 GetDateFromAckPayload();
8470 break;
8471 case 18:
8472 GetTimeFromAckPayload();
8473 ReadTheRTC();
8474 if (GPSDay != GmonthDay) GPSTimeSynched = false;
8475 if (GPSMonth != GPSMonth) GPSTimeSynched = false;
8476 if (GPSMins != Gminute) GPSTimeSynched = false;
8477 if (GPSHours != Ghour) GPSTimeSynched = false;
8478 if (GPSSecs != Gsecond) GPSTimeSynched = false;
8479 if (GpsFix) SynchRTCwithGPSTime();
8480 break;
8481 default:
8482 break;
8483 }
8484}
8485/************************************************************************************************************/
8486FASTRUN void CheckGapsLength()
8487{
8488 if (GapStart > 0) { // when reconnected, how long was connection lost?
8489 ++GapCount;
8490 ThisGap = (millis() - GapStart); // AND in fact RX sends no data for 20 ms after reconnection
8491 if (ThisGap >= MinimumGap && UseLog) LogThisGap();
8492 if (ThisGap > GapLongest) GapLongest = ThisGap;
8493 GapSum += ThisGap;
8494 GapStart = 0;
8495 GapAverage = GapSum / GapCount;
8496#ifdef DB_GAPS
8497 Serial.print("GapCount: ");
8498 Serial.println(GapCount);
8499 Serial.print("GapAverage: ");
8500 Serial.println(GapAverage);
8501 Serial.print("GapLongest: ");
8502 Serial.println(GapLongest);
8503 Serial.println(" ");
8504#endif
8505 }
8506}
8507
8508/************************************************************************************************************/
8509void CheckModelName()
8510{ // In ModelsView, this function checks correct name is displayed.
8511 char ModelsView_ModelNumber[] = "ModelNumber"; //
8512
8513 ModelNumber = GetValue(ModelsView_ModelNumber);
8514 if (LastModelLoaded != ModelNumber) {
8515 if ((ModelNumber > 99) || (ModelNumber < 1)) ModelNumber = 1;
8516 ReadOneModel(ModelNumber);
8517 if (UseLog) LogThisModel();
8518 LastModelLoaded = ModelNumber;
8519 UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere();
8520 }
8521 ClearText();
8522}
8523
8524/************************************************************************************************************/
8525
8526void CheckScanButton() // Scan button AND models button
8527{
8528 if (CurrentView == MAINSETUPVIEW) {
8529 if (ModelMatched) {
8530 if(!b5isGrey) {
8531 SendCommand(b5Greyed);
8532 SendCommand(b12Greyed);
8533 b5isGrey = true;
8534 }
8535 }
8536 }
8537}
8538/************************************************************************************************************/
8539void SimulateCloseDown(){ // Because real closedown occurs only after button is released
8540
8541 char ScreenOff[] = "dim=0";
8542 analogWrite(GREENLED, 0);
8543 analogWrite(BLUELED, 0);
8544 analogWrite(REDLED, 0);
8545 SendCommand(ScreenOff);
8546 digitalWrite(POWER_OFF_PIN, HIGH);
8547}
8548/************************************************************************************************************/
8549void CheckPowerOffButton()
8550{
8551
8552 char PowerMsg[15];
8553 char PowerPre[] = "TURN OFF?! ";
8554 char nb[4];
8555
8556 if (!digitalRead(BUTTON_SENSE_PIN)){
8557 GotoFrontView();
8558 if (!LedWasGreen)
8559 {
8560 SimulateCloseDown(); // if not connected power off immediately
8561 } else
8562 {
8563 if (!PowerOffTimer) {
8564 RestoreBrightness();
8565 PowerOffTimer = millis(); // Start a timer for power off button down
8566 TurnOffSecondToGo = PowerOffWarningSeconds;
8567 }
8568 }
8569 } else {
8570 PowerOffTimer = 0;
8571 }
8572
8573 if (PowerOffTimer) { // count down started?
8574 if (!PowerWarningVisible) {
8575 SendCommand(StillConnected);
8576 PowerWarningVisible = true;
8577 }
8578 }
8579 else {
8580 if (PowerWarningVisible) {
8581 SendCommand(NotStillConnected);
8582 PowerWarningVisible = false;
8583 }
8584 return;
8585 }
8586
8587 if (PowerWarningVisible) {
8588 if ((millis() - PreviousPowerOffTimer) >= 1000) {
8589 strcpy(PowerMsg, PowerPre);
8590 Str(nb, TurnOffSecondToGo, 0);
8591 strcat(PowerMsg, nb);
8592 SendText(StillConnectedBox, PowerMsg);
8593 if (TurnOffSecondToGo <= 0) { // Time's up!
8594 if (UseLog) LogPowerOff(); // log the event
8595 if (PlayFanfare) {
8596 PlaySound(WHAHWHAHMSG);
8597 delay(2300);
8598 }
8599 SaveAllParameters();
8600 delay(250); // wait a mo for user to see 0 and log to write to file
8601 SimulateCloseDown();
8602 }
8603 --TurnOffSecondToGo;
8604 if (TrimClicks) PlaySound(CLICKZERO);
8605 PreviousPowerOffTimer = millis();
8606 }
8607 }
8608}
8609
8610/************************************************************************************************************/
8611void FASTRUN ManageTransmitter(){
8612
8613 uint32_t RightNow = millis();
8614 uint32_t TXPacketElapsed = RightNow - LastPacketSentTime;
8615
8616 KickTheDog(); // Watchdog ... ALWAYS!
8617
8618 if (GetButtonPress()) ButtonWasPressed(); // Pretty obvious really ...
8619
8620 if ((PACEMAKER - TXPacketElapsed <= TIMEFORTXMANAGMENT) && Connected && BoundFlag && ModelMatched) return; // If it's almost time to send data, then do not start some other task which might take longer.
8621
8622 if (RightNow - TransmitterLastManaged > 100) { // 10 times a second is plenty
8623 if (RightNow - LastTimeRead >= 1000) { // Once a second for these...
8624 ReadTime(); // Do the clock
8625 GetStatistics(); // Do stats
8626 if (CurrentView == MAINSETUPVIEW) CheckScanButton();
8627 if (CurrentView == MODELSVIEW) CheckModelName(); // In MODELSVIEW, this function checks correct name is displayed.
8628 LastTimeRead = millis();
8629 return; // That's enough housekeeping this time around
8630 }
8631 ReadSwitches(); // Check switch positions
8632 CheckHardwareTrims();
8633 GetBank(); // Must not call too often
8634 ShowComms(); // Screen Data
8635 CheckTimer(); // Screen Timer
8636 CheckPowerOffButton(); // Pretty obvious really ...
8637 TransmitterLastManaged = millis();
8638 }
8639}
8640
8641/************************************************************************************************************/
8642// LOOP
8643/************************************************************************************************************/
8644FASTRUN void loop()
8645{
8646 ManageTransmitter(); // Do the needed chores ... if there's time
8647 GetNewChannelValues(); // Load SendBuffer with new servo positions Very frequently
8648 if (UseMacros) ExecuteMacro(); // Modify it if macro is running
8649 if (BuddyPupilOnSbus) {
8650 NewCompressNeeded = false; // fake it as Buddy is not sending data
8651 } else { // Skip these next lines when buddying as a slave
8652 if (!BoundFlag && Connected) BufferNewPipe(); // if not yet bound, insert our pipe into SendBuffer BUT ONLY WHEN CONNECTED
8653 if (BuddyMaster) GetSlaveChannelValues(); // If buddy master, get buddy data and maybe use it.
8654 if (!MotorEnabled) SendBuffer[MotorChannel] = IntoHigherRes(MotorChannelZero); // If safety is on, throttle will be zero
8655 Compress(CompressedData, SendBuffer, UNCOMPRESSEDWORDS); // Compress 32 bytes down to 24
8656 }
8657 ShowServoPos();
8658 switch (CurrentMode) {
8659 case NORMAL: // 0
8660 SendData();
8661 break;
8662 case CALIBRATELIMITS: // 1
8663 CalibrateSticks();
8664 break;
8665 case CENTRESTICKS: // 2
8666 ChannelCentres();
8667 break;
8668 case SCANWAVEBAND: // 3
8669 ScanAllChannels();
8670 break;
8671 case SENDNOTHING: // 4
8672 break;
8673 default:
8674 break; // CurrentMode >= 4 for no action at all.
8675 }
8676} // end loop()
setup
void setup()

loop
void loop()
